title: Credit Analysis Virtual Assistant (FCRA Compliance & Violations Specialist)
description:
Move Mountains Credit Repair is seeking a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant with experience in credit report analysis and FCRA (Fair Credit Reporting Act) compliance.



This role is responsible for identifying inaccurate, unverifiable, or non-compliant reporting on consumer credit reports and assisting our team in strengthening dispute strategies.



?



Key Responsibilities

 • Review client credit reports (SmartCredit, IdentityIQ, MyFreeScoreNow, etc.)

 • Identify potential FCRA violations and reporting inaccuracies

 • Analyze:

 • Collections

 • Charge-offs

 • Late payments

 • Inquiries

 • Personal information inconsistencies

 • Flag:

 • Incomplete or inconsistent account data

 • Outdated or unverifiable information

 • Duplicate accounts

 • Reporting discrepancies across bureaus

 • Utilize platforms such as Credit Butterfly (or similar tools) to document findings

 • Organize and report violations clearly for internal team use

 • Follow company SOPs and compliance standards



?



Requirements (MANDATORY)

 • Strong understanding of credit reports and credit reporting structure

 • Knowledge of FCRA laws and consumer rights

 • Experience identifying inaccurate or non-compliant reporting

 • High attention to detail

 • Ability to follow structured processes

 • Strong written communication (clear documentation of findings)



?



Preferred Experience

 • Experience with Credit Repair industry

 • Familiarity with tools such as:

 • SmartCredit

 • IdentityIQ

 • MyFreeScoreNow

 • Credit Karma (basic understanding)

 • Experience using Credit Butterfly or similar dispute tools



?



Compensation

 • Starting at $2.00/hour (part-time)

 • Performance-based bonuses available for high-quality work

 • Opportunity for long-term growth within the company



?



Performance Expectations

 • Accuracy over speed

 • Consistent identification of valid violations

 • Ability to follow instructions and improve over time

 • Clear and organized reporting



?



Important Notes

 • This is a detail-heavy role — mistakes can impact results

 • Training will be provided, but basic credit knowledge is required

 • Must be reliable and able to meet deadlines



?



???? What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone who:

 • Pays attention to small details

 • Can think critically when reviewing data

 • Is coachable and consistent

 • Takes ownership of their work



?



“Precision creates results. Details matter.”

title: Real Estate Acquisitions
description:
Real Estate Acquisitions Specialist (Remote)



About Us

Price Real Estate Investments is a multi-market U.S. based real estate investment company focused on acquiring off-market properties directly from homeowners. We specialize in building strong relationships with sellers, negotiating with them, and closing deals virtually. Our team is fully remote, but our impact is nationwide — and we’re growing quickly.



We’re looking for an experienced Real Estate Acquisitions Specialist to join our acquisitions team. This role is critical to our business: you’ll be speaking directly with homeowners, negotiating terms, and guiding sellers through the contract signing process. If you’ve personally made offers to sellers and closed contracts over the phone, this is an opportunity to put your skills to work in a high-energy, professional environment.



Compensation

$10/hour USD base pay



Plus Monthly Contract Bonuses for getting offers accepted:

• Bronze: 2 signed contracts = $500 bonus

• Silver: 3 signed contracts = $1,000 bonus

• Gold: 4 signed contracts = $1,500 bonus

• Platinum: 5+ signed contracts = $2,000 bonus



On-target earnings can range from $2,500–$3,500+ per month depending on performance. Pay dates are on the 1st and 15th of each month.



We believe in rewarding results. Our top performers earn meaningful bonuses based on closed contracts and consistent production.



Schedule

Full-time, Monday to Friday

9:00 AM – 6:00 PM CST

Remote position, work from your own secure setup



What You’ll Be Doing

- Engage with homeowners (seller leads), build authentic rapport, and manage conversations with professionalism

- Follow a proven acquisitions script while sounding natural and confident

- Ask strong follow-up questions to uncover seller motivation and property condition

- Make verbal offers, negotiate price and terms, and walk sellers through agreements using DocuSign

- Handle objections effectively and push deals forward toward signed contracts

- Maintain organized notes, offers, and seller updates in our CRM

- Collaborate closely with the acquisitions team and leadership



What It Takes to Succeed Here

- Relentless Follow-Up: Sellers don’t always respond the first time — or the second. You know how to stay persistent with calls, texts, and follow-ups until you get an answer. Nothing slips through the cracks on your watch.

- Extreme Attention to Detail: Every call, every note, every update gets logged correctly in the CRM. You don’t miss details, and you take pride in keeping your pipeline organized. If you’ve ever been called meticulous or “on top of everything,” this is where you’ll shine.

- Closer’s Mentality: You’re not just reading a script — you know how to listen, build rapport, and guide sellers toward a decision. You thrive on negotiation, handle objections with confidence, and create win-win agreements that get signed.

- Driven by Results: You measure success by contracts closed. You hold yourself to high standards and push to hit — and exceed — your targets consistently. You’re motivated by performance and driven by the satisfaction of closing successful deals.

- Resilient Problem-Solver: Whether it’s a tough seller, a pricing objection, or a complicated situation, you don’t freeze — you find solutions and move the deal forward. Challenges are part of the role, and you thrive in solving them under pressure.



Requirements

- Minimum 2+ years of experience in real estate acquisitions or seller negotiations

- Proven track record of closing real estate deals and securing signed contracts

- Excellent English communication skills (spoken and written)

- Confidence and professionalism on the phone; ability to build trust and rapport quickly

- Familiarity with real estate terms like ARV, repairs, inspection, contingencies, etc.

- Strong work ethic, coachability, and ability to follow scripts while sounding natural

- Proficiency with CRMs and outbound dialers

- Reliable high-speed internet, updated computer, and a quiet workspace



What We’re Looking For

- A confident, friendly, and persuasive communicator who thrives on results

- Someone who is organized, detail-oriented, and relentless in follow-up

- A professional with the drive to close contracts and grow with a fast-moving team



Why Join Us?

- Competitive pay with structured bonuses

- Real opportunities for growth in a professional investment company

- Work remotely with a team that supports your success

- A chance to close real deals, make a real impact, and develop long-term career skills in acquisitions



At Price Real Estate Investments, acquisitions is the heartbeat of our business. You’ll be in the front seat, driving growth and learning the strategies that power real deals across multiple U.S. markets.



How to Apply: (Read Carefully – Incomplete Applications Will Be Ignored)

-
 us at: 

- Subject line: Real Estate Acquisitions Application – OJPH

- Attach your resume with relevant real estate or sales experience

- Include a 1–2 minute audio or video introduction about yourself and experience.



Only applicants who follow all instructions will be considered.

title: Graphic Designer (Static Ads & Video) – Long-Term Role | Lingerie Brand
description:
We're a lingerie brand selling across multiple European markets. We're looking for a talented and reliable designer who can create scroll-stopping static ads — and occasionally short video ads — for our paid social campaigns on Meta, Pinterest, and more.

This is a long-term position. We want someone who genuinely wants to be part of a close-knit team and grow with us — not someone looking for a quick project.



What you'll be doing:

- Creating static ad creatives (primary focus) and occasional short video ads

- Working with brand assets and briefs to produce multiple ad variations

- Delivering work quickly when needed — speed and flexibility are essential

- Communicating clearly and proactively in English throughout the process



Requirements:

All points below are hard requirements. Every single one will be verified during the onboarding call. If it turns out you don't meet one or more of these and weren't upfront about it, we will end the collaboration immediately. We value honesty above all and these requirements are non-negotiable.

- Minimum 2 years of professional experience in ad creative design (e-commerce or agency background preferred)

- Strong proficiency in Canva Pro and/or Adobe Photoshop / Illustrator

- Real understanding of what makes a static ad perform — hooks, visual hierarchy, CTA placement

- Familiar with ad specs and safe zones for Meta (Feed, Stories, Reels) and Pinterest

- Experience delivering multiple creative variations for A/B testing

- Fluent in written and spoken English — this is mandatory, not optional

- Fast communicator — you respond promptly and don't need to be chased

- Flexible and able to pick up tasks quickly when deadlines are tight

- Comfortable working in the lingerie and intimate apparel space

- In it for the long term — you want to become a real part of the team, not just complete a job



What we offer

- A stable, long-term freelance position with a growing European lingerie brand

- A small, tight-knit team where your work is seen and valued

- Clear briefs and fast feedback so you can do your best work

- Consistent workload with room to grow your role over time



How to apply:

Please send us the following — incomplete applications will not be reviewed:



1. A link to your portfolio (ad creatives only — no general design work)

2. 2–3 examples of static ads you've made that actually ran as paid ads

3. A short message (5–10 sentences) on why you're a great fit and how you handle tight deadlines

4. A confirmation that you meet all requirements listed above and understand they will be verified during the onboarding call



Important: 

If during the onboarding call it becomes clear that you don't meet the stated requirements and weren't honest about this upfront, the collaboration will be ended immediately. We appreciate transparency — if you're unsure about a specific point, just mention it in your application.

, outreach or campaign platforms

title: 3D PRINTING EXPERT
description:
Production Engineer (Remote)



Supporting Voltech Operations

Voltech is seeking a technically strong, detail-oriented Production Engineer (Remote) to support global operations related to Voltech test systems and custom test fixtures.



This role is ideal for an engineer who enjoys solving complex mechanical and electrical problems, improving manufacturing systems, and taking ownership of production standards. You will work closely with cross-functional teams and international suppliers to improve fixture reliability, production efficiency, and long-term product architecture.



We are looking for someone who does more than execute instructions — we value engineers who proactively identify weaknesses, design structured improvements, and drive measurable results.



Role Overview

The Remote Production Engineer will:

Support production and fixture-related engineering activities

Improve manufacturing processes and reduce inefficiencies

Investigate design and production issues affecting Voltech test systems

Maintain and improve technical drawings and documentation

Coordinate with international suppliers on technical and quality standards

Support 3D-printed fixture components and rapid prototyping

Contribute to global production engineering standards

This is a hands-on engineering role requiring strong analytical ability, structured thinking, and practical problem-solving skills. The ideal candidate is comfortable working independently while collaborating remotely with sales, applications, service, and supplier teams across time zones.



Key Responsibilities

1. Production & Fixture Engineering Support

Provide remote engineering support for production of Voltech test fixtures and accessories

Troubleshoot mechanical and electrical fixture issues impacting customer testing

Improve fixture durability, usability, and measurement repeatability

Analyze recurring production issues and implement corrective actions

Design and refine precision contact systems (Kelvin probes, spring contacts, alignment plates)

Manage tolerance stack-ups in multi-component assemblies

Improve durability of high-cycle contact surfaces



2. Engineering & Design

Create, update, and maintain detailed technical drawings:

Fixture layouts

Wiring configurations

Mechanical components

Conduct structured root cause analysis on design failures

Develop improved design solutions to increase product lifespan and reduce cost

Support new fixture designs based on customer test requirements

Address technical areas such as:

Kelvin contact systems

High-voltage and low-current measurement precision

Wear surfaces

Tolerance stacking in fixture plates

Repeatability across global suppliers

3D-printed mechanical + electrical hybrid components



3. 3D Printing & Rapid Prototyping

Manage and maintain in-house 3D printing for fixture components

Optimize print files and material selection for durability and accuracy

Support rapid prototyping of custom fixture parts

Drive improvements in fixture lead time, reliability, and cost efficiency



4. Supplier Coordination

Liaise with international suppliers (including China) on:

Technical specifications

Manufacturing tolerances

Quality standards

Review production samples and supplier drawings

Provide technical feedback and enforce compliance with Voltech engineering standards



Ideal Candidate Profile

Degree in Mechanical, Electrical, or Manufacturing Engineering

Experience in manufacturing, industrial production, or test equipment environments

Familiarity with electrical test systems, wiring, or test fixtures (highly preferred)

Strong CAD and technical drawing skills

Strong troubleshooting and structured problem-solving ability

Experience managing tolerance stack-ups and precision assemblies

Comfortable communicating with international suppliers

Able to work independently in a remote setup

Willing to travel when needed to support manufacturing

Capable of managing engineering projects with minimal supervision

Proactive communicator across time zones

title: Assistant Deal Manager
description:
Reports to: Deal Manager

Job Type: Full-time

Department: Deal Team

Positions Available: 2



We help Americans buy profitable businesses so they can build real wealth and escape the corporate 9-5 grind. We're a fast-growing, lean remote team that moves quickly, stays organized, and closes deals.

Our core values are Team-First Performance, Perfect Professionalism, and Mastery Through Feedback. We win as a team, communicate clearly and professionally, and constantly improve through honest, direct feedback.

As Assistant Deal Manager, you keep the entire deal pipeline moving. You manage communications, watch the CRM like a hawk, audit SLAs, chase follow-ups, and make sure brokers and sellers stay happy and engaged. You work hand-in-hand with the Deal Manager, Communications Team, and Seller Call Coordinators so nothing falls through the cracks. This isn't just admin—it's about building trust, enforcing discipline, and creating speed in a high-volume environment. If you love structure, hate dropped balls, and want real exposure to acquisitions, this role is for you.



About the Role

We're looking for a highly organized operator to support full deal coordination and communication. You'll oversee two teams, monitor the pipeline, enforce SLAs, audit execution, handle broker/seller relationships, and back up the Deal Manager so deals progress smoothly every day.



Results

CRM and trackers stay 100?curate and up-to-date

s and Slack to catch any coverage gaps

Requirements

2+ years in coordination, account management, project management, operations, or similar roles

Excellent written and verbal communication (clear, professional, proactive)

Ability to juggle multiple priorities, stakeholders, and channels without dropping anything

Comfortable working independently in a remote, high-accountability setup

Proactive mindset—you see issues early and fix them fast



Nice to Have

Any exposure to M&A, finance, acquisitions, or deal pipelines

Experience in high-volume or fast-moving environments

Comfort with Slack, Google Workspace, Notion, or CRM/deal tracking tools

Background supporting remote teams or fast-growth companies



Why Join Us

Room to grow quickly as we scale

Comfortable using AI tools like ChatGPT in daily tasks

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Tech-savvy and comfortable navigating new platforms

Proactive, reliable, and able to work independently without constant direction

Why Join Us

Tech Requirements

title: Marketing VA for Top Austin REALTOR® | Canva + Content + Strategy | 20–30 hrs/week
description:
A top Austin real estate brand is looking for its creative right hand.



Not a virtual assistant. Not a scheduler. A creative — someone who lives on social media, thinks in content, and knows how to make a brand feel like something worth following.



You'll build and execute the content strategy for a 23-year REALTOR® with a strong brand, a real audience, and serious 
ntum across Austin's Lake Travis corridor. Instagram,
, YouTube — you'll own the presence across all three.

If making things look great and feel right is genuinely what you do — this is your role.



What You'll Own:



Social Media & Content

Create and schedule content across Instagram,
, and YouTube. Write captions that sound human and on-brand. Design graphics and thumbnails that stop the scroll. Repurpose long-form content into short-form posts and Reels. Basic video editing a plus — not required.



Marketing Design

Build listing flyers, postcards, and marketing collateral in Canva. Transform property details into polished, on-brand visuals. Keep all marketing assets consistent, current, and beautiful.



 & Campaigns

Build and send
 campaigns in Mailchimp and real estate CRM. Manage list segments, test before sending, track performance.



Growth (Where This Goes)

This role grows into Meta ads management for the right person. We're building something — and you'll grow with it.



You Are:

A creative who's also reliable — the rare combination. You have a genuine feel for social media, not just familiarity with it. You write well in English. You're fluent in Canva. You're self-directed enough to execute without someone standing over you, and communicative enough to flag when you need direction.



Adobe skills? We'll notice. Video editing? Bonus. An actual personality that shows up in the work? Required.



20–30 hrs/week | Pay based on experience | Real growth potential

Partial U.S. Central Time overlap required. Daily end-of-day summary required.



TO APPLY



Incomplete applications are not reviewed.



Step 1 — The basics:

Your hourly rate (USD) | Hours available in U.S. Central Time | Hours per week sought | Your Canva and social media experience in 2–3 sentences



Step 2 — Show us your instincts (under 100 words, no AI):

A luxury Austin homeowner asks you: "What kind of content should I be posting right now to help sell my home?" What do you tell them?



Write it yourself. We read enough AI responses to spot them in seconds.



Bonus (optional, always noticed): Share a piece of content you've created — a post, a graphic, a Reel, anything. Show us what you make.

Post content and correctly place affiliate links

Focus on content that drives traffic and sales, not just views

To Apply (Required):

(Preferred) Write a hook + caption for a product video that would drive clicks

title: A-Player Sales & Marketing VA – Global Brand Expansion
description:
At Residentas, we don’t just fill seats; we build empires. We are an international hospitality powerhouse operating premium properties in Lisbon, Portugal, and the United States. We are currently building one of the most respected brands in the short-term rental industry, and we need an A-Player Sales & Marketing VA to serve as the right hand to our Sales & Growth Manager.



This is not a "short-term gig." This is a career-defining role for someone who is tech-savvy, analytically minded, and obsessed with growth. If you are tired of juggling five different clients and want a stable, long-term home where your work actually moves the needle, keep reading.



THE CHALLENGE (WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING):



+ Market Intelligence: Perform deep-dive research and competitor analysis to keep Residentas ahead of the curve.



+ Listing Optimization: Master the algorithms of OTAs (Airbnb, 
, etc.) to maximize global visibility.



+ Revenue Reporting: Create and maintain high-level spreadsheet reports that track our global performance.



+ Growth Support: Launch high-impact marketing campaigns and research innovative upsell opportunities (early check-in, late check-out, luxury packages).



+ Operational Excellence: Data entry, documentation, and ensuring our internal systems are 100?curate.



THE PROFILE (WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR):



- COMMUNICATION MASTERY: Your English (written and verbal) must be exceptional. We can train you on our systems, but we can't train "clarity."



-TECH-FLUENT: You are a pro with MS Office, project management tools, and you know how to leverage ChatGPT to work faster and smarter.



-RADICAL AUTONOMY: You don't wait to be told what to do. You anticipate needs and solve problems before they reach the Manager's desk.



-DETAIL OBSESSION: You are the person who catches the mistake that everyone else missed.



THE THREE NON-NEGOTIABLES:



+ Integrity: We value honesty over perfection. If you make a mistake, own it. We move fast, and trust is our currency.



+ Commitment: This is a full-time, long-term commitment. If you’re looking for a "side hustle," this is not for you.



+ The "Hunger" to Learn: We are growing fast. We want someone who is excited to learn new skills and step into projects they’ve never handled before.



WHY JOIN US?



+ Competitive Pay: Starting at 30,000 PHP per month, with clear pathways for raises based on your performance and commitment.



+ Remote Freedom: Work from anywhere with a reliable setup.



+ Direct Impact: You aren't just a VA; you are a vital part of our strategic projects and global growth.



+Elite Growth: Exposure to high-level decision-making in the international real estate and hospitality tech space.



HOW TO APPLY (The First Test):



I personally read every application. If you can't follow these instructions, you aren't the A-Player we are looking for:



Send me a direct message here on OnlineJobs.



In the subject line, you MUST include the code SM3 at the very end.



Once I receive your message with the correct subject, I will send you the link to our official application form.



I’m looking for the best. Is that you?



Henrique

Sales & Growth Manager | Residentas

title: Remote Recruiter/Talent Acquisition Specialist
description:
About MIRA Safety



MIRA Safety provides advanced protective equipment used by civilians, professionals, and government organizations worldwide. Our product line includes military-grade gas masks and protective gear designed to help individuals and organizations prepare for emergency situations.



As our team continues to grow, we are expanding our recruitment capabilities to support hiring across multiple departments and talent markets. We are seeking a proactive recruiter who can help identify strong candidates while contributing ideas to strengthen and improve our hiring processes.



Job Overview



We are looking for a Remote Recruiter/Talent Acquisition Specialist with experience supporting recruitment for U.S.-based companies or international clients.



This role will focus on sourcing, screening, and coordinating candidates for remote positions while ensuring a professional and efficient hiring experience for both candidates and hiring managers.



The ideal candidate is organized, resourceful, and comfortable managing multiple recruitment pipelines. In addition to executing recruitment activities, this role requires someone who can think strategically about sourcing approaches, candidate pipelines, and hiring processes, and communicate recommendations when adjustments may be needed.



This is a full-time remote contractor role aligned with U.S. Central Time (CST) business hours, Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM.



Key Responsibilities

• Manage the recruitment lifecycle from candidate sourcing through interview coordination

• Source qualified candidates using job boards, professional networks, and proactive outreach strategies

• Post and manage job listings across platforms such as LinkedIn, Indeed, OnlineJobs.ph, Upwork, JazzHR, and other recruitment channels

• Conduct initial screening interviews to assess candidate qualifications, communication skills, and role alignment

• Evaluate resumes and identify strong candidates for hiring manager review

• Coordinate interviews between candidates and hiring managers across multiple time zones

• Maintain organized candidate pipelines and accurate records within the ATS or recruitment tracking system

• Track recruitment activity including pipeline progress and candidate conversion stages

• Communicate professionally with candidates throughout the hiring process

• Support hiring managers by ensuring an efficient and well-coordinated interview process

• Identify opportunities to improve sourcing strategies, candidate pipelines, or recruitment workflows when necessary

 • Assist with hiring-related administrative tasks and onboarding coordination as needed



Required Qualifications

• 3–5 years of recruitment or talent acquisition experience

• Experience recruiting for U.S.-based companies or international clients

• Experience sourcing candidates for remote roles such as customer support, operations, sales, marketing, or technical positions

• Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)

• Experience using sourcing platforms such as LinkedIn, Indeed, OnlineJobs.ph, Upwork, or similar recruitment tools

• Familiarity with Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) such as JazzHR or similar recruitment platforms

• Strong organizational and time management skills

• Ability to manage multiple recruitment processes simultaneously

• High attention to detail when reviewing candidate profiles and resumes

• Comfortable working independently in a fully remote work environment



Preferred Skills

• Experience recruiting across both U.S. and international talent markets

• Background recruiting for customer support, operations, eCommerce, marketing, or technical roles

• Familiarity with recruitment metrics such as candidate pipeline tracking and time-to-hire

• Experience conducting structured interviews and candidate evaluations

• Familiarity with onboarding coordination and hiring documentation processes

• Experience collaborating with hiring managers using tools such as 
, Jira, or similar project management platforms

• Experience interviewing candidates for U.S.-based roles



Work Schedule

This role follows U.S. Central Time (CST) business hours, Monday through Friday. Candidates must maintain consistent availability during scheduled working hours.



Why Join Us

• Opportunity to contribute to and improve global recruitment processes

• Exposure to international hiring and remote workforce strategies

• Collaborative remote environment with opportunities for long-term growth

Compensation: $1,200 USD per month, based on the standard 2,080 working hours in a business year.



Application Instructions

To proceed with your application, please complete the form below:





Only applications submitted through the form will be reviewed.

title: Virtual Assistant – Customer Service & Admin (Pool Service & Repair) US  Arizona Hours
description:
About the Role

We are a U.S.-based pool service and repair company operating in Arizona, and we're looking for a reliable, professional, and energetic Virtual Assistant to be the voice and backbone of our day-to-day operations. You will be the first point of contact for our customers — handling inbound calls, capturing new leads, and keeping our business running smoothly behind the scenes.



This is a long-term role with a stable, growing company. We want someone who takes ownership, communicates clearly, and shows up every day ready to represent our brand with professionalism and care.



What You'll Be Doing

Answering inbound calls via our online calling system and representing our business in a friendly, professional manner

Logging all customer calls and interactions accurately in our CRM or job management system

Following up with new leads and helping convert inquiries into booked pool service or repair appointments

Scheduling service appointments and coordinating with our field technicians as needed

Responding to customer questions via phone,
, or messaging — things like service pricing, repair timelines, and recurring maintenance schedules

Supporting general admin tasks across the business — data entry, document management, reporting, and more

Being a proactive team player who flags issues and finds solutions



What We're Looking For

Excellent spoken and written English — clear, confident, and professional phone manner is a must

Prior experience in customer service, admin, or a VA role (home services, trades, or field service industries are a big plus)

Comfortable working U.S. business hours (MST, Monday–Friday) — this is non-negotiable

Reliable high-speed internet connection and a quiet, professional workspace

Experience with tools like GoHighLevel, Jobber, ServiceTitan, Google Workspace, or similar (preferred, not required — we will train the right person)

Self-starter attitude — able to manage tasks independently without constant supervision

Detail-oriented, organized, and dependable



Why Work With Us

Stable, full-time hours with a consistent schedule

Supportive team environment — you won't be left to figure things out alone

Long-term opportunity with room to grow as our company expands

Work from the comfort of your home

title: Accounting VA with Accrual-Basis Accounting Experience: Weekly Pay & Growth Opportunities
description:
Hi there!



We're searching for a highly motivated and detail-oriented Accounting VA with Accrual-Basis Accounting experience to join our remote team. 



This remote position offers an exciting opportunity for you to contribute to our client's success while enjoying the freedom and flexibility of a work-from-home lifestyle.



If you're passionate about helping others succeed and want to grow your career in a dynamic and supportive environment, then read on…





== WHY WORK WITH US ==



Make a Difference at Pro Sulum: An Award-Winning Company Where You Matter.



We're not just about accolades (like being on the Inc. 5000 list) - we're about empowering our team to create real impact. At Pro Sulum, your contributions matter, and your unique talents are valued. Join a company that fosters personal growth, celebrates individuality, and champions success for all.





-> Benefits:

 * Competitive salary (Php 30,000 to Php 40,000) depending on experience

 * Pay Increase Opportunity Every 6 Months

 * Weekly Pay

 * Paid Service Incentive Leaves

 * Monthly Incentives

 * Referral Incentives

 * Virtual Company Events

 * Dynamic, fun, and supportive team

 * Full-time role as an independent contractor (not BPO)

 * Long-term opportunity with career growth and advancement





== THE POSITION ==



As the Accounting VA for a fast-growing accounting firm, you’ll play a key role in supporting the company’s financial operations and ensuring accuracy across all accounting processes.



Your primary focus will include managing accounts payable and receivable, categorizing transactions in QuickBooks, performing bank and credit card reconciliations, and supporting month-end close activities. You’ll also assist with journal entries, account reconciliations, and maintaining clean, accurate financial records.



You’ll work closely with leadership and cross-functional teams to ensure timely reporting and smooth day-to-day operations. If you’re detail-oriented, reliable, and experienced in accrual-basis accounting with strong QuickBooks proficiency, this is your opportunity to grow within a dynamic and fast-paced organization.





-> Requirements:

• Solid accounting experience is a must, with a strong emphasis on accrual-basis accounting.

• Proficiency with QuickBooks or any similar accounting platform is required.

• Must have a high level of accuracy and attention to detail, and the ability to analyze data and exercise sound judgment.

• Available to work full-time (40 hrs/wk).

• Can work during standard US business hours.

• Fast, stable internet connection (Minimum download speed 10 Mbps)

• Working computer/laptop (Minimum Requirement: Processor - Intel i5 or equivalent, RAM - 8GB).

• Backup power source or work location for power outages.





-> Nice to Have:

• Experience working with the following tools is preferred: Outlook, MS Excel, Slack, ClickUp, Sage, NetSuite, 
, and Ramp.





-> Responsibilities:

Duties and Responsibilities include but are not limited to:

• Review and accurately categorize bank and credit card transactions in QuickBooks

• Manage accounts receivable, including invoice creation, payment application, and customer account reconciliation

• Process accounts payable such as vendor bill entry, purchase order matching, and vendor account maintenance

• Perform monthly bank and credit card reconciliations to ensure all transactions are properly recorded

• Prepare balance sheet and general account reconciliations

• Create and post recurring and adjusting journal entries, including accruals and allocations

• Assist in validating financial data and performing basic variance analysis

• Support month-end close activities, ensuring timely and accurate financial reporting





-> About You:

For this position, the successful candidate will have/be:

* High Attention to Detail: You are accurate, consistent, and thorough in your work. 

* Dependable & Trustworthy: You complete tasks on time and follow through on your commitments.

* Resourceful & Proactive: You tackle challenges head-on and solve problems independently.

* Great Communicator: You excel in both written and verbal English communication.





== HOW TO APPLY ==



Ready to join us? Apply now and unlock your future with Pro Sulum!



If you are interested in this position and believe you have the qualities listed above to be successful, please complete this Google Form and FOLLOW THE INSTRUCTIONS carefully.



APPLY HERE >>>



 - Due to the high volume of applications we receive, only candidates selected for further consideration will be contacted to move forward in the hiring process.

 - If you're a good fit for the role, you'll receive an
 from the Pro Sulum Recruitment Team within 1-2 weeks.



Congratulations on taking the first step towards a rewarding career with Pro Sulum! We're excited to learn more about you and explore the possibility of you joining our team.

title: Staff Accountant (Remote - Philippines)
description:
Title: Staff Accountant



Reports To: Controller



Location: Remote Anywhere in the PHILIPPINES ONLY



Hourly Range: $7.00 - $11.00 (Paid bi-weekly via Payoneer/Paypal)



**PERMANENT REMOTE (MUST HAVE OWN EQUIPMENT)**

**40 HOURS PER WEEK (Weekends Off)**

**PACIFIC STANDARD TIME (Night Shift)**

**MONITASK TIME TRACKER**



About Gala Capital Partners (GCP):

GCP is a leading private investment firm based in Southern California, specializing in the restaurant industry. We focus on investing in or acquiring growth-oriented restaurant brands, as well as SaaS software companies that support these operations.



Our portfolio includes several prominent franchisors such as MOOYAH, Dunn Brothers Coffee, Dillas Primo Quesadillas, and Rusty Taco, along with innovative SaaS solutions like Ecotrak, Targetable, Stream, and Lunchbox. As we anticipate significant growth and further expansion, we are building our internal team to strengthen our capabilities.



Position Summary:

We are seeking a highly detail-oriented, analytical, and proactive Staff Accountant to join our fast-growing finance team. This role plays a key part in the day to-day management of Accounts Payable (AP), Vendor Management, General Ledger (GL) coding, Accounts Receivable (AR), and Franchise/Tenant billing and collections, while also assisting in treasury operations, including intercompany transfers and settlement activities.



This position requires strong ownership, accuracy, urgency, and a continuous improvement mindset. The ideal candidate has a passion for numbers, thrives in a fast paced environment, and is naturally curious with a knack for problem-solving and streamlining operations.



Key Responsibilities:



Accounts Payable & Vendor Management

- Process vendor invoices, ensure accurate GL coding, and manage timely payments via Ramp.

- Maintain and update vendor records; onboard new vendors and validate documentation.

- Perform regular reconciliations and ensure compliance with internal controls.

Accounts Receivable & Billing

- Prepare and issue billings to franchisees and tenants; monitor and -manage collections.

- Work closely with operations to reconcile customer accounts and resolve discrepancies promptly.

- Provide regular updates and AR aging analysis to management.

Treasury & Intercompany

- Assist with daily cash management and positioning; support payment

processing and approvals.

- Monitor and manage intercompany activity, settlements, and bank transfers.

- Support treasury reporting, banking relationships, and reconciliation of balances across entities.

Reporting & General Ledger

- Perform accurate and timely GL coding and journal entries related to

transactional accounting.

- Assist in the preparation of month-end and year-end financial reports.

- Track and analyze spend trends and report exceptions or variances from budget/forecast.

Continuous Improvement & Support

- Identify and implement opportunities for process optimization and automation.

- Serve as a go-to resource for systems such as Microsoft Dynamics GP

Collaborate cross-functionally with finance, operations, and external partners.

Qualifications & Requirements:



CPA/CMA License required.

Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.

3-5 years of hands-on accounting experience in a transactional or general accounting role.

Strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial processes.

Experience with Microsoft Dynamics GP highly preferred.

Advanced Excel skills (pivot tables, lookups, modeling); experience with financial systems and dashboards a plus.

Demonstrated attention to detail, speed, and accuracy in a high-volume environment.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; ability to ask why and dig deeper.

Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

Proven ability to manage multiple priorities with urgency and efficiency.

Entrepreneurial mindset with a proactive and solutions-oriented approach.

Comfortable working in both collaborative and independent settings.

title: Accounting Manager (CPA)
description:
Company Overview:



Altametrics



Trusted by major players throughout the industry, we have been a leading provider of SaaS solutions to businesses since 1997. The company's philosophy is to combine software design with comprehensive consultancy and support services to deliver business-critical applications.



Our enterprise software solutions deliver ROI by helping businesses increase profitability, improve customer service and value, integrate with other business applications, and readily access information to make informed decisions.



We offer a comprehensive product line of enterprise software and professional services addressing the needs of various departments and executive management. Our applications are ideal for executives who require real-time access to enterprise data. The software solutions are web-based, designed for quick deployment, scalable for growth, reliable, and readily available.



Key Responsibilities:

Financial Reporting & Close: Owns the monthly, quarterly, and annual close process, delivering accurate financial statements (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow) in compliance with US GAAP.

Technical Accounting: Researches and resolves complex accounting issues, including revenue recognition, intercompany transactions, and multi-entity consolidation.

Team Leadership & Review: Supervises and mentors accounting staff, delegating work and reviewing reconciliations, AP/AR, and payroll to ensure quality and accuracy.

Internal Controls & Audit: Establishes, monitors, and improves internal controls, and acts as the primary contact for external US audits.

Strategic Planning: Develops budgets, forecasts, and cash flow projections, and analyzes variances to support executive decision-making.

Process Improvement: Optimizes the accounting technology stack (e.g., QuickBooks Online, Xero, 
) to drive efficiency and automation.

Compliance: Ensures compliance with US federal, state, and local tax requirements.



Requirements & Qualifications:

License: Certified Public Accountant (CPA), with strong knowledge of US GAAP preferred.

Experience: 5+ years of progressive accounting experience, with at least 2–3 years in a senior or controller-level role, preferably in a US-based company or BPO setting.

Technical Skills: High proficiency in QuickBooks Online or Xero, and advanced Microsoft Excel (modeling, lookups, pivot tables).

Communication: Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal) for presenting to US management.

Work Schedule: Willingness to work US business hours (night shift in the Philippines)

title: Senior Accounting Systems Quality Analyst (QA) (CPA/CMA)
description:
**CPA/CMA LICENSE REQUIRED**

**PERMANENT REMOTE (MUST HAVE OWN EQUIPMENT)**

**7-13 USD PER HOUR FIXED (Paid bi-weekly via Payoneer/Paypal)**

**40 HOURS PER WEEK (Weekends Off)**

**PACIFIC STANDARD TIME (Night Shift)**

**MONITASK TIME TRACKER**



About the Role

We are seeking an experienced accountant who wants to apply their skills in a dynamic, software-focused environment. Your primary responsibility will be to ensure that our PlumAccounting platform delivers accurate and reliable financial results. You will use your accounting expertise to review reports, reconcile data, and identify discrepancies while also learning and applying quality assurance (QA) processes such as system change review, bug documentation, and regression testing. This role offers the opportunity to stay rooted in accounting while gaining hands-on experience in software testing and product improvement.



Key Responsibilities

- Financial Data Validation & Reconciliation

- Review and validate accounting data and reports in both live and development environments.

- Verify journal entries, general ledger mappings, and account balances for accuracy.

- Reconcile imported data from integrated systems to ensure proper mapping and completeness.

- Prepare and reconcile P&L statements to confirm integration data matches source records.

- Evaluate accounting processes, system workflows, and reports to verify alignment with GAAP standards



Quality Assurance & Testing

- Participate in regression testing to ensure new features or updates do not introduce accounting errors.

- Test new accounting features for compliance with standard accounting principles.

- Document discrepancies with clear reproduction steps for the QA and development teams.

- Provide accounting-focused insights during system changes and software releases.



Process & Workflow Auditing

- Audit core accounting workflows such as AP/AR aging, bank reconciliations, and journal entries.

- Compare PlumAccounting functionality with competitor systems (e.g., QuickBooks, NetSuite, Xero) to identify opportunities for improvement.

- Maintain and update documentation for accounting processes and QA testing steps.

- Review and refine internal SOPs from both an accounting and QA perspective.



Collaboration & Communication

- Translate client accounting feedback into actionable tickets for developers.

- Participate in meetings with developers, QA, and implementation teams to ensure accounting accuracy is maintained.

- Act as a liaison between accounting operations and the software development team to bridge business context with technical execution.



Qualifications

- Bachelors degree in Accounting or Finance (CPA/CMA required).

- 3+ years of hands-on accounting experience, ideally with exposure to accounting systems.

- Strong understanding of GL, AP/AR, P&L, and journal entries.

- Proficient in Excel/Google Sheets for reconciliation and reporting.

- Strong attention to detail and analytical skills.

- No prior QA experience required. We will train you on QA tools, bug reporting, and testing methods.



Nice to Have

- Familiarity with accounting/ERP systems such as QuickBooks, NetSuite, or Xero.

- Experience in data reconciliation across systems.

- Exposure to QA or software testing processes.



What You'll Gain

- Apply your accounting expertise in a modern software development environment.

- Gain QA skills including test execution, regression testing, and defect tracking.

- Influence the development of an accounting platform used by multiple restaurants and franchises.

title: Technical Documentation Manager
description:
Job Summary

SynergizeX Inc. is seeking a high-caliber Technical Documentation Manager to lead the development and management of our project infrastructure. In this role, you won't just track records; you will be the primary authority responsible for the technical accuracy and visual blueprints of our security system deployments. We are looking for a proactive leader who can bridge the gap between complex engineering concepts and organized, actionable documentation for CCTV, access control, and integrated security systems.



Key Responsibilities

• Engineering & Design: Create comprehensive wiring schematics for access control systems, intrusion detection, intercoms,  

   and integrated security platforms.

• Technical Logic: Generate and manage essential project frameworks, including landing pages, programming worksheets, 

   and IP address tables.

• Quality Assurance: Review and certify project drawings and documents to ensure they meet SynergizeX standards and 

   client specifications.

• Lifecycle Management: Oversee the version control of all drawing updates and revisions, ensuring the field team always has 

   the most current data.

• Field Integration: Analyze daily reports from the field team for technical completeness and accuracy, identifying gaps before 

   they become issues.

• Issue Resolution: Manage the tracking and resolution of project deficiencies, driving follow-ups to ensure 100% project 

   compliance.

• Procurement Oversight: Maintain precise records of on-site materials and equipment to ensure inventory matches 

   technical requirements.

• Final Delivery: Lead the team in compiling and finalizing comprehensive project close-out documentation for client   

   handover.



What We’re Looking For

• Technical Expertise: Proven experience in creating schematics and technical layouts for security or low-voltage systems.

• Analytical Mindset: Ability to develop logic-based programming worksheets and complex IP tables with high precision.

• Leadership & Detail: Exceptional attention to detail with the ability to manage multiple high-stakes projects simultaneously.

• Communication: Strong ability to translate complex technical needs into clear documentation for both field technicians and 

   stakeholders.

• Tech Savvy: Proficiency in CAD software (or similar design tools) and cloud-based project management platforms.



If you are a detail-obsessed professional with a background in technical design and a desire to manage the documentation backbone of large-scale security projects, we want to hear from you. Apply today to help SynergizeX set the standard for technical excellence.

title: Data Analyst
description:
Data Analyst (Supporting San Diego Team)



Overview

We are looking for a detail-oriented and proactive Data Analyst to join our growing team. In this role, you will support reporting, analytics, and data infrastructure for warehouse and operations systems. You’ll play a key role in transforming complex data into clear, actionable insights that drive business decisions.





Key Responsibilities



Develop, maintain, and optimize customized reports and dashboards

Collaborate with internal and external stakeholders to gather reporting requirements

Ensure data accuracy and integrity across SQL databases, Excel, Power BI, and WMS platforms (e.g., VeraCore)

Design user-friendly dashboards and reporting tools for leadership and operations teams

Document workflows, processes, and reporting structures for scalability

Work closely with IT and cross-functional teams to support data needs

Translate complex data into clear insights for non-technical stakeholders

Continuously improve reporting systems and automation processes



Required Qualifications

At least 3 years of experience as a Data Analyst or in a similar role

Proficiency in:

SQL (queries, joins, aggregations, optimization)

Power BI (dashboards, DAX, data modeling)

Microsoft Excel (Power Query, pivot tables, advanced formulas)

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

High attention to detail and data accuracy

Excellent communication skills (written and verbal)

Ability to present data clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences



Preferred Skills



Experience in logistics, warehouse management systems (WMS), or supply chain

Familiarity with APIs and multi-system data integration

Basic knowledge of Python, VBA, or Power Automate

Understanding of data governance and data quality standards

Experience with ERP systems and reporting integration

Strong grasp of data visualization and storytelling best practices



Key Competencies



Analytical thinking and problem-solving

Attention to detail

Process documentation and organization

Continuous improvement mindset

Ability to manage multiple data sources



Communication & Collaboration



Strong stakeholder management skills

Ability to work cross-functionally

Skilled in simplifying technical concepts for business users

title: Senior Bookkeeper *Superstar Only*
description:
We are looking for two experienced bookkeepers to join our finance team and take ownership of expense categorization, transaction reconciliation, accounts payable, and invoice processing across multiple legal entities.



The bookkeepers will work closely with the CFO, ensuring that all financial transactions are accurately recorded, categorized, and reconciled on a regular basis. This role is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable managing financial data across multiple platforms — including Xero, Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and our custom CRM.



Key Responsibilities

- Categorize all expenses and transactions in Xero, ensuring accurate classification for reporting and compliance

- Reconcile transactions across multiple payment platforms, including Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRM tools

- Manage accounts payable, ensuring all invoices are properly reviewed, recorded, and scheduled for payment

- Assist with invoice processing, ensuring all vendor invoices are accurately documented and match purchase orders where applicable

- Work closely with the CFO to provide up-to-date financial records for monthly, quarterly, and annual reporting

- Ensure all financial data is accurate and properly organized to support compliance across multiple jurisdictions

- Flag discrepancies or unusual transactions for review by the CFO



What We’re Looking For

- At least 5 years of experience in bookkeeping and expense reconciliation

- Strong proficiency in Xero

- Experience working with Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRMs

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

- Experience handling multi-entity, multi-currency financial data preferred

- Comfortable working in a remote-first environment

- Fluent in English, both written and spoken



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of photo and video editing

- Stable high-speed internet connection

- Conducive work environment



Working Schedule

- Full-time opportunity

- Remote work setup (Philippines-based applicants only)



Benefits

- Competitive pay

- Training and growth opportunities

- Opportunity to work with a fast-growing content-driven company



Salary range

- Php 50, 000 to Php 70, 000 (based on experience)



Application Instructions

Since this is a long-term position, there will be an in-depth qualification process. If you believe you have what it takes, here is what to do next:



Please go to the link below, review the questions carefully, and share the required information.






If you believe you meet our qualifications and requirements, we encourage you to apply now and become a valuable part of our rapidly expanding company.

They attract potential customers by answering product questions and suggesting information about specific services. title: Insurance Agent (Income Protection / Life Insurance)
description:
Insurance Agent (Income Protection / Life Insurance)



We’re looking for a licensed insurance agent to handle inbound transfers from our sales team. Your role is to assess clients and recommend suitable income protection / life or disability coverage as part of a homeownership qualification program



Responsibilities:



Take warm transfers from sales reps

Assess client needs and eligibility

Recommend and close appropriate insurance coverage (income protection, life, disability)

Ensure compliance with Canadian insurance regulations

Work closely with sales team to maintain high conversion rates

title: Senior Bookkeeper *Superstar Only*
description:
We are looking for two experienced bookkeepers to join our finance team and take ownership of expense categorization, transaction reconciliation, accounts payable, and invoice processing across multiple legal entities.



The bookkeepers will work closely with the CFO, ensuring that all financial transactions are accurately recorded, categorized, and reconciled on a regular basis. This role is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable managing financial data across multiple platforms — including Xero, Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and our custom CRM.



Key Responsibilities

- Categorize all expenses and transactions in Xero, ensuring accurate classification for reporting and compliance

- Reconcile transactions across multiple payment platforms, including Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRM tools

- Manage accounts payable, ensuring all invoices are properly reviewed, recorded, and scheduled for payment

- Assist with invoice processing, ensuring all vendor invoices are accurately documented and match purchase orders where applicable

- Work closely with the CFO to provide up-to-date financial records for monthly, quarterly, and annual reporting

- Ensure all financial data is accurate and properly organized to support compliance across multiple jurisdictions

- Flag discrepancies or unusual transactions for review by the CFO



What We’re Looking For

- At least 5 years of experience in bookkeeping and expense reconciliation

- Strong proficiency in Xero

- Experience working with Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRMs

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

- Experience handling multi-entity, multi-currency financial data preferred

- Comfortable working in a remote-first environment

- Fluent in English, both written and spoken



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of photo and video editing

- Stable high-speed internet connection

- Conducive work environment



Working Schedule

- Full-time opportunity

- Remote work setup (Philippines-based applicants only)



Benefits

- Competitive pay

- Training and growth opportunities

- Opportunity to work with a fast-growing content-driven company



Salary range

- Php 40,000 - Php 65,000 (based on experience)



Application Instructions

Since this is a long-term position, there will be an in-depth qualification process. If you believe you have what it takes, here is what to do next:



Please go to the link below, review the questions carefully, and share the required information.






If you believe you meet our qualifications and requirements, we encourage you to apply now and become a valuable part of our rapidly expanding company.

title: Virtual Assistant - Content Creator (No Experience Needed)
description:
*TURN YOUR TIKTOK AND INSTAGRAM ADDICTION INTO A PAID REMOTE JOB*

This isn’t a dry “virtual assistant” job. This is for anyone who loves TikTok, understands trends, and wants to break into tech, content creation, or marketing... without a degree, resume, or experience.



If you:

- Know what makes a video go viral

- Spend way too much time on TikTok or IG Reels

- Enjoy editing videos, 
s, or scrolling for inspiration

- Want to work on real apps used by MILLIONS of people

…we’ll teach you everything else.



You’ll be creating clean, catchy, viral-style videos for our apps, the kind of content you already see on your For You Page.



Think of it like turning your scrolling habit into your paycheck $$$.





*START AS A VA. GROW INTO ANYTHING*

We’re a Gen Z–run app studio with 3 fast-growing apps.



If you show talent and consistency, this role can quickly turn into:

- VA Manager (Super VA), managing other VAs (very big pay bump!)

- Content Creator

- Creative Strategist



No diploma. No bootcamp. Just results.





*WHAT YOU'LL ACTUALLY DO*

- Create TikTok-style videos, slideshows, and 
s for our apps

- Use CapCut + Canva daily

- Follow our content formats and replicate them consistently

- Post 3 videos/slideshows per account/day (we assign number of accounts depending on performance)

- Submit work for review until you show a full understanding

- Use the premium versions of our apps (we give free access)



If you’re smart and fast with trends, you can easily make +30 videos/day using our building-block system.





*YOU'RE A FIT IF YOU*

- Are under 28 and heavy on TikTok/Instagram

- Pay attention to detail

- Can follow instructions exactly

- Are coachable and open to feedback

- Have strong English skills

- Have solid time management

- Enjoy editing/creating content

- Want a chill remote job with growth potential



*WHAT WE OFFER*

- Paid, remote work (part-time or full-time)

- Flexible hours

- A super fun, Gen Z team

- Fast promotions (we prefer to promote from within)

- Trial week paid at full rate

- Opportunity to get promoted quickly and manage other VAs within weeks if you prove yourself

- Real-world creative + marketing skills





*HOW THE HIRING WORKS*



Step 1) Apply

Send your message with your answers + drive link containing your test video.



Step 2) 1 - Week Paid Test

We check consistency, attention to detail, and output.



Step 3) Official Hire

If you pass the trial week, we onboard you fully!



Step 4) Promotion to VA Manager

IF you show total understanding, leadership, and high-quality output, you can be promoted quickly. (We’re hiring for this role too, but prefer to promote internally.)





*THE TEST (Mandatory, if you get selected, the Test video produced is going to be paid at the full rate)*

You must complete 1 video (only applications with the video done will be considered!!), both made in CapCut.

The TEST Google Drive here contains:

- App demo (must be used)

- Example videos for reference



TEST Google Drive link: 



TEST — Same Format, New Hook

Recreate the same structure, but change a few creative elements.



Rules:

- Use the app demo again

- Change the hook clip

- Change the text (same text style/format/font)

- Change the music (keep the same vibe)

- Keep the pacing, structure, and style the same



This shows whether you can adapt formats while staying consistent.





*HOW TO SUBMIT THE JOB APPLICATION*



Reply to this job post with:

- A Google Drive link (set to “Anyone with the link: Viewer” in the share settings of the folder) containing the video created.

- Your answers to these questions:

1) How many hours/day and hours/week can you work?

2) Do you have editing experience? If yes, tell us about it.

3) What’s your timezone?

4) What are your pay expectations (per hour and per video posted)?



Write “Philippines #1” at the end of your last question's answer so we know you actually read this :)

title: Senior IT Recruiter (U.S. Based Resources)
description:
IT Recruiter (U.S. Based Resources) 



We are a small New York City based IT Consulting and IT Professional Services company with approximately 70 consultants, providing IT Professional Services primarily to New York City government clients.

We hire IT professionals to work remotely and on-site across our projects and for our clients. The majority of our clients are based in NYC, but our candidates can work anywhere in the United States. We occasionally seek offshore resources, but the primary focus of this role is sourcing U.S.-based talent.

We are seeking an experienced IT Recruiter to join our team on an offshore basis. In this role, you will be responsible for identifying, attracting, and hiring top IT talent — specifically U.S.-based candidates who will be working in the United States. You will work closely with hiring managers to understand the technical requirements of various roles and source candidates accordingly.

The IT Recruiter will assist us in hiring both full-time employees (approximately 20% of the time) and contractors (approximately 80% of the time). Access to job boards will be provided

Job Responsibilities



1. Collaborate with hiring managers to define job requirements and create detailed job descriptions 

2. Source and screen U.S.-based candidates through various channels (job boards, LinkedIn, social media, referrals, etc.) 

3. Conduct interviews and assess candidates' technical skills, experience, and cultural fit 

4. Build and maintain a strong pipeline of qualified U.S.-based IT professionals 

5. Negotiate offers and close candidates 

6. Stay current with U.S. IT market trends, compensation benchmarks, and best practices in IT recruitment 

7. Provide regular updates to hiring managers on the status of open requisitions 

8. Participate in recruitment planning meetings and occasionally in virtual job fairs



Requirements



1. Minimum 5 years of proven experience as an IT Recruiter, specifically recruiting U.S.-based IT professionals for a U.S. company or U.S.-based clients — this is a hard requirement 

2. Direct experience sourcing candidates who live and work in the United States — candidates must be authorized to work in the U.S. (citizens, green card holders, or valid work visa holders) 

3. Strong understanding of U.S.-based IT roles, technologies, and the U.S. hiring landscape (including W2, C2C, and 1099 contract structures) 

4. Familiarity with U.S. work authorization types (U.S. Citizen, Green Card, H1B, OPT, EAD, TN, etc.) 

5. Experience recruiting for IT contractor and consulting roles, not just full-time placements 

6. Proficiency with U.S.-focused job boards such as Dice, LinkedIn, Indeed, ZipRecruiter, and similar platforms 

7. Familiarity with applicant tracking systems (ATS) 

8. Excellent written and verbal English communication skills — must be able to communicate clearly and professionally with U.S.-based hiring managers and candidates 

9. Ability to work independently with minimal supervision across time zones 

10. Highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive in follow-up 

11. Bachelor's degree in Human Resources, Business, or a related field preferred

To Be Considered, Applicants Must Address the Following in Their Application:

• How many years have you spent recruiting U.S.-based IT professionals?

• Have you recruited for a U.S.-based company or U.S.-based clients? If yes, please describe the types of roles and the company/client.

• What U.S. job boards and sourcing platforms do you regularly use?

• Are you familiar with U.S. work authorization types? Please list the ones you have experience working with.

• What percentage of your recruiting experience has been for IT contractors vs. full-time employees?

title: Graphic Designer
description:
We are looking for a creative and reliable video editor + graphic designer to support ongoing social media content for a modern, professional service-based brand.



This role includes editing short-form video content (Instagram Reels) as well as designing static posts and carousels in Canva.



This is a part-time role to start, with the opportunity to grow into a long-term/full-time position as the company expands.





What You’ll Be Working On:

- Short-form educational videos

- Personality-driven talking head clips

- Day-in-the-life content

- Clean, modern static graphics

- Quote-style and educational carousel posts



This is NOT overly trendy or chaotic TikTok editing.

We’re looking for a clean, modern, elevated style.





Responsibilities:



- Edit 10–30 second vertical videos (Instagram Reels)

- Add clean subtitles (easy to read, well-timed)

- Cut clips for strong pacing and flow

- Add light transitions, zooms, and music where appropriate

- Design static posts and carousels in Canva

- Follow brand direction while also contributing creative ideas

- Stay aware of relevant trends (but apply them thoughtfully)



Style Examples of Content:



- “Meet the Therapist” intro videos

- Day-in-the-life (DITL) clips

- Educational “hot take” content

- Quote-style graphics (clean, bold, modern)

- Carousel posts explaining concepts in a simple way



The overall goal is content that feels:



-  warm

- relatable

- modern

- professional





Requirements:



- Strong experience with CapCut (or similar video editing software)

- Strong experience with Canva

- Ability to create clean, modern designs

- Strong attention to detail

- Good English comprehension (for subtitles + captions)

- Ability to follow direction AND think creatively

- Reliable communication and turnaround time (24–48 hours)

title: Microsoft Solutions Developer
description:
Please
 your updated resume in pdf and portfolio  - 



Position: Microsoft Solutions Developer

Rate: $5/hour full time + perks & benefits



Job Description:

As a Microsoft Solutions Developer, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and implementing solutions using Microsoft's Power Platform suite, including Power Apps, Power Automate, Microsoft Forms, SharePoint, OneDrive, Power BI, and Dataverse. You will build custom applications, automate workflows, integrate systems, and develop data-driven reports to optimize business processes and enhance collaboration. This role requires expertise in Microsoft technologies, business intelligence tools, governance best practices, and solution architecture, ensuring seamless integration and compliance with security standards.



Roles and Responsibilities.

1. Power Platform Development & Automation Design, develop, and implement custom solutions using Power Platform tools such as Power Apps, Power Automate, and Microsoft Forms. Develop and customize Power Apps (Canvas, Model-Driven, and Power Pages) to enhance business workflows and user productivity. Design and implement automated workflows using Power Automate to automate repetitive tasks and business processes. Utilize Microsoft Forms for structured data collection and seamless integration within Power Platform solutions. Integrate Power Platform solutions with SharePoint, OneDrive, Dataverse, Microsoft 365, and third-party applications.



2. SharePoint, OneDrive & Power BI Development Develop and maintain SharePoint and OneDrive solutions by configuring sites, lists, libraries, workflows, and forms to meet business needs. Integrate SharePoint and OneDrive with CRM systems, ERP systems, and third-party applications for seamless data flow. Design, develop, and maintain Power BI dashboards and reports by connecting to SharePoint, OneDrive, Dataverse, and external data sources to provide business insights. Plan and execute data migration from legacy systems to SharePoint Online and OneDrive, ensuring data integrity and minimal disruption."



3. Administration, Security & Compliance Perform SharePoint and OneDrive administrative tasks, including user management, permissions, site collection management, and issue resolution. Implement governance policies and security measures for compliance with data protection and regulatory requirements. Ensure role-based access control (RBAC) and secure integrations for Power Platform and SharePoint solutions.



4. Solution Architecture & Documentation Collaborate with stakeholders to gather requirements, analyze business processes, and design scalable, sustainable solutions. Create and maintain technical documentation, including design specifications, configuration guides, and user manuals.



5. Training, Support & Continuous Improvement Provide training and support to end-users and administrators on best practices for Power Platform, SharePoint, and OneDrive. Stay updated on the latest Microsoft technologies, best practices, and compliance guidelines. Work closely with cross-functional teams (business analysts, project managers, developers) to ensure successful project delivery.



Qualification:

"Technical Skills & Expertise

? Power Platform Development: Knowledge of Power Apps (Canvas, Model-Driven, Power Pages). Understanding of Power Automate (flows, approvals, API integrations). Experience with Microsoft Forms for data collection and workflow automation. Ability to integrate Power Platform solutions with SharePoint, Dataverse, and third-party systems.

? SharePoint & OneDrive Development: Understanding of SharePoint Online & OneDrive configurations. Knowledge of SharePoint lists, libraries, permissions, and workflows. Experience with SharePoint custom solutions, forms, and automation. ? Data Analysis & Reporting: Understanding of Power BI dashboards and reports. Basic knowledge of data modeling, DAX, and Power Query. Ability to connect Power BI to SharePoint, OneDrive, Dataverse, and external databases.

? Integration & Automation: Knowledge of Microsoft 365 services, CRM, ERP, and third-party tool integrations with Power Platform. Understanding of REST APIs, JSON, Power Fx, and custom connectors.

? Software Development & Security Best Practices: Basic understanding of JavaScript, HTML, CSS, SQL, and Power Fx for Power Apps customization. Knowledge of Microsoft security, compliance, and governance best practices. Understanding of role-based access control (RBAC), permissions, and secure integrations." "Soft Skills & Business Acumen

? Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.

? Ability to communicate technical concepts to non-technical users.

? Excellent collaboration and teamwork skills with cross-functional teams.

? Self-motivated, continuous learner, and ability to adapt to new technologies."



Experience:

"Entry-Level (0-2 years) Experience with basic Power Platform development, such as Power Apps and Power Automate. Knowledge of SharePoint Online administration and workflows. Experience working on small-scale projects or academic coursework related to Power Platform. Microsoft certifications or hands-on training preferred." "Mid-Level (3-5 years) Proven experience in Power Apps, Power Automate, SharePoint, and Power BI development. Hands-on experience integrating Microsoft 365 services and third-party applications. Ability to develop custom solutions in SharePoint Online and OneDrive. Experience working with business users and stakeholders to design and implement solutions." "Senior-Level (5+ years) Expertise in solution architecture, enterprise-level Power Platform implementations, and complex integrations. Advanced experience in Power BI reporting, data modeling, and automation workflows. Ability to lead projects, mentor junior developers, and provide strategic recommendations. Experience implementing security, governance, and compliance best practices for Power Platform and SharePoint."

s based on web contact form submissions.

).

o Over time, collaborate with me as I develop a systems security plan to meet emerging CMMC requirements for federal contractors (this will come after higher-priority tasks are completed).

My current tech stack (familiarity is a plus, not essential):

You do not need experience with all of these, but it is a plus if you have worked with some of them or are comfortable learning them:

/collaboration)

 hosting) 

• 
 (CRM and work management)

Familiarity with any of these tools is helpful but not required; the core requirements are WordPress, DNS/Google Workspace, CRM experience, RSS management, and basic cloud management (e.g., Dropbox).

Requirements:

• Demonstrated experience with:

o WordPress site administration and migrating WordPress between hosting providers.

o DNS changes for websites and
 (A, CNAME, MX records; basic SPF/DKIM/DMARC understanding is a strong plus).

o Google Workspace Admin console (not just Gmail use) — user management, aliases, basic security settings, groups/distribution lists.

o Managing and organizing RSS feeds (e.g., in Feedly or similar tools).

• Tools and domains:

o Comfort working with CRM tools (any CRM is fine—experience just needs to show you understand basic CRM concepts).

o Experience managing cloud storage tools such as Dropbox or similar. 

o Willingness to work with my specific stack over time (Google Workspace, Porkbun, 
, Notion, Calendly, etc.). 

• Professionalism and trust:

o Ability to work with time-limited access and screensharing (I keep Super Admin and you guide me through changes).

o Reliable for a small but ongoing commitment of 4–6 hours per month.

o Willingness to sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) as part of the onboarding process.

• Language:

o English level C1 or C2 (top two tiers on OnlineJobs.ph) is required, to support clear written updates and documentation.

Potential to Grow:

If your service is exceptional and you have the capacity, there is potential to grow into a broader role providing basic IT support for Chasm Opportunities clients as well. This would be a new service offering to my small network of startup companies, where you could help them with light IT, WordPress, Google Workspace, Outlook
, domain management, and similar foundational IT needs.

Work Hours & Logistics:

• Approximately 2 hours per week, ongoing.

• Flexible schedule, but ability to overlap with US Central Time for at least some hours per month for live calls / screen-share sessions.

• Payment via mutually agreed method.

• This role is strictly limited to ~2 hours per week. Tasks will be broken into small, manageable pieces, and I’m comfortable taking longer to complete the overall roadmap.

How to Apply:

Please send a short message that includes:

1. A brief summary of your capability to migrate WordPress sites between hosts.

2. Your experience with Google Workspace Admin (what admin tasks you’ve handled and for what size/type of organization).

 authentication (MX, SPF, DKIM, DMARC).

5. Any experience with tools like Porkbun, 
, Notion, Calendly, Dropbox, or Slack (optional but helpful). 

6. Your typical availability window in Philippines time and your preferred overlap hours with US Central Time.
