title: Senior Account Manager for Carter Business Consultants
description:
Job Description for a Senior Account Manager 

Position: Sr. Account Manager

Company: Carter Business Consultants 

Location: Remote (Overseas – Full-Time)

Hours: Part-time to start and then quickly ramp up into 35-40 hours per week (expect to go fulltime)

Compensation: $15-$20/hour (based on experience) + performance-based bonus opportunities

Reports To: Founder / CFO (Christopher Carter)



Please Apply Here: 

About Carter Business Consultants

Carter Business Consultants serves independent auto repair shop owners ($1M–$5M revenue per location) by providing:

Accrual-based bookkeeping

Financial clarity

Industry-specific KPI reporting

CFO advisory support

Our mission is to give shop owners accurate, actionable financials so they can make confident decisions and build profitable, sustainable businesses.

Our long-term vision is to build a scalable, systems-driven firm where the Founder focuses on sales and CFO advisory, not day-to-day bookkeeping execution.

We operate on these values:

Accuracy above all — the numbers must tell the truth

Ownership — problems are solved, not passed upward

Continuous improvement — systems evolve and get stronger

Integrity & faith-led leadership

This role is foundational to operational excellence at CBC.

Role Overview

The Automotive Bookkeeper Account Manager is the operational owner of assigned client accounts.

This is a Senior Execution Seat, not an entry-level bookkeeping role.

You are responsible for:

Accurate month-end closes

Workflow compliance

Quality control

Client-level bookkeeping execution

Cleanup projects

Escalation discipline

Time efficiency

The Founder should not be fixing reconciliations, correcting basic errors, or rescuing files at the last minute.

If that is happening, this seat is not functioning properly.

Core Responsibilities

Client Account Ownership

Manage 8–15 automotive bookkeeping clients

Own full month-end close process

Ensure reconciliations are complete and accurate

Deliver files ready for Founder review

Maintain clean, accurate balance sheets

Proactively flag anomalies or concerns

You are accountable for file quality before it reaches the Founder.

Automotive-Specific Accounting

This niche requires strong reconciliation skills and comfort with manual processes.

You must become proficient in:

Working with third-party shop management systems

Reconciling summary journal entries into QuickBooks Online

Managing high-volume vendor payables (O’Reilly, AutoZone, Advance, etc.)

Reconciling clearing accounts

Customer deposit & AR reconciliation

Accrual-based bookkeeping standards

Manual journal entry accuracy

This role requires advanced problem-solving, not task-following.

Month-End Close Deadlines (Critical KPI)

Files must be ready for Founder review by the 10th business day of each month

Client financial delivery deadline is the 15th business day

Escalations must occur before Day 8

No last-minute emergency fixes due to avoidable delays

Failure to meet delivery timelines is a performance issue.

Workflow & Double Compliance (Non-Negotiable)

Double is CBC’s system of record.

You are required to:

Complete and check off every task in Double

Mark tasks complete or cancelled — no silent omissions

Avoid parallel spreadsheets outside approved workflows

Use Double as the single source of truth

Failure to use Double correctly prevents operational visibility and is considered a performance issue.

Escalation Protocol (Required Behavior)

You must follow the documented escalation framework:

Follow defined timelines for client follow-up

Use approved
/templates for missing documents

Document escalation steps inside Double

Escalate only after required steps are completed

Founder is the last point of escalation

Do not escalate basic bookkeeping questions.

“Ask Three Before Me” Standard

Before escalating a question, you must:

Check the SOP

Check Double documentation

Propose a solution

Do not bring problems without suggested next steps.

This is a professional expectation at CBC.

Quality Control

Review your work before submission

Zero unreconciled accounts

Zero uncleared transactions

Follow structured close checklist

Deliver clean files, not 85% files

Accuracy is the baseline expectation.

Cleanup & Catch-Up Projects

Execute year-end cleanup projects within estimated budgets

Target: ~30 hours per year cleanup unless complexity requires otherwise

Protect company margin

Document recurring errors for prevention

Cleanups must not balloon due to inefficiency.

Time Tracking & Efficiency

All time must be tracked daily in Clockify (or approved system)

Time is reviewed weekly

Efficiency per client is measured

Excessive hours without explanation will be addressed

Maintain profitability per client

This is a business, not a hobby.

Limited Client Communication

Respond to bookkeeping-related client inquiries

Request documentation

Follow escalation framework

Escalate strategic decisions to Founder

Clients should feel supported — not chaotic.

Performance Standards

This role operates under a structured 90-day performance framework.

The following are considered performance issues:

Missed deadlines

Failure to follow workflow

Repeated basic errors

Not using Double properly

Excessive escalations

Lack of ownership

May result in:

Formal Performance Improvement Plan

Reduced client load

Termination

Expectations are clear and documented.

KPIs

30 Days:

Understand automotive workflow

Manage 3–5 accounts independently

Demonstrate Double compliance

60 Days:

Manage 8+ accounts

Deliver files by Day 10 consistently

Maintain clean reconciliations

Demonstrate independent problem-solving

90 Days:

Founder no longer performing QC

Month-end runs smoothly

Escalations significantly reduced

Clients consistently delivered on time

Required Qualifications

4+ years professional bookkeeping experience

Advanced QuickBooks Online proficiency

Strong accrual accounting knowledge

Experience reconciling high-volume payables

Experience working with U.S. clients

Excellent written English

Preferred:

Automotive accounting experience

CPA or accounting credential

Experience in niche bookkeeping firm

Required Traits

We are specifically hiring for:

Ownership mentality

High accountability

Strong reconciliation confidence

Problem-solving initiative

Comfort with complexity

Process discipline

Calm under pressure

We are not hiring someone who:

Avoids difficult reconciliations

Requires constant direction

Escalates simple issues

Resists systems

Cultural Fit

Comfortable working in a faith-led company

Values operational clarity

Communicates professionally

Growth-oriented

Future Growth

This role may grow into:

Senior Account Lead

Oversight of junior bookkeepers

Expanded operational authority

CBC is building a scalable structure — not replacing chaos with chaos.

What Success Looks Like

Founder focuses on sales and CFO advisory

Month-end stress decreases

Financials are delivered predictably

Clients feel confident

Systems run cleanly

Please Apply Here:

title: TCB: Junior Bookkeeper
description:
Position Title: Junior Bookkeeper

Company: Time Capital Bookkeeping

Reporting To: Thomas Chavez

Location: Remote

Hours: Full-time 40 hours per week.

Compensation: Offer starting at  $10/hr depending on experience and ability, with growth potential. Performance review after initial 90 days.

Start Date: March 1st

Application Window: Open until filled.

Please Apply here with this Google Form: 



About Us

Time Capital Bookkeeping provides decision-ready financials for real estate investors so they can move fast, stay focused, and grow profits. We are a client-obsessed, systems-driven firm that values simplicity, clear communication, critical thinking, and ownership.

Founded by Max Emory, a U.S. Marine Corps veteran and real estate investor, Time Capital was built to solve the exact problems he experienced firsthand—unclear numbers, wasted time, and overly complex financials. Today, we support real estate investors with accurate, reliable books they can confidently act on.



We live by our values:



Client-Obsessed

The client experience is the north star for decision-making. We prioritize accuracy, clarity, and responsiveness so clients can confidently act on their financials.



Simplicity

Complexity doesn’t scale. We aim for clear, repeatable systems that reduce friction for both clients and the internal team.



Speed & Communication

Issues are identified and addressed quickly through clear, proactive communication. Silence and delays create problems; clarity prevents them.



Extreme Ownership

We take responsibility for outcomes, even when it’s uncomfortable. Problems are owned, not passed.



Thinker, Not a Box Checker

We value problem-solvers who think critically and use judgment, not people who simply complete tasks without understanding the “why.”



Humility

A willingness to learn, ask questions, accept feedback, and seek understanding over ego.



Key Responsibilities 

Managing day-to-day bookkeeping for real estate investors and franchise/service-based businesses.

Reconciling bank and credit card accounts.

Handling accounts payable/receivable recordings and payroll entries

Building and maintaining a clean chart of accounts.

Producing accurate monthly financial reports (delivered by the 15th/20th).

Collaborating with the manager and team through Slack and Double (Keeper).

Ensuring compliance with deadlines and bookkeeping best practices.

Participating in cleanups, catch-up work, and diagnostics when needed.

Handling Intercompany Loans, Due To/Due From, etc

Managing multiple entities within each QBO account



Client Communication

Maintain consistent, professional communication with clients through Double (Keeper)

Track and follow up on required client documentation and access

Clearly communicate status updates, issues, and next steps internally



Process & Documentation

Follow established bookkeeping workflows

Document issues, edge cases, and process improvements

Support ongoing refinement of bookkeeping SOPs



Ideal Candidate Profile

The ideal candidate:

Has foundational bookkeeping knowledge or training

Has experience with real estate investing bookkeeping

Is comfortable working through historical financial data

Can follow detailed processes while thinking critically when exceptions arise

Communicates clearly and professionally

Is organized, detail-oriented, and accountable for outcomes

Is open to feedback and continuous learning



Preferred Qualifications: 

Basic working knowledge of real estate investing or real estate bookkeeping

1–3 years of bookkeeping experience preferred; candidates with less experience will be considered if they demonstrate strong critical thinking, accuracy, and ownership

Bookkeeper Launch certification or equivalent training preferred (may substitute for experience)

Fluent in English with clear written and verbal communication skills

Detail-oriented with a strong focus on accuracy and follow-through

Generally available Monday–Friday during normal business hours with strong EST overlap

Able to work 100% remotely with a reliable laptop/computer, high-speed internet, smartphone, and a quiet workspace



Required Qualifications

QBO Pro Advisor

Google Workspace (Drive, Gmail, etc).

Preferred: Keeper (now called Double)

Slack 

         

Full-Time Benefits: 

Work from home

Flexible Paid Time Off

Free continued education

Eligible for bonuses

Annual Home Office Stipend  



Our Policy on AI Tools 

We recognize that AI and translation tools are widely used by virtual assistants and remote professionals. We believe in being clear about what is acceptable and what is not for this role and interview process:



? Allowed & Encouraged

Drafting, brainstorming, or improving written communication 
s, SOPs, checklists, documentation).

Checking grammar, spelling, or tone for clarity.

Speeding up repetitive tasks or improving efficiency.

Using captions or transcription tools to follow meetings.



?? Limited / Not a Fit

Relying on translation tools for all real-time communication in English. This role requires strong listening comprehension and verbal English without constant translation.

Submitting AI-generated work without editing or adding your own input.

Hiding the use of AI when asked about your process.



???? What to Expect in Hiring

Written and verbal responses will be analyzed for AI-only content.

Interviews will assess live comprehension (your ability to follow spoken English in real time).

Supportive tools are fine—but we need to know you can communicate clearly and independently when required.



How to Apply

Please apply using the following Google Form: 



Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis until the role is filled.

title: M&A Associate

3) Partner
 Management - Organize and label
s, flag important messages for follow-up, and ensure no key correspondence is missed.

mbers

What We Offer:

title: Ecommerce Listing Specialist (Vendoo / Shopify / eBay / Whatnot)
description:
LeveLux



If you are detail-obsessed, fast, and take pride in getting things right the first time… this role is for you.



This is not a guessing job.

This is a precision + speed role.



Every listing you create impacts:

    •    Customer trust

    •    Sales performance

    •    Brand reputation



?



What You’ll Be Doing



1. Product Research (Non-Negotiable Skill)



Before creating any listing, you must be 100?rtain the item is correct.



?



Google Lens Research

    •    Use clear photos of the item

    •    Find an exact match (not similar)

    •    Match:

    •    Shape

    •    Pattern

    •    Hardware

    •    Structure



?



Multi-Source Verification (CRITICAL RULE)

You must check 3–5 different listings minimum



Sources:

    •    Google

    •    eBay (active + sold)

    •    Trusted resale/retail websites



?? Many listings online are wrong due to poor VA work

You are responsible for verifying accuracy



?



Final Verification Before Posting

    •    Model name is correct

    •    Size is correct (PM / MM / GM / BB)

    •    Material is correct

    •    Structure matches exactly



If you are not 100% sure ? do not post



?



2. Listing Creation (Vendoo)

    •    Create accurate listings inside Vendoo

    •    Ensure:

    •    Clean titles

    •    Correct brand

    •    Correct category

    •    Accurate condition



?



3. Cross-Posting



Push listings from Vendoo to:

    •    Shopify

    •    eBay



Then:

    •    Double check all fields

    •    Ensure nothing transferred incorrectly



?



4. Shopify Optimization

    •    Clean, optimized titles

    •    Accurate descriptions

    •    Correct pricing (no guessing)

    •    Proper tags and product types

    •    Professional presentation



?



5. eBay Optimization

    •    SEO-friendly titles

    •    Fill ALL item specifics

    •    Accurate condition

    •    Turn OFF offers unless instructed



?



6. Whatnot Listings

    •    Create and edit listings for live shows

    •    Add:

    •    Correct titles

    •    Accurate condition

    •    Clear product details



?? If editing during a show:

    •    Edit inside the show (not inventory) when needed

    •    Ensure listings are clean and ready for live selling



?



Quality Standards (Non-Negotiable)

    •    No guessing

    •    No incorrect brands or models

    •    No missing details

    •    Photos must match the item exactly

    •    Condition must be clearly stated



Accuracy comes first.

Then speed.



?



Speed & Performance Expectations



This is a high-performance role

    •    You must be able to work efficiently without sacrificing accuracy

    •    Consistent daily output is required



?



Typing Speed Requirement



Please include your Words Per Minute (WPM) when applying.



?



You Are a Good Fit If You:

    •    Are extremely detail-oriented

    •    Can move fast without making mistakes

    •    Have strong research skills

    •    Can follow instructions exactly

    •    Take pride in clean, accurate work



Experience with Vendoo, Shopify, eBay, or Whatnot is preferred (but not required)



?



To Apply

    1.    Create 3 sample listings

    2.    Include:

    •    Title

    •    Brand

    •    Price

    •    Platform (Vendoo ? Shopify / eBay / Whatnot)

    3.    Send a Google Sheets link (viewable access)



Also include:

    •    Your Words Per Minute (WPM)

    •    Any experience with listing platforms



?



Final Note



If you guess, you will be wrong.

If you verify, you will succeed.



We are looking for people who care about getting it right.

title: Outbound Phone Appointment Setter  (Fluent English & Audio Intro Required)
description:
We are an established, long-time medical device sales organization expanding our growing medical product offering. We are looking for a highly motivated, professional Appointment Setter to connect with medical practices across the United States.



CRITICAL REQUIREMENT: Fluent, Conversational English

Because you will be speaking directly with doctors and busy medical staff, fluent, natural, and conversational English is the absolute most important requirement for this role. You must have a clear, confident phone presence and the ability to build rapport quickly.



(Note: You must submit an audio recording to apply. Details are at the bottom of this post.)



In this remote role, your primary objective will be calling medical offices, navigating gatekeepers (front desk staff and Office Managers), and scheduling 20-minute introductory Zoo
etings for our sales team. You will be provided with a targeted lead list, proven scripts, and ongoing support to help you succeed.



Responsibilities:



Make outbound cold calls to medical practices to generate interest in our software platform.



Professionally navigate gatekeepers and identify the correct decision-makers (Office Managers or Doctors).



Schedule qualified 20-minute introductory meetings on our calendar.



Send follow-up and reminder
s to ensure the prospect attends the meeting.



Accurately record all call activities, notes, and outcomes in Zoho CRM in real-time.



Requirements:



Communication (Top Priority): Excellent, clear, and highly conversational English with a friendly, professional, and confident phone presence.



Availability: Must be able to work 25 hours per week during standard daytime business hours in the US Pacific Time Zone (PT).  With success, this role will advance to a full-time, 40 hours per week.



Experience: Proven B2B cold calling and appointment-setting experience. Experience calling into US medical or dental offices is a massive plus.



Tech-Savvy: Comfortable using Zoho CRM to log all activities and manage your pipeline.



Mindset: Resilience to handle rejection, politely bypass gatekeepers, and keep a positive attitude.



Compensation:

This role offers a reliable base rate with highly motivating performance incentives. High earning potential for proven closers who can consistently put decision-makers on the calendar.



Base: $5.00 / hour (25 hours/week)



Appointment Bonus: $20.00 for every qualified appointment that successfully attends the Zoo
eting.



Deal Closed Bonus: $100.00 bonus for every sale that closes from an appointment you set.



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY):

Because conversational English is vital to this role, you will not be considered without an audio recording. Please submit a voice recording (at least 1 minute long) introducing yourself, detailing your cold calling experience, and explaining why you are the exact right person for this job.



Applications without a 1-minute audio recording will be automatically deleted.

title: Full Time Project Manager - Creative Video Agency
description:
We’re hiring a Full-Time Remote Project Manager / Operations Manager to help keep client projects moving smoothly from kickoff to delivery at Kasey Bruce Media.



This is not just an admin role.



We’re looking for someone who can own the moving parts of production, communicate professionally with clients and editors, keep timelines on track, review deliverables before they reach Kasey, and help the business run in a more organized, reliable way.



This person should bring calm, clarity, and follow-through to the team.



What This Role Is Really About:

Your main job is to make sure projects get fulfilled well and on time.



That means:

• Managing project progress from active production through delivery

• Communicating with clients through
 and Slack

• Following up with editors and making sure deadlines are hit

• Reviewing videos before they get to Kasey so he spends less time on avoidable revisions

• Keeping project details, statuses, and communication organized across our systems

• Helping create a smoother operational flow inside the business



You’ll play a big role in helping Kasey stay focused on creative direction, sales, and higher-level work instead of chasing updates and fixing avoidable issues.



Core Responsibilities

1.) Project Fulfillment:

Own the day-to-day movement of active client projects

Track deadlines, deliverables, revisions, and next steps

Make sure projects do not stall due to missed follow-ups or unclear communication

Help ensure final assets are delivered accurately and on time

Update project statuses in Notion and other internal systems

2.) Client Communication:

Communicate with clients clearly and professionally via
 and Slack

Follow up on outstanding items such as feedback, missing assets, approvals, scheduling, and payments

Keep clients informed on timelines, progress, and next steps

Help create a smooth and polished client experience throughout the project

3.) Editor & Team Coordination:

Communicate with KBM editors to make sure projects stay on pace

Check in on progress, clarify due dates, and help remove blockers

Ensure editors understand client notes and internal expectations

Keep internal communication organized so nothing slips through the cracks

4.) Video Review & Feedback:

Review videos before Kasey sees them

Catch obvious issues like typos, pacing problems, missed notes, weak selects, export mistakes, or brand inconsistencies

Leave thoughtful, organized feedback that helps editors improve the cut before final review

Save Kasey time by reducing unnecessary back-and-forth

5.) Operational Support:

Help improve workflows and team organization

Keep tools like Notion, 
, Dropbox, and Slack clean and up to date

Support better systems for project tracking, communication, and delivery

Identify gaps or recurring issues and help solve them proactively





Projects may include:

• Brand story videos

• Customer testimonials

• Event recap videos

• Nonprofit storytelling pieces

• Social cutdowns and short-form edits

• Ongoing client content projects



What “Great” Looks Like:

• Projects are moving forward without Kasey needing to constantly check in

• Clients feel taken care of and know what’s happening

• Editors have clear deadlines and clear feedback

• Deliverables are reviewed before reaching Kasey

• Internal systems stay organized and current

• Communication is proactive, professional, and easy to follow

• Problems get solved before they become bigger problems



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

• Full-time availability (30-40 hrs/week)

• At least 4–8 hours of overlap with Pacific Time

• Excellent written English with strong grammar

• Reliable laptop and strong internet connection

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

• Ability to manage multiple moving projects at once

• Ability to work independently and follow through without constant supervision

• Comfortable giving clear feedback on creative work

• Prior experience in project management, operations, client communication, or production coordination



Strong Bonus If You Have Experience With:

• Video production or post-production workflows

• Reviewing edits and giving feedback to video editors

• Notion

• Slack

• 

• Dropbox / file delivery systems

• Creative agencies, production companies, or content teams



Who This Role Is Best For



This role is a great fit for someone who:

• Loves organization and keeping things moving

• Is proactive and does not wait to be told every next step

• Can communicate professionally with both clients and creatives

• Has good taste and can spot issues before they become problems

• Enjoys building better systems and bringing order to messy workflows

• Wants to be a key part of a growing creative business



About Kasey Bruce Media

Kasey Bruce Media is a video production company focused on helping brands tell stronger stories through premium, strategy-driven content. We create work such as brand videos, testimonials, event content, and short-form videos designed to help clients build trust, connection, and results.



Application Instructions:

To apply, follow these instructions exactly:



To Apply for the Job: 

1. Change the subject line to “I Want to Work for You [Insert the name of the CEO of X here, hint: it's not me haha] - video editor” 

2. What is the name of my production company I founded?) 

3. (Label this answer 1.) At the top of your message write 2-3 sentences on why you would like this position, and why you are a good fit. Do not write more than that or else your application will be deleted. 

4. (Label this answer 2.) Below that tell me what your favorite video is from my website + why? 

5. (Label this answer 3.) Include 1x Link to your portfolio/Instagram/social media.) 

6. (Label this answer 4.) Answer number 2 at the end (production company question).





Please follow the instructions carefully. Attention to detail matters a lot in this role.

If I d
 to move forward, there will be a short Zoom interview and video will be required.



Good luck,

title: Part-Time Real Estate Virtual Assistant (Property Management + Data Operations)
description:
We are a U.S.-based real estate investing company looking for a disciplined, reliable, and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to join our team.



This is a long-term position for someone who wants consistent work and is willing to grow with a serious company.



This is NOT an easy job. You will be expected to stay organized, communicate clearly, and handle responsibility without constant supervision.



This role combines property management, data management, and first-to-market research. You will be assisting with tenant communication, listing management, and also helping us source and organize distress property data directly from counties.



You will be trained on our systems and processes.



Responsibilities:



Post rental listings on
 Marketplace and 

Respond to tenant inquiries quickly and professionally

Pre-screen tenants based on provided criteria

Coordinate with tenants, contractors, and tea
mbers

Follow up with leads and keep communication organized

Update and maintain CRM (Podio or similar)

Organize and manage property and lead data



Data & Research Tasks:



Communicate with county offices to request property data (foreclosures, tax delinquencies, etc.)

Assist in building and maintaining distress property lists

Organize and clean data using our systems

Work inside our Data Platform (training will be provided)

Assist with identifying new data sources and first-to-market opportunities



Schedule:



Part-time (approximately 20 hours per week)

Must be available during U.S. Eastern Time business hours



Compensation & Performance Bonuses:



Hourly Pay:

$3.75 per hour based on experience



Tenant Placement Bonus:



You will receive a bonus for each successful tenant placement.



A successful placement means:



Tenant is approved

Lease is signed

First month’s rent and deposit are collected

Tenant moves into the property



Bonus:



$50 paid after tenant moves in

$50 paid after tenant stays for 30 days



Total: $100 per successful placement



Data Performance Bonus:



You will receive bonuses for helping us find property lists that we can contact.



A “data list” means a clean list of properties with owner information that we can use for marketing (example: tax delinquent or foreclosure lists).



Bonus:



$20 for each clean and usable data list you provide

$50 if we close a deal from a list you helped find

Requirements:



Strong English communication (written and spoken)

Comfortable communicating with tenants, contractors, and county offices

Reliable internet and quiet work environment

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Able to follow instructions exactly

Experience with
 Marketplace

Zillow experience is a plus

CRM experience (Podio is a plus)

Ability to learn new systems quickly

Comfortable with research and problem-solving



This role is NOT for you if:



You miss details or do not follow instructions

You need constant supervision

You are working multiple jobs and cannot focus

You are not comfortable communicating with people

title: GoHighLevel Expert
description:
About Us

Higher View Tax Services is not your average financial company. We’re a fast-growing, forward-thinking team that prioritizes excellence, connection, and creativity in everything we do. As we scale toward national goals, we’re looking for someone who can amplify our presence across key social media platforms and bring our brand voice to life with precision, strategy, and style.



Job Overview

We are seeking an expert-level GoHighLevel (GHL) Builder & Automation Specialist to help design, build, and optimize a robust, scalable CRM system inside GoHighLevel. You must be able to use the marketers tool.



This role is not for beginners, funnel-only builders, or snapshot-only users. We are building a structured, long-term CRM environment and require someone with a deep understanding of GoHighLevel’s advanced features, automation logic, and CRM architecture.



In this role, you will work closely with the Product Owner and CRM Architect to translate system requirements into clean, reliable, and scalable builds within GoHighLevel. Candidates must have hands-on experience using GoHighLevel’s marketer tools to customize and configure the platform.



Key Responsibilities



GoHighLevel CRM Development



Build, customize, and manage CRM systems within GoHighLevel.



Create and maintain pipelines, opportunity stages, custom fields, tags, and structured contact data.



Configure user roles, permissions, and access levels as needed.



Maintain clean organization, naming conventions, and consistency across the system.



Automation & Workflow Development

5. Build advanced workflows using triggers, conditions, and actions.

6. Implement tag-based and pipeline-based automation logic.

7. Configure time delays, branching paths, safeguards, and fail-safes.

8. Prevent automation conflicts, loops, duplicate actions, and system errors.

9. Optimize workflows for performance, reliability, and scalability.



Integrations & System Setup

10. Configure and manage integrations including calendars, forms, Stripe, and related system components.

11. Build and manage integrations using Zapier and/or webhooks when applicable.

12. Troubleshoot and resolve automation and integration issues efficiently.



Testing, Quality Control & Documentation

13. Test workflows end-to-end prior to launch.

14. Identify edge cases, logic gaps, and system risks.

15. Resolve issues thoroughly and promptly.

16. Document workflows, automations, and system logic clearly so future tea
mbers can easily understand and maintain the system.





Required Skills & Experience



Must-Have Qualifications:



Minimum of 3+ years of hands-on experience using GoHighLevel at an advanced level.



Strong understanding of workflows, automation logic, triggers, conditions, and actions.



Proven experience working with pipelines, tags, custom fields, and CRM data structures.



Demonstrated experience building full CRM systems, not just funnels or landing pages.



Strong troubleshooting skills with the ability to identify and fix broken or conflicting automations.



High attention to detail with strong system-thinking and problem-solving abilities.





Nice-to-Have (Not Required):



Agency-level GoHighLevel experience.



Zapier or webhook integration experience.



Experience integrating GoHighLevel with WordPress or other external platforms.



Experience working in financial services, tax, or other highly structured industries.





This Role Is Not a Fit For:



Beginners or individuals still learning GoHighLevel.



Funnel-only or snapshot-only builders.



VAs who require step-by-step instructions for every task.



Candidates without real-world automation and CRM build experience.



Work Details



Remote position.

Must have working overlap with U.S. Eastern Time.

This is a long-term opportunity for the right candidate.

Paid hourly (rate based on experience).

title: Notion Production Assistant
description:
Notion Production 
 on Tap | Remote (EU overlap required)





Ads on Tap is looking for a Notion Production Assistant — someone obsessed with working within bulletproof systems who knows that great creative starts with great operations.We're a performance-creative agency that delivers data-driven ad creatives for e-commerce brands, helping scale brands. 



Our production system lives in Notion — and we need someone to help make it world-class.



What You'll Do:

- Build, maintain, and improve Notion databases, views, templates, and workflows

- Design filters, relations, rollups, and formulas to surface the right info at the right time

- Run daily pipeline health checks — no stuck tasks, no missing deadlines, no blocked work without a blocker

- Monitor Slack channels for approvals, feedback, and blockers — sync updates to Notion

- Flag discrepancies between Slack and Notion, and keep the source of truth accurate

- Help build dashboards that give the team instant clarity on workload, deadlines, and bottlenecks

- Maintain clean, up-to-date documentation for every process



About You



Must-haves:



- Notion power user — databases, relations, rollups, formulas, views, filters, templates.

- Passion for building and optimizing systems

- Insane attention to detail

- Clear written communication in English

- Self-motivated, proactive, and comfortable working autonomously

- Available to overlap with EU working hours (CET)



Nice-to-haves:



- Experience with Notion automations or API integrations

- Familiarity with creative agency or ad production workflows

- Background in project management or operations



P.S.: Include the word "Pipeline" somewhere in your application.



Benefits



- Work directly with the Head of Production to shape how a growing agency operates

- Fully remote · Competitive compensation

- Real ownership over the systems you build

- Learn from experts in e-commerce and performance marketing

title: Support Specialist
description:
PLEASE READ CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING:



APPLICANTS WITH HANDS-ON EXPERIENCE SUPPORTING SCHEDULING SOFTWARE OR SAAS PLATFORMS WILL BE PRIORITIZED





HOW TO APPLY:

• Subject line of your application - “SCHEDULE.” 

• Cover letter - Write a brief cover letter introducing yourself and your relevant experience.

• Resume/CV - Make sure to include a link to your Resume/CV.



NOTE: APPLICATIONS THAT DO NOT INCLUDE A RESUME/CV LINK WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED.





About the Role

We are seeking a Support Specialist who will serve as the first point of contact for customers using our platform. The role involves assisting users with navigation, troubleshooting issues, and providing timely support. You will also collaborate with the CSM Team during implementations and help improve the customer experience by identifying recurring issues and sharing insights with the Product and Engineering teams.



Responsibilities

• Handle incoming support tickets related to our platform and provide clear, accurate, and timely responses

• Assist users with app navigation, functionality questions, login or access concerns, and basic troubleshooting

• Work closely with CS Managers to triage and resolve implementation-related support requests

• Escalate more complex issues to the appropriate internal teams when necessary

• Track and organize support requests to help identify patterns, common issues, and areas for improvement

• Help maintain and improve our help center resources and internal documentation

• Test new product features and updates to ensure they work smoothly before reaching customers

• Contribute wherever needed to help the team deliver a great experience for our partners



Requirements

• Excellent English communication skills — strong written, verbal, and reading ability is REQUIRED

• Proven experience in customer support, technical support, or a similar role is REQUIRED

• Experience supporting scheduling software or SaaS platforms is PREFERRED



Who You Are

• A strong communicator – you write clearly, professionally, and with empathy

• A proactive problem-solver – you enjoy figuring things out and documenting solutions

• Analytical and detail-oriented – you naturally look for patterns and insights that can improve processes

• Organized and reliable – you can manage multiple tasks while keeping everything well documented

• Collaborative – you work well with people across different teams and roles



Work Setup

• Fully remote position

• Full-time 

• 8 hours per day, 5 days per week

title: Senior Bookkeeper *Superstar Only*
description:
We are looking for two experienced bookkeepers to join our finance team and take ownership of expense categorization, transaction reconciliation, accounts payable, and invoice processing across multiple legal entities.



The bookkeepers will work closely with the CFO, ensuring that all financial transactions are accurately recorded, categorized, and reconciled on a regular basis. This role is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable managing financial data across multiple platforms — including Xero, Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and our custom CRM.



Key Responsibilities

- Categorize all expenses and transactions in Xero, ensuring accurate classification for reporting and compliance

- Reconcile transactions across multiple payment platforms, including Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRM tools

- Manage accounts payable, ensuring all invoices are properly reviewed, recorded, and scheduled for payment

- Assist with invoice processing, ensuring all vendor invoices are accurately documented and match purchase orders where applicable

- Work closely with the CFO to provide up-to-date financial records for monthly, quarterly, and annual reporting

- Ensure all financial data is accurate and properly organized to support compliance across multiple jurisdictions

- Flag discrepancies or unusual transactions for review by the CFO



What We’re Looking For

- At least 5 years of experience in bookkeeping and expense reconciliation

- Strong proficiency in Xero

- Experience working with Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRMs

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

- Experience handling multi-entity, multi-currency financial data preferred

- Comfortable working in a remote-first environment

- Fluent in English, both written and spoken



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of photo and video editing

- Stable high-speed internet connection

- Conducive work environment



Working Schedule

- Full-time opportunity

- Remote work setup (Philippines-based applicants only)



Benefits

- Competitive pay

- Training and growth opportunities

- Opportunity to work with a fast-growing content-driven company



Salary range

- Php 40,000 - Php 65,000 (based on experience)



Application Instructions

Since this is a long-term position, there will be an in-depth qualification process. If you believe you have what it takes, here is what to do next:



Please go to the link below, review the questions carefully, and share the required information.






If you believe you meet our qualifications and requirements, we encourage you to apply now and become a valuable part of our rapidly expanding company.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Souder Coaching Academy is a high-performance personal development organization led by Jase Souder. With 20+ years of experience, Jase helps coaches, speakers, and entrepreneurs break through internal barriers and become the person their mission requires them to be. We operate at the intersection of personal transformation and business growth through live events, mastermind programs, group coaching, and online courses. Our programs include Black Belt Speaker Training, Black Belt Unlimited, Dynamic Life, Dynamic Delivery, Mic and the Mission, Core Compelling Content, Breakthrough Days, and more. We run a full calendar of live events, group coaching calls, and new offer launches throughout the year — and we move fast. We are hiring a full-time Executive Assistant who will serve as the operational backbone of the business. This is not a task-ticker role. You will be a true partner to Jase — managing communications, keeping programs running, supporting live events and launches, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks. You will be onboarded with a documented SOP library and operational playbook from day one. You are not walking into chaos — you are walking into a structured, fast-moving environment that needs a great operator to run it.



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING



• Managing Jase's calendar end-to-end — scheduling, confirmations, reminders, and Zoom setup

• Monitoring and responding in client Slack channels for all active programs

• Handling
 inbox management — triaging, drafting responses, and flagging urgent items

• Sending client onboarding communications including welcome
s, agreements, and Slack welcome messages

• Uploading AI call recordings and notifying client Slack channels when new recordings are available

• Building back-end assets in Go High Level (GHL) for new offers — opt-in pages, checkout pages, confirmation
s, and reminder sequences

• Sending invoices through GHL and following up on outstanding client payments

• Coordinating logistics for live events including venue, travel, registrations, and attendee communications

• Maintaining organized credentials across all platforms in LastPass

• Converting Jase's voice memos and off-the-cuff messages into clean, ready-to-send
s and action plans

• Researching speaking opportunities and conducting outreach on Jase's behalf (future responsibility as the role grows)

• Managing personal scheduling, travel arrangements, and miscellaneous tasks as needed





WHO YOU ARE



• Highly organized — you build systems that keep everything from falling apart

• Tech-comfortable — you pick up new platforms quickly and do not need hand-holding

• A clear, warm, and professional communicator in written English

• Calm under pressure — live events and launch weeks do not rattle you

• Self-directed — you solve problems without waiting to be asked

• Comfortable using AI tools to work more efficiently

• Discreet and trustworthy with sensitive client and business information

• Genuinely invested in the mission and the people this work serves

• Someone who sees the bigger picture — you are not just checking boxes, you care about the outcome





MINIMUM REQUIREMENTS



• 2 or more years of experience in an EA, VA, operations, admin, or client-facing role

• Near-native written and spoken English proficiency

• Available full-time (40 hours per week) during US Eastern Time business hours

• Experience with Go High Level, Slack, and Google Workspace preferred

• Proven ability to work independently and reliably in a remote environment





COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS



• $1,000 to $1,500 per month based on experience

• Fully remote — work from anywhere

• Paid time off and holidays

• Performance-based reviews and growth potential

• Exposure to high-level coaching, live events, and personal development content

• A growing business with real opportunity to grow alongside it





THIS ROLE IS A GREAT FIT IF



• You have supported a high-volume entrepreneur or executive before and know what it means to protect someone's time and focus

• You have experience inside a coaching or online education business

• You thrive when the day changes on you and you can pivot without losing 
ntum

• You want to be part of something mission-driven, not just fill a seat



THIS ROLE IS NOT A GOOD FIT IF



• You need constant direction and detailed step-by-step instructions to get started

• You are not comfortable being the person who figures things out

• You treat this as a part-time commitment while juggling multiple clients





HOW TO APPLY



We review every application personally. To show us you have read this post in full and can follow instructions, send a message containing only the number 111. Do not send a cover letter or resume at this stage. Just 111. If your background looks like a strong fit, we will follow up with a few questions before moving to the next step.

title: Part-Time Real Estate Cold Caller (25 Hours per Week)
description:
Kainos Ventures LLC – Real Estate Investment & Acquisitions Company



About Kainos Ventures LLC

Kainos Ventures LLC is a U.S.-based real estate investment company specializing in wholesaling, fix-and-flip projects, and creative financing strategies such as subject-to and seller financing deals. We focus on helping homeowners across the U.S. find fast and fair solutions while building a portfolio of investment properties. Our mission is to create win-win opportunities and empower our tea
mbers to grow professionally in the real estate industry.



Job Title:

Part-Time Real Estate Cold Caller (25 Hours per Week)



Company Overview:

Kainos Ventures LLC is expanding its acquisitions team and looking for a motivated, reliable, and professional Cold Caller to generate qualified seller leads through outbound calls. The ideal candidate will have excellent English communication skills, a strong work ethic, and a passion for real estate.



Position Type:

Part-Time (25 hours per week)

Remote / Work-from-Home

Flexible Schedule: Choose from one of two shifts:

10:00 AM – 3:00 PM EST

3:00 PM – 8:00 PM EST



Job Summary:

The Cold Caller will contact property owners across the U.S., engage in meaningful conversations, collect essential property information, and schedule follow-up appointments for our acquisitions team. This position requires persistence, excellent communication skills, and the ability to handle rejection professionally.



Key Responsibilities:

- Make 300+ outbound calls per day using the company’s dialing system.



- Follow provided scripts and objection-handling guides to qualify leads.



- Gather property details such as motivation, condition, timeline, and asking price.



- Enter accurate notes and lead data into the CRM (REISimpli or similar).



- Schedule appointments for acquisitions managers.



- Track and report daily/weekly progress including leads generated.



- Participate in tea
etings and training sessions for performance growth.





Required Qualifications:

- At least 1 year of cold calling, telemarketing, or inside sales experience (real estate preferred).



- Excellent spoken English with a clear or neutral accent.



- Comfortable using scripts, CRMs, and dialer software.



- Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace with headset.



- Self-motivated, goal-driven, and able to work independently.



- High school diploma or equivalent required (some college preferred).





Preferred Skills:

- Experience in real estate acquisitions or wholesaling.



- Familiarity with tools such as ReadyMode, REISimpli, Google Sheets, and Slack.



- Understanding of real estate terms (ARV, equity, repairs, motivated seller leads, etc.).



- Excellent rapport-building and follow-up skills.



- Positive attitude and resilience under rejection.





Compensation:

- Hourly Rate: $4.00 – $7.00 USD/hour



- Performance Bonuses: Based on qualified leads and closed contracts.



- Training Provided with opportunities for advancement.





Performance Metrics:

- Total calls made per shift



- Talk time and connection rate



- Qualified leads generated



- Appointment setting rate



- CRM accuracy and completeness





What You’ll Gain:

- Comprehensive training in U.S. real estate cold calling and acquisitions.



- Performance-based bonuses and growth potential into lead manager or acquisitions roles.



- Work-from-home flexibility with a professional and supportive team.



- A chance to build long-term skills in communication, negotiation, and real estate investing.





Please send your Resume and a link to your LinkedIn profile to 
 Line:



“Cold Caller Application – [Your Name]”





Kainos Ventures LLC

Real Estate Investment & Acquisitions Company

Based in Georgia, USA | Remote Position

title: Growth Operator (E-commerce / TikTok Shop)
description:
## About Us



We are a strategy-led e-commerce growth partner helping brands expand into the U.S. market through TikTok Shop, Shopify, and performance-driven systems.



We are not a traditional agency.



We operate with:



- high ownership

- high standards

- low chaos

- minimal unnecessary communication



---



## This is NOT a task-based role



This is an **ownership role**.



You will be responsible for ensuring that execution moves forward without constant supervision across creators, operations, and client communication.



If you prefer clear step-by-step instructions for everything, this role is not for you.



---



## What You’ll Own



- Oversee TikTok Shop creator seeding & campaign execution

- Ensure creators are contacted, onboarded, and posting consistently

- Manage freelancers / VAs and assign tasks when needed

- Own client communication (updates,
s, basic calls)

- Identify problems and fix them without waiting for instructions

- Improve workflows and SOPs over time



---



## What Success Looks Like



- Creators are consistently producing content

- Campaigns are moving without bottlenecks

- Clients feel confident and informed

- Systems are becoming more efficient over time



---



## What We’re Looking For



- You take ownership even when things are unclear

- You can make decisions without constant approval

- You’ve managed projects, clients, or operations before

- You communicate clearly and calmly

- You care about outcomes, not just completing tasks

- You have strong written and spoken English communication skills

- You are a self-starter who can solve problems and make decisions independently



---



## Experience & Background



- Experience in e-commerce or social media platforms such as TikTok Shop, Shopify, or Meta Ads is strongly preferred

- If you don’t have direct experience, you must be able to learn quickly and apply new information without being guided step-by-step

- You have worked in environments where you had to figure things out independently (startup, agency, freelance, or similar)



> **We value learning speed and ownership more than years of experience.**



---



## What This Role Includes



This is an early-stage role.



You will:



- handle both execution and oversight

- occasionally do hands-on tasks (setup, coordination, etc.)

- work in an environment where not everything is perfectly structured yet



This will evolve into a more strategic/management role as the company grows.



---



## What This Role is NOT



- Not a virtual assistant role

- Not a “tell me exactly what to do” role

- Not a purely strategy role



---



## Perks



- Fully remote

- High ownership, low micromanagement

- Direct exposure to strategy and decision-making

- Opportunity to grow into a leadership role

- Performance-based earning upside



---



## You SHOULD NOT apply if:



- You need constant direction to do your work

- You prefer repetitive, clearly defined tasks only

- You get uncomfortable making decisions independently

- You want a low-responsibility role



---



## How to Apply



Please complete the application form via Typeform.







As part of the application, you will be asked to:



- Answer a few short questions

- Upload your resume showing your background

- Submit a short 60 seconds video

title: Real Estate Lead Generation
description:

High Quality Training & Support | Supportive Culture | Real Career Growth

Atlas Residential offers high-quality training, a proven system that generates results, and a culture built on teamwork, mentorship, and development.

If you want stability, strong income, and the chance to become a top performer—this is the opportunity.



Why You’ll Love This Role

Competitive pay

Supportive culture with a hands-on, growth-focused manager

title: HR Operations Lead
description:
***Please read carefully before submitting your application***



THE ROLE



We are looking for a hands-on HR Operations Lead to bring structure, consistency, and process discipline to a growing business. Our company is scaling, but many HR and operational processes are still ad hoc and dependent on individual managers. This role is about building clear, repeatable systems that improve execution across the business.



This is a practical, build-and-improve role - not purely strategic and not purely administrative. You will own recruitment operations, onboarding/offboarding, SOPs and training materials, KPI reporting, and day-to-day people operations improvement, working closely with leadership, managers, and external HR support. 



We are particularly interested in candidates who actively use AI tools to improve their work and are excited about building more efficient, automated ways of working.



Work Schedule/Location: 5 days per week, fully remote work.



WHAT YOU WILL OWN



- Build and improve core HR and people processes (onboarding, offboarding, documentation, workflows)

- Own end-to-end recruitment operations, including pipeline management and candidate experience

- Own and improve our ATS (ClearCompany), including structure, workflows, reporting, and use of automation/AI

- Use AI tools and automation to improve efficiency across recruitment and HR workflows, reducing manual work and increasing speed

- Continuously identify opportunities to remove low-value tasks through better systems, tooling, and automation

- Build and maintain SOPs and training materials in Notion (knowledge base), covering both HR and cross-functional operational processes

- Work with the Senior Operations Manager and department leads to capture, standardise, and improve processes across the business

- Ensure SOPs are clear, practical, and consistently used by managers and teams

- Track and report on key HR and recruitment metrics (e.g. hiring pipeline, onboarding, training completion)

- Ensure employee records are accurate, secure, and audit-ready in ADP (system of record)

- Maintain strong compliance discipline, working with our external HR partner where needed

- Identify gaps, prioritise improvements, and implement practical solutions that save time and reduce errors



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE 



In the first 3–6 months, success in this role would look like:



- Structured, consistent onboarding process

- Clear and well-managed recruitment pipeline

- Improved ATS usage and visibility

- SOPs and training materials live and in use

- Clear HR metrics and reporting

- Reduced reliance on ad hoc communication

- Stronger process consistency and compliance



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



- Experience in HR operations, people operations, or a similar role in a growing business

- Strong experience in recruitment, onboarding, and process improvement

- Proven ability to build and implement processes (not just support them)

- Experience using and improving an ATS

- Strong interest in using AI tools (e.g. ChatGPT, Claude, automation tools) to improve productivity and reduce manual work

- Curious, proactive mindset toward learning and experimenting with new tools and ways of working

- Strong organisation, attention to detail, and follow-through

- Comfortable working in an unstructured, scaling environment

- Strong communication and stakeholder management skills

- Practical understanding of UK HR processes and compliance

- Experience with systems such as ADP, Notion, or similar tools



ESPECIALLY STRONG CANDIDATES WILL BE ABLE TO SHOW EXAMPLES OF:



- Building onboarding or HR processes from scratch including candidate screening

- Creating SOPs or training systems

- Improving hiring speed, structure, or quality

- Introducing KPI tracking or reporting

- Improving ATS workflows or automation

- Bringing structure to previously inconsistent environments

- Actively using AI tools to improve workflows or save time



If you are what we are looking for, please send us your application with your cover letter, updated resume, and replies to the below questions.



1. Describe a process you personally built or significantly improved. What was broken, what did you change, and what was the measurable result?



2. What changes would you typically make to improve a recruitment pipeline that is slow or inconsistent?



3. What tools or systems have you used for HR and recruitment, and how did you improve how they were used?



4. Tell us about a time you worked in an environment without clear processes. What did you do?



5. How are you currently using AI tools (e.g. ChatGPT or similar) in your day-to-day work? Please give 2–3 specific examples.



6. What are your salary expectations (monthly or annual), and are you comfortable with a range of $
per month depending on experience?



Thanks for reading!



*Only shortlisted applicants will be notified.

title: Operations & Research Assistant
description:

Job Title: Operations & Research Assistant

Location: Remote

About the Role



We are a U.S.-based real estate investment company, but this role is focused on operations, research, and task support. You do not need real estate experience to succeed here.



We’re looking for a proactive, detail-oriented professional who can manage
, conduct web research, process assigned tasks, and support leadership with projects and decision-making. This is a role for someone resourceful and motivated — not a simple “calendar/email VA.” You’ll be given responsibility and trusted to deliver results with minimal supervision.



What You’ll Do



? Manage
 communication daily through Outlook (respond clearly and keep inbox organized)

Why Work With Us



? Long-term, stable position with consistent hours

title: Social Media Executive
description:
About the role



The Kabbalah Centre London is seeking a creative, proactive, and highly organised Social Media Executive to lead and grow our presence across Instagram and other key platforms.

This role goes beyond posting - you will be responsible for building engaging, consistent, and growth-driven social media channels across multiple accounts, including The Kabbalah Centre London, as well as key teachers pages.

You’ll play a key role in translating our teachings, classes, and offers into compelling content that resonates with both existing students and new audiences - helping drive awareness, engagement, and lead generation.

This role is ideal for someone who loves content creation, understands what performs on social media, and wants to use their skills for meaningful, purpose-driven work.



Key Responsibilities



1) Social Media Strategy & Growth

- Own and execute social media strategy across multiple Instagram accounts

- Plan and manage content calendars aligned with:

- Courses, classes, and events

- Key marketing campaigns

- Lead magnets and offers

- Identify opportunities for growth, engagement, and audience expansion.

- Stay on top of trends, formats, and platform changes to continuously improve performance.



2) Content Creation & Publishing

- Create and publish engaging content across formats, including: reels (core focus), stories, static posts and carousels

- Write compelling captions and hooks aligned with brand voice and campaign goals.

- Work with existing class content, recordings, and teachings to extract short-form content.

- Coordinate content production with teachers and the wider marketing team.



3) Community Management & Engagement

Manage day-to-day engagement across accounts:

- Respond to DMs and comments

- Encourage conversations and interaction

Support lead generation through:

- Story engagement tools (polls, Q&As, links)

- ManyChat automations (where applicable)

Ensure a consistent, warm, and aligned tone of voice across all interactions.



4) Performance & Optimisation

- Track performance across key metrics (reach, engagement, saves, shares, leads).

- Identify top-performing content and double down on what works.

- Test different formats, hooks, and content angles to improve results.

- Share insights and recommendations in regular marketing/growth meetings.



5) Collaboration & Campaign Support

Work closely with the Digital Marketing Executive to align:

- Social content with campaigns and launches

- Messaging and offers across channels

- Support promotion of key initiatives through organic and boosted content.

- Coordinate with the Campaign Manager to ensure alignment with weekly priorities and calendar.



What We’re Looking For



Essential Skills & Experience

- 2+ years experience managing social media accounts (Instagram-focused).

- Strong understanding of what performs on social media (especially Reels and Stories).

- Confident in short-form video creation and editing.

- Strong copywriting skills for captions, hooks, and CTAs.

- Organised and able to manage multiple accounts and content streams.

- Proactive, creative, and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment.

- Interest in spirituality, personal development, or purpose-driven work.

- Experience growing personal brands or multi-account setups.



Nice to Have

- Familiarity with ManyChat or social automation tools.

- Basic Canva or design skills.

- Experience boosting posts or working with paid social campaigns.

- Experience in education, coaching, or community-led businesses.



Why Work With Us

- Be part of a meaningful mission supporting real transformation and growth.

- Work closely with teachers and help bring powerful teachings to life through content.

- Own and grow multiple social channels with real impact.

- Be part of a collaborative, values-led team with strong vision and 
ntum.

- Access classes and tools to support your own personal development.

title: Account Manager
description:
Benefits:

Work From Home

Guaranteed $500 USD per week

Additional available if you perform well

Unlimited potential through residual because you earn as long as your customers say with Fleetsmarts





What we do as a company:

We give a fuel card away for free to truckers in the US that have discounts on diesel fuel. We have add-on products that make the sale more attractive to the customer. Customers can get weekly credit lines for their fuel card if they use our factoring service, which is akin to a pay-day loan service for businesses, but we provide this service for free. We also have a service to help reduce the down payment on their insurance. We market to new trucking companies that are just starting out and all our products are designed to help them get going faster than they would be able to on their own.





What you do:

You call warm appointments for truckers who have already expressed interest

You explain how we can help them

95% of people say yes

The key is following up until they actually start using our services





We set up 4 interviews per day in between the hours of 4:00 and 6:00pm

We will choose one new Cat 3 Re-Engager per week.

After one week, if they don’t hit 60% patch rate, they are out.

For 5 weeks, if they hit high patch rate, we rotate them between Hannah and Cat 1s

We promote one each week to Cat 3 leads and replace our worst AM.





Key Responsibilities:

Proactively follow up on abandoned or inactive leads assigned to account managers.

Present and promote fuel card programs, factoring services, and insurance solutions to potential clients.

Assist customers with the activation of fuel cards and ensure a preferred payment method is added.

Offer factoring services and guide customers through the contract signing process to ensure completion and compliance



Qualifications:

Proven experience in sales, customer retention, or outbound calling (required)

Strong communication and negotiation skills

Confident handling high-volume outbound calls

Goal-oriented, persistent, and able to work independently

Organized and comfortable using CRM tools and office software

Positive attitude and ability to build rapport quickly

title: Full-Stack Developer – E-Commerce Platform
description:
ABOUT US



We are a US-based commerce company, the American arm of an established European e-commerce and trading group operating across 29 countries with 650,000+ products across multiple brands in construction, home improvement, sustainability, and premium bath & kitchen.



We are building a modular, AI-powered e-commerce platform and we need a developer who can build it with us.

Our motto: "Do it with Passion or don't do it at all."



THIS IS NOT A TYPICAL DEV ROLE

We don't need someone who waits for tickets. We need a builder who reads a spec and ships a prototype. You work directly with the CEO and his Operations Manager – a tight three-person core team. Fast decisions, no bureaucracy.

WHAT YOU'LL WORK ON



Data Connectors

Product Information Management (PIM)

Pricing Engine

Multi-Channel Feed Management

EDI Middleware (EDIFACT D96A – ORDERS, ORDRSP, DESADV, INVOIC)

Controlling & Finance Dashboards

Workflow Automation & Internal Tooling



TECH STACK



React, TypeScript, Python

Supabase (PostgreSQL)

n8n, Docker, Kong

Ollama, Claude API

Hetzner, GitHub Actions



MUST HAVE



3+ years full-stack (React + Python or TypeScript)

Strong PostgreSQL

REST API design and integration

Docker + Linux server admin

Can set up a full environment from scratch

Excellent English (daily standups with CEO and Ops Manager)



NICE TO HAVE



Supabase, n8n, Polars

E-commerce / marketplace experience

AI/ML integration



YOUR GROWTH PATH

Month 1–3: Infrastructure, first modules live.

Month 3–6: Core platform operational.

Month 6–12: Platform expands. You build your team.

Year 2+: CTO conversation. You built it, you lead it.

WHAT WE OFFER



Competitive salary (full-time, permanent)

Performance bonus

3-person core team – CEO, Ops Manager, and you

No legacy code – build from scratch

Flexible hours (4h CET overlap)

Modern stack, no bloat

Path: Developer #1 ? CTO

Hardware budget



NON-NEGOTIABLE



Excellent English (C1/C2)

3+ years full-stack experience

4+ hours daily CET overlap

Reliable internet, professional home office

Based in Philippines or Vietnam



HOW TO APPLY



CV (PDF)

Short intro: Why this role? What have you built? (3–5 sentences)

GitHub or portfolio links

Salary expectation (monthly, USD)

Earliest start date



BONUS CHALLENGE (Optional)

Parse this EDIFACT message into JSON and include it with your application:

UNH+1+ORDERS:D:96A:UN:EAN008'BGM+220+PO
