title: LONG TERM General VA With Strong Writing And Social Media Skills
description:
Please read carefully to understand what this job is about and how to apply.



Hi there! I’m Ariana and I run a few UK-based online crafts websites, including YouTube channels, social media accounts on Instagram &
, and online shops. Here are 3 of them as reference:

- 

- 

- 



I am seeking a long-term part-time (4 hours) General VA with strong social media and writing skills to help me and my Senior VA. Knowledge on how to use AI for writing is a strong plus.



No prior crafts/crochet knowledge is required, but you must know good English (written and spoken) and be available for Microsoft Teams screen-sharing calls every week to discuss tasks with my Senior VA.



I know crafts and crochet are more of a women's thing, but men are more than welcome to apply. I just need someone reliable, honest, willing to learn, and who has a good understanding on how social media and Wordpress blogging works. The job does not require you to know how to craft.



While I can teach you the technical skills on using AI for writing blogs and social media, and we provide you with prompts to guide you, having creative writing skills is something you MUST bring to the table. You should already understand what makes a great caption or blog intro.



We use AI to help us write our blog posts and social media, and we will give you the prompts and teach you how to use them. We’ll provide on-the-job training and guide you through every task.



I am looking for someone who can work with us for a long time. This is an established business, and we need permanent assistants to work with us.



We work in a relaxed, friendly environment, and work hours are flexible. You can work daytime or nighttime, weekends or weekdays. We work on a weekly task basis schedule, so you know exactly what needs to be done and what the deadline is.



Contact multiple times a week with my Senior VA through Microsoft Teams’ chat or screen-share is a MUST to keep on top of every task.







Your main tasks will be:

Use AI captions to generate blog posts and social media captions

Research tasks such as finding topics for blogs, finding keywords, compiling listicles

Humanize AI generated content for blog and social media and put it in blog format inside Wordpress along with the media pictures and videos created by us

Managing social media comments

Various admin tasks as needed

Updating old blog posts with new images and videos as provided

SEO & Keyword research





All tasks will be fully explained with step-by-step instructions so you will know exactly what to do. You'll also have my Senior VA's support if you are stuck on a daily basis.





Why join my team?

- Long-term job, this is an established business, not a start-up

- Flexible work hours and workdays, as long as the deadlines are met

- Training on the job

- friendly and relaxed work environment





What I require from you:

- You must write and understand English well; we can't teach you if you can't understand us

- You MUST be familiar with AI, using it to brainstorm, generate text, etc.

- High attention to detail is a MUST

- Regular weekly contact through chat to discuss upcoming tasks, mainly with my Senior VA, who is from the Philippines as well

- Asking questions if you are not sure how to do something is a MUST

- You must be computer savvy, own your laptop, and have a stable, strong internet connection





Experience using the tools and platforms below helps, but we will also show you and train you on each task:

- Social media 
, Pinterest, Instagram, TikTok)

- ClickUp

- Google docs/sheets

- Canva

- AI for writing

- Strong writing skills for blog and social media



Required office equipment

- Home office (not working from coffee shops, malls, or anything like that)

- A good, fast computer

- High-speed internet connection is a MUST

- Microsoft Teams on your mobile, so we can contact you

- You will not be required to pay for any software we use





If you think you might be a good fit for this position, please apply by:



1. Changing the subject of this
 to “ *Add Your Name Here* - Job Application Crafting Happiness”



2. Send me your Microsoft Teams
 or ID and rough times when you are available for the interview. A video interview with your laptop or PC is required and will be conducted by my Senior VA, Seff.



*We are scheduling interviews on Friday, March 27, 2026, from 1PM to 9PM, PH Timezone, and we will let you know if you pass to the next step with a final interview with me by March 29, 2026.



If by any chance you can’t do Friday, we can also schedule interviews on Thursday, March 26, 2026, from 1PM to 9PM



3. Link your portfolio and any other related documents to this message so we can check your work.



4. Tell us why you want this job and how you can be a good fit for this position.



5. From the link below, choose 1 blog topic and 1 topic research, and follow the instructions inside the documents to complete the tasks. You will have to create your own documents in your own Drive.



Once done, put the document with the blog post and the sheet with the topic research in a shared folder in your Drive, and share the link in your reply. Make sure the Drive is shared to “Anyone With The Link.



DRIVE LINK TO TASKS:

title: Lead Case Manager
description:
Must have 99 ID Proof

Healthcare a Plus!!!!



Lead Case Manager

TeamPHCA**



Position Summary

The PH Lead Case Manager is responsible for overseeing case management operations, ensuring compliance with ODP 6100/2380 regulations, and maintaining the integrity of all documentation, communication, and service delivery.



This role serves as the primary quality control and leadership layer for case management functions, including progress notes review, ISP alignment, intake coordination, and staff accountability. The PH Lead Case Manager ensures that all individuals supported receive services aligned with their ISP while maintaining audit-ready documentation and operational excellence.



Core Responsibilities

???? Case Management Oversight

Ensure all Case Management staff complete and document Summary of Calls for all interactions (SCs, families, individuals, staff, and stakeholders)

Monitor and enforce completion of Daily Logs across all assigned staff

Oversee Case Management Weekly tracking to ensure all required tasks are completed timely

Maintain visibility into all active cases, ensuring alignment with ISP outcomes



???? Documentation & Compliance (Quality Assurance)

Conduct initial review of Progress Notes using the established checklist and compliance standards

Ensure all Monthly and Quarterly Notes are completed, accurate, and submitted on time

Identify and flag non-compliant documentation and implement corrective actions

Ensure all documentation meets ODP 6100/2380 regulatory requirements



???? Corrective Action & Performance Management

Ensure all Corrective Action Plans (CAPs) are completed, implemented, and tracked

Address documentation deficiencies, performance gaps, and compliance risks

Provide ongoing coaching and feedback to Case Management staff

Escalate repeated non-compliance to leadership



???? ISP & Service Planning

Lead the creation and finalization of ISP Templates, including:

Behavior Support Plans

Crisis Plans

Adaptive Support Plans

Communication Plans

Ensure all ISP-related documentation aligns with assessed needs and service delivery

Support staff in understanding and implementing ISP requirements



???? Intake & Systems Coordination

Assist with IntakeQ ISO (Summary of Information) to ensure accurate intake documentation

Support the intake process by reviewing documentation for completeness and compliance

Ensure timely and accurate uploading and tracking of documents



???? Program & Activity Support

Provide oversight and support for CPS Weekly Activities, ensuring alignment with ISP goals and community integration standards

Collaborate with program staff to ensure meaningful and compliant service delivery



???? Operational Oversight

Provide oversight of Jamaya’s task coordination, specifically:

Day Program document uploads from IntakeQ

ISP documentation tracking

Ensure all operational workflows are completed accurately and timely



???? Training & Knowledge Transfer

Lead Transferring Knowledge initiatives, including:



Process documentation

Staff training and onboarding support

Ensure staff are trained on:

Progress Notes requirements

ISP implementation

Documentation standards



Qualifications

Human Services, Social Work, Healthcare Experience 

Minimum of 2–3 years of experience case management, or program oversight



Strong knowledge of:

ODP 6100 and/or 2380 regulations

ISP development and implementation

Progress note documentation standards



Experience with systems such as:

WellSky

IntakeQ

Electronic documentation systems such as 

Comfortable with Virtual Office, you will have your
 and phone line



Skills & Competencies

Strong leadership and accountability management

High attention to detail and compliance

Ability to audit, review, and correct documentation

Effective communication with staff, families, and stakeholders

Organizational and time management skills

Ability to manage multiple workflows simultaneously



Performance Expectations

100% completion of required documentation (Daily, Weekly, Monthly, Quarterly)

Progress Notes compliance scores maintained above 89% minimum standard

Timely completion and tracking of all CAPs

Zero tolerance for missing ISP-related documentation

Consistent staff accountability and performance improvement





Work Schedule Expectations

Full-time, aligned with operational hours

Availability to support case management team and address urgent compliance matters

Participation in weekly and monthly operational meetings



Key Impact of Role

This position is critical to:

Maintaining compliance and audit readiness

Ensuring quality service delivery aligned with ISPs

Driving staff accountability and operational excellence

Supporting the organization’s growth while protecting regulatory standing





Pay is bi-weekly with our current pay period



Benefits

Competitive Monthly Salary

Pay includes health insurance

$100.00 - Quarterly Bonuses (When we reach our goals)

Annual Bonuses - Based on Company Profits

Employee of the month bonus (after 5 months and selection)

Supervisory Support

Paid Time Off (1) day off per month (after 5 months) Must put in a 2-week notice (Cannot Take off on Mondays or Fridays)

Room for advancement to take on leadership positions

*********************************************************

title: Shopify Store Builder (High-Converting Dropshipping Stores)
description:
We’re looking for an experienced Shopify store builder who understands how to build high-converting, impulse-driven e-commerce stores. This is not a basic design role. You must understand conversion, psychology, and structure — not just how to build a nice-looking store.



We build dropshipping stores across different niches, focused on fast, emotional buying decisions (cold traffic).



What you’ll be responsible for



* Building complete Shopify stores from scratch

* Structuring product pages for maximum conversion

* Creating layouts optimized for impulse buying

* Optimizing UX for mobile-first traffic

* Implementing trust elements that increase CVR

* Aligning store design with ads and target audience



Requirements



* Proven experience building Shopify stores that convert

* Strong understanding of conversion rate optimization (CRO)

* Experience with dropshipping / e-commerce is required

* You know what makes a product page sell (not just look good)

* You can show real examples of stores you've built



This is NOT for you if



* You only focus on design without conversion

* You copy generic templates without strategy

* You cannot show past work



To apply



Please complete the application form below. Only applicants who complete the form will be considered. Low-effort applications will be ignored.



Google form: 



Best regards,

Jordy Bruggeman

title: Google Ads Rockstar (eCom) – Help scale startup to €20M
description:
DO NOT APPLY if you are just a "task-taker" or an agency. We are looking for a long-term partner, an A-player who understands that ROAS is the only metric that matters.



Who we are:

We are Bart & Jessica, founders of Lunavia, a Dutch natural skincare brand. 

We specialize in scalp health (eczema/detox). 

We are currently in the early stages, but our goal is to become market leader in the sesitive skin sector. 

To get there, we need a predictable acquisition engine.



The Reality Check (Read carefully):



Current Spend: Small (€22/day).

The Problem: Our current campaigns are losing money (ROAS < 1).

The Goal: A sustainable ROAS of 6+.



The Tech: We run on WooCommerce/WordPress. You must be an expert in tracking (GTM/GA4) for this platform.



What we expect from you:



The Cleanup: Audit our account, kill the waste, and fix the "Maximize Clicks" trap we are currently in.



Strategy over Settings: Don’t just tweak keywords. Tell us if our landing page sucks. Tell us if our AOV (Average Order Value) is too low to sustain the ads.



Scale: Once you hit a ROAS of 5-6, we will aggressively increase the budget. Your job is to keep it profitable while we scale.



The Offer:



Start: 10–20 hours per week (we can discuss based on your plan).



Salary: $700 - $900 USD per month (for 20h/week) depending on your track record.



HOW TO APPLY :

To prove you are an expert, answer these 3 questions in your application:



The Math: If we spend €700 on ads and pay you €900, what specific steps will you take in the first 14 days to ensure this investment isn't a total loss?



The Logic: Why is "Maximize Clicks" usually a bad idea for a niche skincare brand with a small budget?



The Proof: Send a screenshot or case study of a Google Ads account YOU managed that achieved a 5+ ROAS on a niche eCom product.



Applications without these 3 answers will be deleted immediately.

Also start your message with "marktleider" so i know you read untill the end.

title: YouTube Creative Director – FBAJayden
description:
Here's the listing:



YouTube Creative Director – FBA Jayden



We're building out our YouTube channel and looking for one person to own it entirely. This isn't a task-based role you'll be responsible for the strategy, the content, and the results. If the channel grows, you grow with it.



What You'll Own



Full ideation and packaging coming up with video concepts, titles, and thumbnails that get clicks

Writing scripts for the host to read from you understand how to write for a spoken delivery, not just to be read

QCing the editor's output before anything goes live you're the last set of eyes on every video

Monitoring video performance and making real-time adjustments to titles, thumbnails, and SEO to maximize reach

Owning the overall channel strategy growth, consistency, and positioning



You're the Right Fit If



You've grown or managed a YouTube channel before, ideally in the business, finance, or e-commerce space

You understand YouTube SEO, the algorithm, and what separates a 10K view video from a 1M view video

You can write compelling scripts that sound natural when spoken on camera

You're proactive — you bring ideas, flag problems, and don't wait to be told what to do

You take ownership seriously and think like a business partner not an employee



Compensation



$1,200/month base retainer + performance bonus tied to YouTube revenue generated. The more the channel earns, the more you earn.



To Apply



Send examples of YouTube channels you've worked on, your role on those channels, and the results you drove.

title: Lead Transactions Coordinator & Executive Assistant
description:
I’m a real estate entrepreneur based in Dallas, Texas, running two connected businesses: a real estate sales team that helps buyers and sellers, and a property management company that operates furnished co-living rentals. We use ClickUp for task and project management and Google Drive as our primary file system. We also use Buildium as our main property management tool.



I’m looking for a full-time Real Estate Lead Transaction Coordinator to manage the flow of transactions from contract to close, making sure deadlines are met and nothing falls through the cracks.



This role combines transaction management with systems coordination. You’ll handle communication between agents, clients, title, and lenders — while also ensuring that files and documents for each transaction are organized and fully documented.



WHAT YOU’LL DO

- Manage all real estate transactions from contract to close

- Communicate with agents, clients, title companies, and lenders to ensure smooth closings

- Schedule showings, enter listings, and draft proposals

- Track deadlines, contingencies, and documentation compliance

- Create and update SOPs and workflow documentation for transaction processes

- Coordinate with automation partners for system improvements



YOU’D BE A GREAT FIT IF

- 2+ years of experience as a Real Estate Transaction Coordinator (or a similar role in real estate operations)

- You follow instructions exactly and don’t cut corners

- You write and speak clearly in English

- You stay calm managing many moving parts

- You take ownership and don’t need hand-holding

- You take initiative: you spot issues early, investigate, and propose next steps/solutions

- You use good judgment and can prioritize without being told every step

- You thrive in a fast-paced environment and can adapt quickly as priorities shift

- You are tech-savvy, detail-oriented, and reliable under deadlines

- Understanding of contract timelines, title/lender coordination, and client communication

- Flexibility to work some hours on weekends is preferred





ROLE DETAILS

- Full-time, remote

- Schedule: Mon–Fri, aligned with CST

- Pay: $5-7 USD/hour, based on experience

- Long-term role with growth and bonuses



HOW TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY)

We do not review platfor
ssages.

Applications that don’t follow instructions are disqualified.



STEP 1 —

1. Send an
 to 

2. Subject line: Lead Transactions Coordinator – [Full Name]

3.
 body must include only:

- A short greeting

- A Google Drive folder link

- Your answer to the Detail Check (see Step 3)



STEP 2 — GOOGLE DRIVE FOLDER

1. Create a folder named: [Your Full Name] — Lead Transactions Coordinator Application

2. Set sharing to “Anyone with the link can view.”

3. You can organize the folder however you think is best. I will be looking at both what you submit and how you organize it.

4. Include the following:

a. Resume (PDF)

b. Tech and Setup

   - Include a screenshot of your internet speed showing download and upload speeds. 

   - Include a screenshot of your computer specs showing RAM, processor, and OS.

   - Include one photo of your current workspace (desk and computer).

c. Written Answers (one Google Doc)

   - Transactions Coordinator Experience

      - Describe one property management role or company you worked with. Include:

      - Number of properties/units

      - Your day-to-day responsibilities

      - Tools you used 

   - Taking Ownership

      - We already have SOPs and systems, but they’re still improving.

title: Customer Success & Design Liaison (Sports Apparel)
description:
We are not looking for a traditional "salesperson." We need a detail-oriented Coordinator who can manage the technical gap between a customer’s vague idea and a designer’s final output. This role is about accuracy, clarity, and critical thinking—not following a script.



*** The Core Reality of the Role

You will manage inbound enquiries, providing pricing and design revisions until the customer is ready to buy. When volume is lower, you will pivot to data collection, competitor research, and report preparation.

- Obsessive Attention to Detail: You will be checking your own work and the work of others. Accuracy is non-negotiable.



- Spreadsheet Proficiency: You should be comfortable managing data and creating organized reports.



*** HOW TO APPLY (Read Carefully)

 me at 
 with the job role and your name in the

, please describe how you would translate the following vague customer request into three specific instructions for a designer:

s in a timely manner

Requirements

title: Appointment Setter for Warm Inbound Leads
description:
We are a Shopify-exclusive SEO agency looking for an Appointment Setter who can reach out to our warm leads who signed up for our digital product. Your job is to hold a real conversation, earn trust quickly, and consistently book qualified calls for our sales team.



Your mission is simple: Book qualified appointments with Shopify store owners who have expressed interest in our service and have a genuine need for SEO or CRO, and ensure they actually show up to the call. You do this by having an engaging conversation with them.



The Candidate Profile

We aren't looking for someone who reads from a script and hopes for the best. We are looking for someone who listens first, builds rapport naturally, and knows when to push and when to pull back, while following the script.



Our key requirements...



1. The Communication Stack (English Fluency & Professionalism)

The Goal: Every prospect feels like they're speaking to a competent professional.

The Skill: You speak and write English fluently and confidently. You can handle objections without sounding robotic or flustered. You don't stumble, over-apologize, or lose the thread of a conversation. Accent is not a disqualifier. Clarity and confidence are non-negotiable.



2. The Relationship Stack (Listening Over Pitching)

The Goal: Prospects feel heard, not hunted.

The Skill: You ask the right questions and actually absorb the answers. You don't jump to the pitch while the prospect is still talking. You understand that booking an appointment is a result of building enough trust in a short window, not a numbers game where you just rush through a list.



3. The Execution Stack (Discipline & Accountability)

The Goal: Consistent, reliable output, every week, without being managed.

The Skill: You work your contracted hours. You hit your daily activity targets. You log your calls, update the CRM, and flag issues proactively. You don't disappear, go quiet, or hand in excuses instead of results.



Application Instructions

To apply, submit your CV, and introduce yourself in a Loom video along with your motivation for applying, and a brief overview of your relevant outbound experience.



Additionally, provide your response to the following three scenarios:



1. You've been calling for two hours and everyone either hung up or said "not interested" immediately. It's only 11 AM and you have four more hours on the clock. What do you do?



2. A prospect picks up and starts telling you about a bad experience they had with a previous SEO agency. You weren't expecting this. Walk me through how you handle the next 60 seconds of that call.



3. You book an appointment, it shows up on the closer's calendar — but the prospect never mentioned their monthly revenue, and you forgot to ask. The call is in two hours. What do you do?



How you handle these tells us more than your CV.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Acquisitions Closer – Real Estate
description:
Acquisitions Closer – Real Estate 



Are you process-driven, direct, and energized by real conversations?

We’re looking for a disciplined outbound sales professional based in the Philippines to connect with property owners facing urgent, complex situations—delinquent taxes, inherited estates, title issues, and more. Our sellers aren’t just “leads”—they’re people in transition who need straight answers and real solutions.



This is not a basic call center job.

If you’re skilled at asking the right questions, unafraid of hearing “no,” and want your compensation to reflect your results—not just your effort—read on.



Role Overview:



Primary focus: Outbound calling to distressed property owners—cold calls, follow-ups, and active pipeline management.



Objective: Uncover seller motivation, determine property fit, and guide owners to a clear outcome (offers or next steps).



Daily routine: High phone activity, rapid qualification, disciplined follow-up, accurate notes.



Pace: High volume, high accountability. Activity and results are tracked and reviewed.



Compensation Structure:



Base pay: Modest, for reliability.



Commission: Significant; your earnings scale with your results.



No ceiling: Top performers set their own income.



Underperformance: Addressed quickly—excuses are not accepted.



Environment & Expectations:



You control your own pipeline—but are measured daily.



Calls are monitored, results are tracked, and feedback is regular.



If you thrive in a disciplined, no-excuses culture, you’ll succeed here.



If you require micro-management or dislike structure and direct feedback, this will not be a fit.



What We’re Looking For:



Resilience: Can you keep dialing and qualifying, no matter how many rejections?



Clarity: Can you speak directly, ask difficult questions, and move conversations toward a decision?



Self-management: Do you measure your own output and seek improvement—without constant reminders?



Motivation: Are you truly driven by the opportunity to control your income?



Application Instructions – Read Carefully



Voice Recording (Required):

Send a 2–3 minute audio introduction (not read, not AI-generated).

Cover these points, in this order:



Your name and most relevant phone sales experience.



Why you’re a strong fit for conversations with distressed sellers (not just generic sales).



How you organize your workday to maintain consistent output, even when wins are delayed.



What excites you about commission-based earnings.



How you handle feedback and respond to strict accountability.



Applications missing the recording, or not following the format above, will not be considered.

Attach your resume as well.

title: EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT (DIGITAL MARKETING BACKGROUND)
description:
The Opportunity

You will be the operational backbone for agency leadership and the broader team. You will support the executive inbox, coordinate scheduling, manage project documentation, keep content calendars on track, and make sure client-facing work goes out accurately and on time. This role touches nearly every part of the agency, which means variety is built into every week.



What you'll build

• Create, organize, and manage client tasks, folders, and project documentation inside Teamwork

• Track follow-ups, deadlines, and task completion across multiple client accounts

• Set up client content calendars in Google Sheets ahead of weekly content production days

• Schedule blogs in WP Engine (WordPress) for each client on a weekly cadence

• Schedule and manage client social media posts across platforms using Metricool

• Prepare and distribute client meeting agendas before scheduled calls; update as needed

• Manage the executive inbox and the general support inbox

• Coordinate scheduling and calendar management for the team

• Maintain organized client folders and documentation in Google Drive

• Use AI tools including ChatGPT as part of daily workflows to improve speed and accuracy



Qualifications

Requirements:

• Advanced, hands-on experience with Teamwork project management software

• Prior experience working inside a marketing or creative agency

• Fluent, professional English with exceptional written accuracy

• Strong Google Drive proficiency including Google Docs and Google Sheets

• Comfort using AI platforms such as ChatGPT as part of daily work

• Fast and accurate typing skills with strong attention to detail

• Availability to work Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM PST without schedule conflict

 

Bonus Points

• Experience building or managing newsletters in HubSpot

• Ability to edit PDFs in Adobe Acrobat

• Familiarity with Metricool or similar social media scheduling platforms



Compensation

Monthly Compensation: $1,000 to $1,500 per month (based on experience)

Payment: Schedule: Bi-weekly

Time Off: 15 paid days off annually

Bonuses: Performance-based bonuses available

Schedule: Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM PST

 Work Arrangement: Fully remote

Start Date: As soon as possible



What Success Looks Like?

Projects stay on track without reminders. Client agendas are always ready before calls. Content and social posts go out accurately and on time. Leadership has the clarity and structure they need to focus on growth.



What support looks like?

On-the-job training in agency processes and tools, regular check-ins to make sure expectations are clear and realistic, room for growth and creativity, and a team that genuinely wants you to succeed. No yelling, no drama, just real work with real people

title: AI Video Creator + Short-Form Editor
description:
WHO YOU ARE WORKING WITH

My name is Mathis. I run Purevie — a short-form content brand in the product and lifestyle space.

In under 2 years, I have:



Generated multiple 6 figures from short-form content and product promotions

Built and scaled content systems that produce viral videos consistently

Cracked what actually makes short-form product videos convert — not theory, real results



I am not a corporation. I am an operator who moves fast, pays on time, and rewards people who perform.

I know exactly what good content looks like because I have tested hundreds of videos myself. That means I give clear feedback, clear briefs, and clear expectations — no guessing games.

I only work with people who are serious. If you are serious, this is one of the best remote opportunities you will find — with real upside as we scale.



WHO I AM LOOKING FOR

One sharp person who can do two things well:



Generate AI video footage using Google Veo

Edit that footage into clean, punchy, conversion-focused short-form videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts



These are short product and brand promo videos. The goal: stop the scroll, hold attention, and make people want to buy or click.

This is not a role for someone who wants to click buttons and collect a check. I want someone who cares about the output and takes pride in making content that actually performs.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Use Google Veo to generate AI video clips based on brand briefs

Edit clips into 15–60 second short-form videos

Add captions, text overlays, and transitions that are clean and readable

Match the energy and pacing to the product being promoted

Deliver files on time in the correct format

Take feedback, revise quickly, and improve with each video





WHAT I NEED FROM YOU



Real experience editing short-form video content (TikTok, Reels, or Shorts)

Access to or experience with Google Veo — or the drive to learn it fast

A strong eye for hooks, pacing, and retention

Reliable internet — minimum 20 Mbps

Fast turnaround — I move quickly and expect the same

Clear communication and honest updates on progress

A device that handles video editing smoothly





YOU DO NOT NEED



A huge portfolio — 2 to 3 strong samples is enough

Years of experience — talent and hunger matter more than a long CV

Expensive equipment — if your setup works, we are good





PAY & GROWTH

$3–$5 per completed video depending on complexity and quality.

Volume increases as performance proves out. The more consistently you deliver, the more work you get.

Payment via PayPal, Wise, or your preferred method. I pay on time, every time.

Strong performers become long-term tea
mbers. I am building something real and I want the right people growing with it.



HOW TO APPLY — READ EVERY WORD

I filter by attention to detail. Skip any step below and your application will not be read — no exceptions.

Your application must include ALL of the following:



Subject line must start with the word: VEOEDITOR

2–3 samples of short-form content you have edited (links or attachments)

Your internet speed — run a test at 
 and include the result

Your device specs — what you use for editing

Answer in 2–3 sentences: What makes a great product promo video stop someone from scrolling?

Your typical turnaround time for a 30-second edited video



Missing any of the above = no response. This is how I find people who actually pay attention.

title: GRAPHIC DESIGNER — LONG-TERM PARTNERSHIP (D2C E-commerce))
description:
Let me be upfront with you, because that's how we operate.



We're a D2C e-commerce brand in the women's health space. We run paid ads on Meta. We sell a product that genuinely helps people, and every visual we produce reflects that. 



Transparency and honesty aren't buzzwords here, they're the reason our customers trust us, and the reason we're still growing.



We've worked with designers before. Some were talented. Most were treated like vendors, asset in, asset out, goodbye.

That's not what we're building.



We're in this for the long game. We want you to be too.



- THE ROLE



Position: Direct Response Graphic Designer for Meta Ads

Commitment: Full-time, long-term (this is not a freelance gig)

Hours: 40h/week

Location: 100% remote

Market: English-speaking (US primary)

Compensation: $800–$1,200/month base + performance bonuses



- WHAT LONG-TERM ACTUALLY MEANS HERE



Year-over-year salary increases of 10–20% for strong performers.

Performance bonuses tied directly to ad performance and ROAS.

Creative ownership: you'll understand the strategy, the avatar, the psychology behind every visual.

A real team: you'll work closely with the founder and marketing lead, not disappear into a ticket queue.



- WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Non-negotiable:



3+ years as a graphic designer in DTC e-commerce or digital marketing

Proven experience creating ad creatives, landing page visuals, and social content that actually ran

Strong command of Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects)

Experience with AI image generation tools (MidJourney, Leonardo, DALL·E, etc.)

Understanding of conversion-focused design, you know why visual hierarchy matters for an ad



Strong preference:



Health or wellness brand experience

Knowledge of direct-response marketing and what makes someone stop scrolling

Motion graphics or light video editing capability



- WHO THRIVES HERE:



You look at a high-performing ad and instinctively break down why it works.

You care about what happens after the asset goes live, not just whether the client approved it.

You understand that empathy, trust, and clarity aren't soft concepts in health marketing, they're conversion levers.

You want to help build a brand's visual identity over years, not just deliver a batch of assets.



- WHO THIS IS NOT FOR



If you're managing 8 clients simultaneously and fitting us in between, this isn't the right fit.

We want someone who is genuinely invested in one brand's growth, because that's where the real upside is.



- THE PROCESS



We review every application carefully. Portfolio quality matters far more than volume. If your work shows real DTC and direct-response experience, you'll hear from us fast.



We move quickly, but we don't rush decisions on people.



Start your application with the word "BLUEPRINT". it tells us you read this and you understand what we're actually building.

title: Content & Influencer Manager (UGC / E-commerce / Conversion Focused)
description:
Content & Influencer Manager (UGC / E-commerce / Conversion Focused)



About Us



We are a fast-growing e-commerce brand focused on content that drives sales — not just views.

We already have customers and some influencers — your job is to turn that into consistent, high-converting content every month.



Your Role (Important – Read Carefully)



This is NOT just a video editing job.



You will be responsible for:

Turning that content into high-converting videos

Managing and posting content across our platforms

1. Influencer Outreach & Management

Reach out and build relationships

Get influencers to create content promoting our product

Turn real customer experiences into marketing content

Create multiple variations for testing

Follow our proven content formula

Plan and schedule content throughout the month

Post consistently across platforms

5. Content Selection & Strategy

Identify what can be turned into strong ads/content

Focus on what will convert, not just what looks nice



Requirements

Strong video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, etc.)

Experience with TikTok / short-form content

Experience working with influencers or outreach

Ability to spot good vs bad content

Organized and proactive (VERY important)

Good English communication



Salary

$1200/month 



IMPORTANT – HOW TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY)

To apply, you MUST:



Send 3–5 videos you have edited

Answer this question:



How would you turn a customer review into a video that sells?

Not just an editor — someone who finds content opportunities

mber

title: Photoshop & Figma Graphic Design in German Agency
description:
About Us:



We are a rapidly growing marketing agency from Germany, recognized as a market leader in our field. Our team is young, motivated, and passionate about producing outstanding content. We specialize in creating high-quality product photos for online shops and Amazon product pages. As we continue to expand, we're looking for Remote Photo Editors / Graphic Designers to join our team for a long-term commitment.





Job Description:



We are seeking a talented and experienced Photo Editor / Graphic Designer to edit product photos for use in Amazon and online shop listings. Your tasks will include retouching photos, as well as creating and designing graphics & icons. The role is entirely remote, requiring a high-speed internet connection due to the need for efficient uploads and downloads of project files.





Training:



To ensure you're set up for success, we provide an extensive course on editing product photos and designing graphics, created by our team. Watching and learning from this course marks the beginning of our collaboration.





Trial Period:



The first week is a paid trial phase, where you'll go through our course and complete a test project. If the quality meets our standards, we will proceed with a permanent employment offer.





Requirements:

- Experience in photo editing and graphic design

- Good Photoshop skills

- Figma skills

- Strong aesthetic sense and design skills

- Good English skills

- Interested in a full-time role (40 hours/week) and looking for long-term employment (years)





How to Apply:



Please submit your application with the subject "Gold-Photo-Candidate" and include a portfolio of your previous work.





Traits We Value:



- Ability to follow clear instructions and processes

- Discipline and determination

- Eagerness to create amazing visuals and push the limits





Benefits:



- Paid time off and paid holidays

- 13th-month pay

- Annual performance-based salary bonus/increases

- Internal training with exclusive knowledge





Join Us:



If you're passionate about making a significant impact with your photo editing and graphic design skills and are looking for a long-term, fulfilling career, we'd love to hear from you. Apply today to become a part of our success story!

mbers, our families, and our clients.

title: Remote Sales CLOSER (Aesthetic / SKIN Industry)
description:
Sales Closer (Remote)

Skin & Aesthetics Education Brand



We’re building something very intentional in the skin space.



Not another course.

Not surface-level education.



We’re focused on raising the standard of skin professionals through advanced, results-driven education that actually changes how they work, how they think, and how they grow their businesses.



Our core program, the Online Skin Masters Course, is designed for professionals who are ready to move beyond basic treatments and step into true skin expertise.



This is where you come in.



The Role



This is a closing-focused role.



You’ll be working closely alongside our lead generation team and appointment setters, who are consistently feeding warm, pre-qualified calls into your diary.



Your role is to take those conversations and lead them properly.



You’ll be:



Speaking to booked calls each day

Running a structured, proven sales process

Leading with confidence while keeping the conversation natural

Understanding the client’s current challenges and goals

Positioning the course as a solution based on where they are

Handling objections and closing with clarity



All calls are live, and managed through our CRM system (Zoho).



How We Work



We already have lead generation in place.



We already have appointment setters booking calls.



You’re stepping into a system designed to support you in closing at a high level.



At the same time, this is not a passive role.



During quieter periods, we expect you to take ownership of your pipeline and proactively generate additional opportunities through outreach. This could include re-engaging past leads, following up conversations, or initiating new ones.



The strongest closers don’t wait. They build.



Who This Is For



You’re someone who is comfortable on calls.



You know how to build trust quickly, ask the right questions, and guide a conversation without forcing it.



You understand that closing isn’t about pressure. It’s about clarity.



You likely have experience in:



High-ticket sales or closing

Online coaching or course sales

Consultative sales environments



You’re confident asking for the sale, and you’re motivated by performance and earning potential.



Structure & Earning Potential



We’re open depending on the right person:



Hourly + commission

or

Commission-based



Alongside this, we offer strong commission and performance-based bonuses on top, rewarding consistency, quality conversations, and results.



There is serious earning potential here for the right person.



We’re not building one brand.

We’re building an ecosystem across skin, aesthetics, wellness and education.



This role has long-term opportunity for someone who wants to grow with us.



How to Apply



If this feels aligned, I’d love to hear from you.



Please send:



A short voice note introducing yourself

Your experience in sales or closing

Your expected rate or commission structure

title: Link Builder / Outreach Specialist
description:
Job Description



We are looking for an experienced Link Builder / Outreach Specialist to help us acquire high-quality backlinks for our clients. This role is focused on building links through guest posts, niche edits/link inserts, and citations while following strict quality standards and SEO metrics.



This is not a role for someone who builds random links just to hit volume targets. We need someone who understands link quality, relevance, and how to evaluate opportunities properly before placement.



Responsibilities



*Build high-quality backlinks through:

- Guest posts

- Niche edits / link inserts

- Citations and directory listings

*Prospect and qualify relevant websites for link placements

*Evaluate websites based on required SEO metrics and quality standards

*Reach out to website owners and partners for placement opportunities

*Negotiate pricing when needed

*Maintain organized records of outreach, placements, pricing, and live links

*Ensure all links are placed correctly with the proper target URL and anchor text

*Monitor live placements and report completed links

*Follow internal SOPs and quality control processes



Requirements

*2–3 years of proven experience in link building

*Hands-on experience with Guest posts, Niche edits / link inserts, Citation building

*Strong understanding of SEO and backlink quality

*Ability to assess link opportunities based on metrics, relevance, and site quality

*Experience using SEO tools such as Ahrefs, Semrush, Moz, or similar

*Strong attention to detail and ability to follow instructions

*Organized and reliable with good communication skills



Important

*We are not looking for someone who will build just any link.

*You must be able to follow specific link qualification standards and metrics before securing placements.

*This means understanding things like:

- Website relevance

- Organic traffic quality

- Spam signals

- Domain strength

- Link profile quality

- Content quality

- Placement value

- Nice to Have

- Existing relationships with website owners or link vendors

- Experience negotiating link costs

- Experience working with agencies or multiple client campaigns

- Familiarity with local SEO citation building



To Apply

title: Full-Time Call & Virtual Assistant (US Hours – Remote)
description:
Full-Time Call & Virtual Assistant (US Hours - Remote)



Contract Role | $5USD/hour | 40 hours/week | Fully Remote



We are a recruitment support business working with multiple USA-based clients. We are hiring a full-time Call & Virtual Assistant based in the Philippines to support our recruitment operations.



This is a long-term contractor role for someone reliable, fast-thinking, and comfortable working in a high-volume, fast-paced environment.







About the Role



You will support the recruitment process from end to end. This role combines call support and administrative coordination and requires strong communication skills, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple tasks at once.



While this role is not a sales position, the ability to confidently speak with people, build rapport quickly, and handle objections is essential. For this reason, sales experience is a major advantage.



This is an ideal role for someone who has worked in sales or appointment setting and is looking to transition into a more structured support-focused role, while still using their communication and people skills daily.









Key Responsibilities



Making outbound phone calls to candidates to book interviews



Speaking clearly and professionally with candidates based in the USA



Screening and processing resumes



Managing interview calendars and scheduling



Handling high-volume
 and SMS communication



Updating systems accurately and consistently



Following detailed processes while adapting to changes quickly



Required Skills & Experience



Excellent spoken and written English (neutral or clear accent required)



Confident speaking on the phone and building rapport quickly



Strong attention to detail and accuracy



Ability to work under pressure and manage high workloads



Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment



Strong time management and professionalism



Comfortable working full-time US hours



Sales, appointment setting, or call-based experience is a strong plus, even though this role itself is not sales. The communication, persistence, and confidence developed in sales translate extremely well into this position.



Previous experience as a recruitment VA, call assistant, appointment setter, or administrative VA is strongly preferred.









Compensation & Work Details



Schedule: Full-time, US hours



Location: Fully remote (Philippines-based contractor)



Base pay: $5 per hour



Weekly base pay: $200 per week



Performance-based incentives apply after the probationary period



Long-term opportunity for the right candidate



Important Notes



This is a contractor role, not employment



Reliability, consistency, and communication are critical



We are looking for someone who can commit long-term







How to Apply



Please submit all of the following:



A brief written introduction outlining your experience



An updated resume/CV



Your experience with calls, sales, or recruitment support



Confirmation that you can work full-time US hours



A 1–2 minute voice recording introducing yourself and explaining why you would be a strong fit for this role







Applications missing a resume or voice recording will not be considered.







Ready to Apply?



If you are detail-oriented, confident on the phone, and looking for a long-term remote role where your communication skills genuinely matter, we encourage you to apply today.



We review applications carefully and move quickly with shortlisted candidates.

title: Candidate Outreach & Coordination Assistant
description:
Candidate Outreach & Coordination Assistant



Remote (Philippines) | Full-Time Contractor | US Hours





Looking for a fast-paced role where you stay busy, handle real responsibility, and build long-term stability?



We are hiring a Candidate Outreach & Coordination Assistant to support live US recruitment campaigns. This is a role combining high-volume calling, real-time coordination, and inbound support across multiple clients.



This is not a slow or routine position. You will be managing tasks, conversations, and priorities throughout the day.







How the Role Works



1. Coordination & Admin (Time-Sensitive)

Confirming interview availability with candidates

Sending interview links and managing schedules

Monitoring team chats and responding to urgent client requests

Processing incoming applications quickly and accurately

Keeping operations moving in real time



2. Outreach, Calling & Inbound Support

Conducting a high volume of outbound calls to active applicants and headhunted candidates

Booking candidates for interviews and confirming attendance

Managing SMS and
 conversations alongside calls

Answering inbound calls across multiple client campaigns

Handling objections, questions, and keeping conversations on track

Working toward daily booking targets





What This Role Requires



Ability to handle multiple tasks at once without slowing down

Strong, natural English communication (spoken and written)

Confidence handling objections and guiding conversations

Ability to respond quickly to urgent client requests or unexpected issues

Fast and accurate computer skills (typing, multitasking across systems)

High level of reliability, focus, and consistency



You will be handling multiple conversations, confirmations, and tasks simultaneously, so speed, responsiveness, and the ability to prioritise quickly are essential.





Who Tends to Do Well Here



This role suits individuals who are used to fast-paced, target-driven environments. Experience in sales or high-volume customer interaction is beneficial, but not required.



This is not a traditional recruitment role - the focus is on fast execution, high activity, and keeping processes moving in real time.





Schedule & Commitment

Full-time contractor role (40 hours per week)

Monday to Friday: 7:00 AM – 2:00 PM EST

Saturday: 8:30 AM – 12:30 PM EST (required)

Fully remote



Flexibility is required as hours may adjust based on business needs.



As our business continues to grow, we are looking for candidates who are seeking a stable, long-term opportunity rather than a short-term role.



Compensation

Weekly base pay of $210

Performance-based increases after initial review period

Additional earning potential through weekly bonuses

Application Process (IMPORTANT)





To be considered, you must submit BOTH:

Your CV

A short voice recording (1–2 minutes)



In your voice recording, explain:

Why you would be a strong fit for this role

How your experience or skills relate to the responsibilities

Why you would perform well in a fast-paced environment



The voice recording will be treated as your first interview. First impressions matter.



Applications that do not include both a CV and voice recording will not be considered.



Important Notes

This is a full-time commitment during US hours

Candidates must be able to fully commit to one role during these hours

Includes a required Saturday shift

Best suited to candidates looking for long-term progression





Next Step

Apply with your CV and voice recording to be considered.

title: Real estate/Personal Assistant GHL experience
description:
Administrative & Personal Assistant (Real Estate Team)



We are a fast-growing, high-performing real estate company dedicated to delivering exceptional service, building strong client relationships, and closing deals with efficiency and integrity. Our team specializes in residential, commercial, and investment properties, and we pride ourselves on staying organized, responsive, and results-driven in a competitive market.



We are seeking a highly motivated, detail-oriented Administrative & Personal Assistant who thrives in a fast-paced environment and can serve as the backbone of daily operations. This role is critical to maintaining seamless communication with leads, managing schedules, and ensuring no opportunity is missed.



Key Responsibilities

 • Proactively manage and respond to all incoming leads (calls, texts,
s, and CRM inquiries)

 • Conduct outbound calls to new and existing leads to qualify prospects and nurture relationships

 • Schedule and confirm appointments for property showings, consultations, and meetings

 • Maintain and organize the agent’s personal and professional calendar, ensuring efficiency and no scheduling conflicts

 • Follow up consistently with leads to increase conversion and client engagement

 • Assist with administrative tasks such as data entry, document organization, and CRM updates

 • Coordinate communication between clients, agents, lenders, and other parties involved in transactions

 • Anticipate needs and provide high-level executive support



Qualifications

 • Proven experience in real estate administration, executive assistance, or high-volume customer service

 • Strong communication skills with confidence in making and handling calls

 • Experience using CRM systems (real estate platforms preferred)

 • Exceptional organizational and time-management skills

 • Ability to multitask and prioritize in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment

 • High level of professionalism, discretion, and reliability

 • A self-starter mindset with the ability to work independently and take initiative



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone who doesn’t wait to be told what to do. You are proactive, solutions-driven, and naturally take ownership of your responsibilities. You understand the urgency of real estate and the importance of timely follow-up. You are comfortable communicating with clients, handling sensitive information, and supporting both business and personal scheduling needs with precision.



Why Join Us

 • Be part of a growing real estate brand with strong systems and leadership

 • Opportunity to grow within the company

 • Work closely with a top-producing agent and gain hands-on industry experience

 • Fast-paced, rewarding environment where your work directly impacts success

title: Lead Generation & Email Outreach Assistant (eCommerce AI  Shopping Assistance)
description:

We run Phixtra 
, a live AI shopping assistant for WooCommerce stores.

s inviting them to try our 14-day free trial.



Tools:

• Write a personalised first line for each

• Send outreach
s using our template

• Track all contacts and replies in Google Sheets

• Send follow-ups after 2–3 days

• Respond to customer queries via
, chat and telephone

.

s per day

Requirements:



• Good written English

• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to research and understand websites

• Must follow instructions carefully

• No copy-paste or spam
s



Performance Bonuses:

• $5 per paying customer



High performers will receive increased bonuses.



Important:

This is a quality-based role.
s must be personalised and relevant to each store.

Only applicants who complete the trial task will be considered.

title: Outbound Sales Rep

Startup / early?stage experience where things move fast and change often

title: X Breaking News Posts (@Coinvo)

 will monitor a curated list of 100+ accounts and track breaking news with viral potential to post on our account as fast as possible.

Great Copywriting + High-Quality Images + Being Super Fast = Viral Post



Creating viral posts is the end goal. The formula above is the process. You should have mastered every step of it.





Compensation:

Before You Apply:

- Check out 
 account

description:
Join Huzzle’s Talent Pool as an Appointment Setter! 



Make Your Application Here: 



At Huzzle, we connect top-tier Appointment Setters & SDRs with leading companies across the UK, US, and Europe. Whether it’s a startup, scale-up, agency, or enterprise, our clients trust us to find the best talent. We only admit the top 3% of candidates into our talent pool, ensuring they are matched with exclusive, long-term opportunities. Unlike an outsourcing agency, we place you directly with a client where you’re hired in-house to work full-time as a valued member of their team.



WHO THIS IS FOR:

You're looking to:

• Work with top-tier clients in the industry and secure long-term, stable opportunities.

• Advance your career through access to exclusive roles and ongoing professional development.

• Be valued and respected for your skills and contributions in a supportive work environment.

• Earn a competitive salary with regular pay increases and success-based bonuses.

• Stop fighting for opportunities across different platforms, and let us match you with roles where we believe you'll excel.



And if you're:

• Tired of job-hopping and want a stable, long-term position.

• Frustrated by lack of support or training in previous roles.

• Looking for meaningful work where your contributions are recognized and rewarded.

• Eager to work full-time for a reputable company that values your expertise.



What We Offer:

Competitive Pay: Starting at 30K PHP/month with regular pay raises and success-based bonuses:

• Month 1: 30K PHP/month + bonus

• Month 3: 33K PHP/month + bonus

• Month 6: 36K PHP/month + bonus

• Month 9: 38K PHP/month + bonus

Exclusive Access: Work with top companies and enjoy long-term client relationships.

Work from Anywhere: Enjoy the flexibility of working remotely, from the comfort of your home.



Your Role as an Appointment Setter:

• Proactive Outreach: Engage potential clients and partners through phone,
, and social media platforms.

• Seamless Scheduling: Coordinate meetings and manage calendars for the sales teams, ensuring a smooth experience for both the team and potential clients.

• CRM Mastery: Keep meticulous records of all interactions, appointments, and follow-up activities in a CRM system.

• Database Management: Regularly update and review the contact database to maintain accuracy and relevancy.

• Active Communication: Collaborate with sales and marketing to understand offerings and effectively communicate the value proposition.

• Optimize & Succeed: Monitor appointment success rates and work closely with the team to refine strategies for higher conversions.

• Industry Savvy: Stay updated on industry trends to engage clients effectively and address their needs.





Who We're Looking For:

• Experience: At least 1 years of experience with Appointment Setting, Cold Calling, and Outbound Messaging (LinkedIn, Cold
s).

• Sales Tools Proficiency: Familiarity with relevant sales and outreach tools (CRMs, Prospecting Tools, Automation Tools, etc).

• Communication Skills: Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to build rapport with clients.

• Organizational Skills: Excellent time management and the ability to juggle multiple schedules.

• Tech-Savvy: Proficiency in Google Docs, Google Sheets, CRM systems, and communication tools like Slack, ChatGPT, Zoom, and LinkedIn.

• Remote Ready: Able to work effectively in a remote environment with a reliable laptop and internet connection.

• Detail-Oriented: A keen eye for detail and a commitment to maintaining high-quality data in systems.



 Our Hiring Process:

• Step 1: Screening Interview

• Step 2: Take-home Task

• Step 3: Successful candidates are admitted to our talent pool, gaining access to exclusive opportunities.

• Step 4: We match you with a client for a final interview.



Application Requirements:

1. Make sure the Subject of the application is the name of the Capital City of Canada otherwise your application won't be reviewed.

2. Share your Resume/CV and any relevant experience / projects you've worked on.

3. Send anything else that can set you apart!

title: Creative Content / Video Editor (Podcast & Content)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and creative Virtual Assistant with strong video editing skills to help transform raw video content into polished podcast episodes, clips, and visual content for online platforms. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working with podcasts, social media clips, and digital content creation, and who can take raw footage and turn it into finished content ready for publishing. The primary focus of this role is editing and preparing video content, with occasional support in organizing and repurposing content.



Primary Responsibilities:



1. Podcast & Long-Form Video Editing

* Edit full podcast episodes and other long-form videos for YouTube and other platforms

* Clean up audio, pacing, and transitions

* Add intro/outro, branding elements, lower thirds, and basic graphics if needed

* Ability to create trailer / highlight videos of filmed content



2. Content Repurposing

* Create short-form clips, reels, and highlight videos from long-form content

* Identify strong 
nts for social media snippets



3. Thumbnail Creation

* Design engaging YouTube thumbnails aligned with brand style



4. Video Polishing

* Color correction, sound leveling, and final formatting for publishing

* Export videos in appropriate formats for different platforms



5. Client Highlight Videos (Occasional)

* Edit highlight reels or social media clips for client projects when needed



Bonus Skills (Nice to Have)

* Ability to build or assist with funnels in GoHighLevel

* Ability to create automated workflows in GoHighlevel

* Ability to convert video content into:

1. blog posts

2. newsletters

3. show notes

* Understanding of YouTube optimization (titles, tags, descriptions)



Ideal Candidate

 * Experienced with tools like DaVinci Resolve, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, CapCut, or similar

* Organized and able to manage multiple video projects

* Able to follow brand style and editing guidelines

* Comfortable working remotely and communicating clearly

* Has experience editing podcasts, YouTube content and film content





To fast track your application, please submit the following information:

Resume: A link to your Google Drive. Please ensure the sharing setting is set to "Anyone with the link."



IMPORTANT REMINDER: To advance in the screening process, you must submit the Podio Form. Timely completion is essential to guarantee your application receives prompt attention.



Podio Form Link: 
/webforms/
/

title: Appointment Setter
description:
Talent Scout (Creator Acquisition) – Remote



We are looking for motivated individuals to join our team as Talent Scouts, helping us discover and connect with rising online creators.



Your role will be to identify creators on platforms like Instagram, TikTok, Youtube and more, and introduce them to an opportunity to grow their audience and monetize their content more effectively.



This is a fully remote, performance-based position with flexible hours.



---



What You’ll Do



* Search for creators on various platforms

* Start conversations with creators through direct messages

* Identify creators who are a good fit for our program

* Introduce them to our opportunity

* Book qualified calls with our team



You will receive training, scripts, and a clear acquisition systems to follow.



---



Compensation



$20 for every qualified appointment booked



Appointments must meet the creator requirements and attend the scheduled call.



High performers receive additional bonuses opportunities.



---



What We’re Looking For



* Clear and confident communication

* Comfortable messaging people online

* Organized and able to track conversations

* Reliable and able to follow a system

* Strong work ethic



Experience with social media outreach or appointment setting is helpful, but not required.



---



How to Apply



Send a short message including:



* Why you are interested in this role

* Any experience you have with social media or outreach

* Your availability



Selected applicants will receive access to our onboarding materials and training system.

title: Customer Support Assistant (Remote) 1 AM – 9 AM
description:
Please ready the description from top to bottom before you apply.



Customer Support Assistant (Remote) – Swedish E-Commerce Company



We are a Swedish company looking for a reliable and dedicated Customer Support Assistant to help us manage customer
s for several different brands. We are looking for someone available to work 1:00 AM – 9:00 AM Philippine time (7:00 PM – 3:00 AM Swedish time), ensuring continuous coverage during our evening hours. 



You will respond to inquiries in multiple languages using the translation tool 
.



Most customer questions will be related to:



Order status (“Where is my delivery?”)



Orders not received



Products not as expected



Returns and exchanges



General questions about the brand



You will work closely with our agents in China who handle packaging and shipping, as well as directly with our payment providers to resolve customer issues without needing our constant assistance.



What We Expect From You



A fast learner who is driven, organized, and detail-oriented



Someone who is willing to work consistently every day



A patient and polite communicator, even with difficult customers



A problem solver who always tries to fix issues before asking for help



Someone who always finishes what they start



Someone who is technical, consistent, hardworking, and always looking to improve



Strong English speaking and writing skills



Experience with
 customer support and Shopify



Work Schedule



5-7 days a week



Approximately 8-12 hours per day (between 10 AM – 5 PM Swedish time)



Future Opportunities



You should be willing and excited to learn new skills. Soon, you may also take on tasks such as:



Finding viral products



Searching for ad videos



Editing ad creatives



Writing ad copy



Building simple websites



Creating product descriptions



Communicating with UGC creators and influencers



Experience in these areas is a plus, but not required—we will train you to do them well.



Salary



5 SEK per hour



How to Apply



Please share:



A brief introduction about yourself



What you are currently doing



Your ambitions



Your relevant experience



How to Apply: Please send a message with the headline " CUSTOMER SUPPORT 1 AM – 9 AM "



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Community & Account Manager
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented and proactive Community & Account Manager to support our growing social platform. This role will focus on managing multiple accounts, creating engaging content, and ensuring timely interaction within the app.



About the Role

You will be responsible for managing accounts used to seed and grow activity on the platform. Your goal is to help create a natural, engaging, and welcoming environment for users by posting relevant content, responding quickly, and monitoring overall engagement.



Key Responsibilities

Manage and monitor multiple accounts daily

Create and schedule draft posts based on content guidelines

Ensure posts are clear, engaging, and aligned with target topics (e.g., social activities, food, sports, hobbies)

Respond to messages and interactions in a timely manner

Track and monitor engagement across posts and accounts

Identify what content performs well and provide feedback to improve strategy

Maintain consistency in tone, quality, and activity across all accounts



What We’re Looking For

Highly responsive and able to reply quickly during shifts

Ability to think creatively and come up with relatable, real-life post ideas

Detail-oriented and able to manage multiple accounts at once

Comfortable following guidelines while also using initiative



Nice to Have

Familiarity with Reddit,
 groups, or online communities

Experience managing multiple personas or accounts

Understanding of what makes content engaging and relatable



How to Apply: 





Please make sure to submit your application via the form above.
