title: Virtual Assistant - Loan Servicing
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

The Special Assets Default Support Specialist provides comprehensive operational support for the referral, bidding, monitoring, and resolution of defaulted assets within the Special Assets Department. This role serves as a critical quality control checkpoint throughout the foreclosure lifecycle — ensuring that all referral packages, financial calculations, legal documents, and pre-sale compliance requirements meet Dominion Financial Services' standards before submission to foreclosure counsel, document executors, and other internal and external stakeholders.



In addition to core foreclosure support responsibilities, this position assists with various departmental projects and initiatives as directed by the Director of Special Assets, contributing to the overall efficiency and effectiveness of the default management operation.



ESSENTIAL DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES



Foreclosure Referral Quality Assurance

- Conduct thorough validation of approved foreclosure referrals to confirm eligibility review accuracy prior to referral to foreclosure counsel, ensuring all prerequisite conditions have been satisfied and documented in accordance with company policies and applicable regulatory requirements.

- Verify the accuracy and completeness of all financial figures required in the foreclosure process — including unpaid principal balance, accrued interest, per diem calculations, late charges, fees, corporate advances, escrow shortages, and total amounts due — by performing a detailed quality review prior to submission to foreclosure counsel.

- Source, compile, and transmit all required documents to foreclosure counsel in a timely and organized manner, ensuring referral packages are complete and conform to jurisdictional requirements.



Pre-Sale and Document Quality Control

- Conduct quality reviews of pre-sale checklists to confirm that all scheduled foreclosure sales meet applicable compliance guidelines, internal policies, and state-specific procedural requirements.

- Verify the accuracy and legal sufficiency of foreclosure documents prepared by foreclosure counsel prior to submission to the designated document executor, identifying and escalating any discrepancies, errors, or omissions for correction before forwarding for execution.



Operational Reporting and Workflow Management

- Manage operational and exception reports to monitor workflow status, track key milestones across the default asset portfolio.

- Prioritize and manage assigned work to ensure timely, accurate resolutions for both internal departments and external partners, including foreclosure counsel, document custodians, and other service providers.



Compliance and Policy Adherence

- Adhere strictly to all departmental and company policies, procedures, and regulatory requirements, maintaining full compliance at all times.

- Maintain the confidentiality and security of all sensitive borrower, loan, and property information in accordance with company information security policies and applicable privacy regulations.

title: AI Video Content Creator
description:
AI Video Content Creator (Freelance / Remote)



We are looking for a skilled AI Video Content Creator to produce high-performing product videos across multiple e-commerce categories.



About the Role



In this role, you will turn static product images into engaging, scroll-stopping video creatives using AI tools and editing techniques. Your work will directly contribute to paid advertising performance, meaning your videos should not only look good, but they should also drive clicks, engagement, and conversions.



You will work closely with our team to develop and iterate creatives, testing different hooks, formats, and styles to continuously improve results.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Transform product images into dynamic AI-generated videos 

• Create both: 

o Ad creatives focused on performance (hooks, problem/solution, benefits) 

o UGC-style videos that feel native and authentic to platforms like TikTok and Instagram 

• Experiment with different creative angles, hooks, and storytelling formats 

• Produce multiple variations of each concept for A/B testing 

• Optimize videos for social platforms (aspect ratios, pacing, subtitles, etc.) 

• Stay up to date with trends in AI video, UGC, and performance marketing 



Requirements

• Experience with AI video tools (e.g. Runway, Pika, Sora, or similar) 

• Strong understanding of direct response / performance marketing 

• Ability to create strong hooks in the first 1–3 seconds 

• Experience with UGC-style formats and storytelling 

• Solid editing skills (cuts, pacing, captions, sound design) 

• Ability to work independently and iterate quickly 



Nice to Have

• Experience in e-commerce brands or agencies 

• Familiarity with Meta Ads and TikTok Ads creative best practices 

• Basic copywriting skills (hooks, headlines, captions) 

• Experience testing and optimizing creatives based on performance 



What We Offer

• Opportunity to scale into part-time or full-time work

• Fast feedback and clear creative direction

• Opportunity to work across multiple product categories

• A performance-driven environment where your work directly impacts results



Trial Assignment



As part of the selection process, you will complete a short trial assignment:

• Create videos for: 

o Treadmills 

o Cross trainers 

• We provide all product images via a shared drive 

• The instructions will also be provided via the drive

• The focus is on how well you can turn static assets into compelling video ads

title: Remote Manual Poster – Viral Content Promotion (Fully Remote)
description:
Remote Manual Poster – Instagram Only (Fully Remote)

Position: Manual Instagram Poster (Contract / Performance-Based)

Location: 100% Remote (Worldwide)

Type: Flexible hours

Compensation: $1 per hour base pay + uncapped viral incentives

About the Role

We’re looking for reliable and disciplined manual posters whose only job is to post content on Instagram.

The content (photos, carousels, Reels, captions, and hashtags) will be provided to you daily. You simply log in, post at the right time, and help the content get maximum reach. No content creation required.

Because we provide access to our phone farm, this entire job can be done comfortably from your MacBook. You won’t need multiple phones or any special setup — just your MacBook and a stable internet connection.

If you’re detail-oriented, patient, and consistent, this is an easy way to earn extra money.



What You’ll Do

Log into our web-based dashboard on your MacBook

Manually post the ready-made content on Instagram (feed posts, Stories, Reels)

Post at exact scheduled times using our phone farm access

Add any final tweaks to hashtags or location tags if instructed

Reply to some comments when needed

Track basic performance and report daily



Your only responsibility is posting on Instagram — nothing else.

Pay Structure



Base Pay: $1 per account made (tracked via our dashboard)

Viral Incentives:

$20 bonus if a post reaches 500k+ impressions

$50 bonus if a post reaches 1M+ impressions or trends

$100 bonus for major virality (5M+ impressions)

Weekly performance pool for top posters

Bonuses are paid quickly when milestones are hit.



Requirements

You must have a MacBook (any recent model is fine).

The job runs entirely through our MacBook-compatible dashboard and phone farm access. Without a MacBook you cannot access the system.

Stable, fast internet connection

Reliable and disciplined — you must show up for your scheduled hours

Basic English skills and attention to detail

Ability to follow instructions precisely



No prior experience required — we’ll train you on our exact Instagram posting process.



Why Join Us?

Work 100% remotely from anywhere (as long as you have your MacBook)

Super simple role: just post the content we give you on Instagram

Low hourly rate with real upside from viral bonuses

Full training provided

Flexible schedule — choose your own hours

We handle all the technical setup via our phone farm

title: AI Automation Specialist (n8n / AI Video Workflow)
description:
We are looking for an AI Automation Specialist to build a custom AI workflow for our health content brand.



This is a project-based role, not a full-time position.



Your task is to build an automated system that analyzes competitor videos and recreates similar videos using our own AI avatar in German.



The goal is to create a scalable AI content pipeline for social media videos.



Project Overview



We want to automate the process of creating short-form health videos.



The workflow should take a competitor video, analyze it, and automatically prepare everything needed to generate a new video using our own AI avatar.



The system should handle:



Video transcription



Script segmentation into ~8 second scenes



German script adaptation



Motion / gesture prompts for the avatar



Scene prompts for AI video generation



The output should be ready-to-generate scenes for AI video tools like Google Flow or similar.



Example Workflow



Step 1 — Input

Competitor video file or link (TikTok / Instagram / YouTube)



Step 2 — Transcription

Use AI transcription (Whisper, Deepgram, etc.)



Step 3 — Scene segmentation

Split the script into ~8 second segments



Step 4 — Script processing

Rewrite the script in German while keeping the same structure and pacing.



Step 5 — Prompt generation

For each scene generate:



• German spoken script

• avatar gestures

• camera framing

• emotion / tone

• motion prompts



Example output:



Scene 1

Script:

"Viele Menschen denken ihre Verdauungsprobleme kommen nur vom Essen..."



Motion prompt:

Medium shot, avatar speaking to camera, slight hand gestures, calm explanatory tone.



Duration: 8 seconds



Step 6 — Export

Structured output ready for AI video generation tools (Google Flow, etc.)



Tools / Technologies



We prefer workflows built with:



• n8n (preferred)

• OpenAI / Claude / Gemini APIs

• Whisper or similar transcription tools

• AI prompt engineering

• API integrations



Optional experience:



• AI avatar video tools

• Google Flow / Veo / Sora

• TikTok video automation pipelines



Deliverables



You will deliver:



• Fully working automation workflow (n8n or similar)

• Scene segmentation logic

• Prompt generation system

• Structured output for AI video generation

• Documentation so our team can use the workflow

title: Property Management Support
description:
Job Description - Property Management Support



We are looking for someone to join the Moorview Lets team in the Property Management Support role. This role will work closely with the Property Managers within the business, to deliver 5* service to both tenants and landlords.



PLEASE NOTE WE WILL ONLY CONSIDER APPLICANTS WHO HAVE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT EXPERIENCE, SPECIFICALLY DEALING WITH MAINTENANCE TASKS.



The ideal candidate will be highly organised, detail-orientated, with an excellent
 manner and high standards for their work.

The ideal candidate should be proficient at using IT and be able to use tools like MS Office and the Google suite of products.



Responsibilities

* Work daily through your assigned tasks to move them forward, close them out, or get more information from tenants

* Liaise with tenants, landlords and contractors to efficiently triage/diagnose and resolve maintenance tasks

* Switch easily between planned and reactive maintenance items

* Take ownership for a portfolio of properties

* Keep excellent records on our property management system 'COHO'

* Update core KPIs with commentary 

* Approve invoices for works and send these for payment

* Work closely with other parts of the business (e.g. onboarding, sales and finance)

* Other administrative duties as required by the Property Managers



Requirements

* Property management experience (specifically maintenance management) is essential

* Proficiency in MS Office (MS Excel and MS Powerpoint in particular) and using Google Suite

* Excellent time management skills and ability to prioritise work

* Attention to detail and problem solving skills

* Excellent written and verbal communication skills

* Strong organisational skills and ability to multi-task

* Ability to triage and prioritise maintenance tasks

* Flexible with a 'can do' attitude and growth mindset, prepared to take on new challenges.



What we can offer you

As a company we believe in creating a working environment where people feel cared for, safe and have opportunities to develop their skills. We welcome open and honest communication in the business to enable transparent understanding of the working environment. Collaboratively we support each other to improve and in doing so we encourage a strong challenge and support model in day to day tasks and events to accelerate personal development and business growth.

To this end we have an open working style which is friendly and fun but also professional. Alongside our commitment to keep the team healthy and safe, we also believe passionately in providing opportunities within the company for people to develop their skills and knowledge.



Working Pattern: Full time, Mon-Friday, 9am-5pm UK time (with an hour for lunch)



Holidays: 15 days per year + UK Bank Holidays

title: Finance Operations Coordinator
description:
About DLUX (Our eCommerce Marketing Agency)

DLUX is a performance marketing agency for luxury and premium brands, rebuilding as an AI-native, agentic platform. We're a small, lean team moving fast. We automate everything we can — and we need people who thrive in that environment, not fight it. This role replaces our current bookkeeper and absorbs the transactional finance work currently split across multiple people. You will be the daily engine that keeps our financial operations clean, current, and reliable.



What You'll Own

High-trust, high-volume execution. You keep the books clean and the numbers current every single day. Things happen on schedule because you made them happen.



Daily

Actualize the cash flow — update actuals from bank feed, map all transactions, confirm everything clears correctly

Reconcile accounts in QuickBooks — all transactions entered, matched, and categorized within 24 hours

Update receivables and payables in cash flow as invoices are sent and confirmed

Send end-of-day summary to leadership — cash position, what moved, what needs attention



Weekly

Reconcile all transactions — payroll and non-payroll

Keep billing log current — any new client, churn, or change updated same day

Track all contracts — confirm billing terms match invoices going out

Receivables follow-up — chase outstanding invoices on a set twice-weekly cadence without being asked

Send invoices on schedule

Record payments in accounts as they arrive and send receipts to clients

Confirm budget is flowing correctly to cash flow



Bi-Weekly & Monthly 

Manage contractor invoice processing — match to time logs, prepare approval summaries for leadership, and stage approved payments for processing

Confirm payroll amount posted correctly in accounts and reconcile

Allocate all people costs to clients and divisions by revenue class



Weekly/Monthly

Import invoices into accounts — handle any manual adjustments

Track contractor payments — keep list current and accurate

Track software and services — update payment methods, reconcile against actual charges

Flag anything that does not reconcile for senior finance review



Who You Are

Based in the Philippines — available during US Pacific business hours

Finance Minimum 3 years bookkeeping or accounting operations experience

QuickBooks Online proficient — not learning, already using it daily

Strong written English — your end-of-day summary needs to be clear and concise

Detail-obsessed — you notice when something is off and fix it before anyone asks

Not intimidated by automation — you work alongside systems, not against them

Responsive and reliable — this role requires daily execution without hand-holding



What You Don't Need to Do

1. Prepare the monthly financial package — senior finance handles this

2. QA your own work at a senior level — reviewed monthly by senior finance

3. Handle tax filings or compliance

4. Draft or manage contracts — operations team



Quarterly bonus: $150–400 per quarter based on KPI performance.



In order to be considered for the role, you must review this job description fully:

title: Hubspot Expert

We are searching for a proactive, highly organized HubSpot Expert to support and strengthen our marketing operations across multiple projects and brands. This role goes beyond platform management. You'll take ownership of our HubSpot ecosystem, ensure smooth execution across campaigns, and support data-driven decision making for a portfolio of fast-moving businesses.



The ideal candidate is independent, detail-oriented, and highly accountable, with a strong command of HubSpot's CRM, workflow automation, and reporting capabilities. If you thrive in a dynamic, multi-brand environment and love turning messy processes into clean, scalable systems, we'd love to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities

_CRM Management: Own and maintain the HubSpot CRM across multiple brands, ensuring data integrity, accurate segmentation, and clean contact and company records.

_Workflow & Automation: Design, build, and continuously optimize automated workflows for lead nurturing, deal progression, task assignments, and internal notifications.

_Pipeline Management: Set up and manage sales pipelines, deal stages, and custom properties aligned with each brand's unique sales process.

_Integrations: Configure and manage integrations between HubSpot and third-party tools (e.g., Slack, Zapier,
 platforms, and other MarTech solutions).

_Reporting & Dashboards: Build custom reports and dashboards to track KPIs across marketing, sales, and customer success and translate that data into actionable insights.


 Marketing: Create and manage
 campaigns, sequences, and templates that drive engagement and support funnel progression.

_User Training & Support: Onboard tea
mbers across brands to HubSpot and provide ongoing guidance on best practices and platform updates.

_Process Improvement: Regularly audit existing setups, identify inefficiencies, and implement improvements to keep operations running at peak performance.



Requirements

_3–5 years of hands-on HubSpot experience across Marketing Hub, Sales Hub, and/or Service Hub.

_Proven track record building workflows and automation that drive real business outcomes.

_Strong understanding of CRM best practices, including data hygiene, contact segmentation, and lifecycle stage management.

_Experience managing HubSpot integrations with third-party tools via native connectors or Zapier.

_Ability to build custom reports and dashboards that support strategic, data-driven decisions.

_HubSpot certifications (e.g., HubSpot Marketing Software, CRM, Sales Hub) are a strong plus.

_Solid understanding of sales and marketing funnels in a B2B or SaaS context.

_Strong analytical mindset with excellent problem-solving skills.

_Clear, confident communicator who can collaborate across multiple teams and brands simultaneously.



Nice to Have

_Experience with HubSpot Operations Hub (data sync, custom coded actions).

_Familiarity with HTML/CSS for
 and landing page customization.

_Background in digital marketing, sales operations, or revenue operations (RevOps).

_Prior experience working within an agency, incubator, or multi-brand environment.

title: Crypto Alpha Research & Chart Designer
description:
We're looking for a new Chart Designer for our X 
 most important part of this role is design. Every chart you create should look clean, visually striking, and easy to read. Only the key information should be highlighted. Using the right colors, the right timeframe, the right indicators, and the right chart positioning. Every chart should feel like a piece of art.



Think of it as being a graphic designer, but specifically for financial charts.





The second priority is alpha. You should always stay on top of the latest market alpha. Follow all the top accounts, catch alpha early from smaller accounts, and recreate charts in your own original way, but better.





Focus Areas: Bitcoin, Stocks, Gold, Oil, and occasionally Altcoins.





The Formula:

Visually Attractive Chart + Great Alpha + Being First/Quick = Going Viral



Going viral is the end goal. The formula above is the process. You should have mastered every step of it.

title: Creative Research & Brand Operator (Personal Brand)
description:
Creative Research & Brand Operator (Personal Brand)

Starting 27,000/month Peso | Full-time | Long-term



APPLY HERE:





We're building a founder-led personal brand from the ground up—and we need someone who thinks like a brand strategist, not just a content poster.

This isn't about chasing trends or going viral. It's about understanding what makes great founder content work, refining voice and positioning, and turning raw ideas into clear, consistent content that actually resonates.

If you're obsessed with how the best founders show up online and want to learn brand-building properly, this role is for you.



What You'll Do:

> Social Media Research & Brand Intelligence (Your Core Focus)

- Study high-performing personal brands (founders, operators, creators)

- Break down what makes their content work: themes, messaging patterns, narrative angles, tone, positioning

- Identify what resonates organically (not surface-level trends)

- Build research summaries and idea banks

- Help refine the founder's messaging to stay clear, differentiated, and authentic

> Brand & Creative Direction Support

- Translate the founder's thoughts into structured content ideas

- Maintain consistency in tone, voice, and positioning across all platforms

- Shape how stories, opinions, and ideas are presented

- Think in terms of brand narrative, not just individual posts

> Content Creation (Execution Layer)

- Create Instagram carousel posts (clean, minimal, on-brand design)

- Structure content outlines and write captions

- Edit short-form videos for social media (authentic, founder-style—not overly produced)

- Basic long-form video editing using Descript (cuts, clarity, captions)

> Growth Tracking & Feedback Loops

- Track organic performance: reach, saves, follows, engagement

- Maintain content logs and tracking sheets

- Identify patterns in what performs well

- Use insights to inform future creative decisions (not just report numbers)



What This Role Is NOT:

? Not a senior creative director role (yet—but you can grow into it)

? Not about "going viral" or influencer tactics

? Not a generic social media VA position

? Not a plug-and-play content scheduler

This is a thinking-heavy role for someone who wants to learn brand-building properly.



You're the right fit if you:

- Are obsessed with personal brands and how founders build them

- Have strong taste and attention to detail

- Enjoy research, pattern recognition, and synthesis

- Want to grow into a senior creative/brand role over time

- Can work independently while staying aligned with brand vision



Compensation & Growth:

27,000/month starting rate

Philippine Work-hours

Performance-based raises after 60–90 days

Clear growth path to higher responsibility and pay as the brand scales

Long-term role (not project-based)



APPLY HERE:

title: Python Test Reviewer (Remote, Flexible Hours)
description:
Parsewave builds structured evaluation pipelines for software tasks. We generate short, well-defined coding tasks paired with pytest test suites and need human reviewers to validate that the tests are correct, complete, and functional.

You'll read a task description and its corresponding pytest tests, then verify the tests actually check the expected behavior. Flag issues like missing edge cases, incorrect assertions, or tests that would pass on wrong implementations. No code writing, no solving tasks, you are the quality check.



Requirements:

Working knowledge of Python

Familiarity with pytest (assertions, fixtures, parametrize)

Strong attention to detail

Reliable internet and availability to complete tasks on time



Pay is $7 per task reviewed. Based on our existing contributors, this works out to roughly $35–50/hr depending on speed. Strong performers get their review cap removed and are offered longer-term, better-paying contributor contracts.



Apply here:

title: Operations Systems Builder — Client Delivery (Contractual)
description:
AiDus is a Fractional COO service that builds and staffs growth operations for service-based businesses using trained Filipino ops teams. We come in, audit what's broken, build the entire infrastructure — CRM, content engine, lead nurturing, SOPs, automations — place trained Filipino operators into those systems, and manage the whole thing.

You are the person who builds all of it.

What You'll Own

This is a client-facing delivery role. When a client signs, you take the audit blueprint and execute it — end to end. You build, you document, you train the VA team, and you make sure everything runs without the founder touching it.

Specifically:



Build and configure CRM pipelines (GoHighLevel is primary — experience here is non-negotiable)

Set up lead nurturing automations — DM follow-up,
 sequences, SMS pipelines

Build content ops infrastructure — scheduling systems, editing workflows, multi-platform distribution

Write SOPs and documented playbooks for every system you build so a VA can operate it independently

Onboard and train Filipino VA tea
mbers inside the systems you've built

Design and manage reporting dashboards (Google Sheets, Notion, or similar) so clients have full visibility without being in the weeds

Build and maintain automations across platforms (Make, Zapier, or similar)

Organize and manage 
 setups and integrations where needed



Who You Are



You've worked inside GoHighLevel — you know pipelines, automations, sub-accounts, and workflows. This is not a nice to have.

You don't just build systems — you document them so someone else can run them without you

You've trained or onboarded people into systems before, not just built the systems themselves

You have management experience — whether leading a small team, a group of VAs, or junior operators. You know what it means to be accountable not just for your own output but for the people executing inside the systems you build

You are detail-oriented and highly organized — this is critical because your role exists specifically to own what others cannot

You work autonomously in async environments and you flag problems before they become client issues

You are Filipino-based — you understand the work culture and can manage the ops team effectively

You communicate clearly and don't disappear when things get hard



Nice to Have



Experience in content ops — scheduling, repurposing, multi-platform distribution workflows

Familiarity with wellness clinics, med spas, or service-based businesses

Experience working inside a Fractional COO firm, agency, or client delivery environment



Compensation

This is a contractual role, paid in Philippine Peso (PHP). Rate is based on experience and will be discussed during the interview.

This isn't a ceiling. As you grow in the role and demonstrate the ability to take on more clients independently, your compensation and scope grow with it. The right person will be building toward a recurring, expanding role — not staying static.



To Apply

title: Content Researcher
description:
Content Researcher

Location: Remote | Type: Full-Time



About Us

Surround Sound Labs is a fast-growing creative agency helping top consumer brands scale on Meta. We move fast, push creative boundaries, and pride ourselves on producing work that not only looks world-class but also drives performance.



The Role

Reports to: Creative Strategist

Supports: Creative Strategist, Designer, Video Editor



You’ll play a key supporting role in the creative process - handling research, organization, and inspiration that fuel creative direction and client strategy. Your work keeps projects informed, structured, and ready for high-impact execution.



What You’ll Do

- Support client onboarding by gathering brand assets, competitor ads, and market insights.

- Source top-performing ad examples using tools like Foreplay, Kalodata, and Meta Ad Library.

- Identify and categorize creative angles, trends, and styles that inform new concepts.

- Keep ad inspo, creator lists, and reports clean and organized in ClickUp or Sheets.

- Compile “Voice of Customer” insights from reviews, Reddit, and TikTok.

- Maintain databases for ad inspo, creator lists, and creative reports.

- Assist in preparing creative performance trackers and weekly reports.

- Draft creative insights summaries (“Top Ads,” “Underperformers,” “New Test Ideas”) for strategist review.



What We’re Looking For

- 2–4+ years of experience in marketing research, creative strategy, or paid social.

- Strong command of tools like Foreplay, Kalodata, and Various Ad Library.

- Excellent pattern recognition - able to spot what makes ads work.

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and self-sufficient.

- English-proficient and up-to-date with trends in DTC and social media advertising.



Bonus Qualifications

- Familiarity with US DTC brands and paid social performance metrics.

- Experience building inspiration decks or creative reports.

- Understanding of UGC and influencer-driven ad creative.



Why Apply for Surround Sound Labs

- Work directly with top U.S. DTC brands and talented creators.

- Gain exposure to performance-driven creative strategy.

- Fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment with room to grow into leadership.

- Competitive compensation (flexible depending on experience and location).



How to Apply

Send your application to 



Please indicate on your application

- Your resume or LinkedIn profile

- A short note on your past influencer campaign experience

- In the subject line of your
 please include RESE

- Previous experience with e-commerce / DTC brands

description:

Industry: Commercial Real Estate Lead Generation

s, conversations, and leads generated.

description: We’re looking for a highly skilled video editor with proven experience in the health, supplement, or performance niche (ideally familiar with TRT-style audiences) to create short-form ads for Meta. title: Digital Marketing & Paid Media Specialist, Media Buyer
description:
About Empire Creative Marketing



Empire Creative Marketing is a full-service marketing agency specializing in strategic, high-performance marketing for industrial, B2B, and professional service companies. We are known for delivering measurable results through data-driven strategies, compelling creative, and integrated digital campaigns.



We are seeking a highly skilled, full-time Virtual Assistant with deep expertise in digital marketing, paid media, and analytics. This is a senior-level execution role for someone who can manage campaigns end-to-end, think strategically, and deliver polished, client-ready work with minimal oversight.



Position Overview



The Digital Marketing & Paid Media Specialist will be responsible for planning, building, managing, and optimizing paid campaigns across Google and Meta platforms, while ensuring proper tracking, reporting, and performance optimization through GA4 and Google Tag Manager.



This role requires a strong combination of technical proficiency, analytical thinking, and creative execution, including the ability to design high-performing ad creatives using Canva.



Key Responsibilities:

• Paid Media Strategy & Execution

• Plan, launch, and manage paid campaigns across:

• Google Ads (Search, Display, Performance Max, YouTube)

• Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)

• Conduct keyword research, audience targeting, and competitive analysis

• Build campaign structures aligned with funnel strategy and client goals

• Continuously optimize campaigns for performance (CTR, CPC, CPA, ROAS)



Google Ads Management: 

• Create and manage search, display, and retargeting campaigns

• Write high-converting ad copy aligned with brand voice

• Optimize bidding strategies, budgets, and targeting

• Monitor Quality Scores and improve ad relevance



Meta Ads Management:

• Build and manage campaigns inside Meta Ads Manager

• Develop audience segments (cold, warm, retargeting, lookalikes)

• Test creative variations and messaging

• Optimize for conversions, leads, and engagement

• Tracking, Analytics & Data Integrity

• Set up and manage Google Tag Manager (GTM)



Implement and troubleshoot tracking for:

• Conversion events

• Pixels (Meta, Google)

• Form submissions, calls, and key actions

• Configure and manage Google Analytics 4 (GA4)

• Ensure accurate attribution and data flow across platforms

• Reporting & Performance Analysis

• Analyze campaign performance and identify optimization opportunities

• Create clear, client-ready performance reports (weekly/monthly)

• Translate data into actionable insights and recommendations



Monitor KPIs such as:

• Cost per lead (CPL)

• Conversion rate

• Return on ad spend (ROAS)



Creative Development:

• Design high-performing ad creatives using Canva, including: Social media ads, Display ads, Variations for A/B testing

• Collaborate with strategy team to align visuals with messaging

• Ensure all creative meets brand standards and campaign objectives

• Landing Page design and development 

• Collaborate on landing page strategy to improve conversions



Provide recommendations for:

• Messaging

• UX/UI improvements

• Conversion optimization



Required Qualifications:

• 3–5+ years of experience in digital marketing and paid media management

• Proven expertise in: Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager, Google Tag Manager (GTM), Google Analytics 4 (GA4)

• Strong understanding of conversion tracking and attribution models

• Experience designing ad creatives in Canva

• Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple campaigns simultaneously



Preferred Qualifications:

• Experience working in a digital marketing agency environment

• Familiarity with B2B and industrial marketing

• Experience with landing page platforms (WordPress, HubSpot, or similar)

• Knowledge of CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization) best practices

• Experience with Looker Studio or other reporting dashboards



Key Traits for Success:

• Detail-oriented and highly organized

• Data-driven decision maker

• Proactive problem solver

• Strong sense of ownership and accountability

• Ability to execute quickly without sacrificing quality



What Success Looks Like:

• Campaigns are launched efficiently and perform above benchmarks for multiple clients

• Tracking and analytics are accurate and reliable

• Consistent improvement in lead quality and cost efficiency

• Clear, professional reporting that clients can easily understand

• Creative assets that drive engagement and conversions

title: Detail Detective – Video Transaction Reviewer
description:
Job Summary

The Transaction Auditor is responsible for accurately processing customer purchase transactions across all market locations. This role involves reviewing video footage to verify items taken, encoding items into the system with correct quantities, and ensuring that all daily transactions are completed with precision and consistency.



This position requires strong attention to detail, high levels of focus, patience for repetitive tasks, and a strong sense of accountability.



Key Responsibilities

- Review video footage to verify customer purchases.

- Identify items taken and accurately encode them into the system, including correct quantities.

- Process transactions efficiently, averaging 1 to 2 minutes per transaction.

- Ensure all transactions for the assigned shift or day are completed.

- Flag inconsistencies, discrepancies, and any other i
.

- Escalate and report irregularities, suspicious activity, or system issues promptly.

- Maintain high accuracy levels, especially when distinguishing between similar-looking items.

- Ensure consistent attendance and availability during assigned working hours.

- Follow established procedures and maintain confidentiality of footage and transaction data.





Qualifications

- High attention to detail and strong visual accuracy.

- Ability to maintain focus for extended periods.

- Patient and comfortable performing repetitive tasks throughout the day.

- Strong sense of responsibility and commitment to completing daily workload.

- Ability to detect inconsistencies and exercise sound judgment.

- Basic computer proficiency and ability to quickly learn transaction systems.

- Strong integrity and reliability.

- Good written and verbal communication skills for reporting issues.

- Must demonstrate consistent attendance and punctuality.





Preferred Attributes

- Experience in transaction processing, auditing, or retail operations is an advantage.

title: Web Designer
description:
Webflow Designer / Developer (High-End Agency Website)



About Us:

We are a creative marketing agency based in Dallas–Fort Worth, working with personal brands to create high-impact content, branding, and digital experiences. We build clean, premium, story-driven brands that feel intentional and elevated.



We’re looking for a Webflow expert who can help us bring that same level of quality to our own website.

We want someone who can design and build a beautiful, modern, interactive website in Webflow—not just something that looks good, but something that feels different.



Think:

Minimal, premium, high-end design

Smooth interactions and subtle animations

Strong UX that guides users clearly

StoryBrand-style messaging flow (clear problem ? solution ? transformation)

We want something that stands out immediately.



Your Role:

Design and build our full website in Webflow

Translate our brand, services, and messaging into a clean, compelling user experience

Create page layouts that feel structured, intentional, and conversion-focused

Implement animations/interactions that elevate (not distract)

Ensure the site is fully responsive across all devices

Optimize for speed and performance

Collaborate with us on direction, feedback, and iteration

Experience with animations/interactions in Webflow

Ability to take direction and also bring creative ideas



Bonus Points:

Experience working with creative agencies or personal brands

Understanding of StoryBrand or marketing-driven websites

Ability to help refine messaging/layout (not just design)

Experience with CMS setup in Webflow



Project Scope:

8-10 core pages (Home, About, Services, Portfolio, etc.)

Custom design (not template-based)

Interactive elements and animations

Mobile optimization

Clean, scalable structure for future updates

Compensation



We are open to:

Fixed project rate

Or milestone-based payments



To apply,
 
 :

Your best 3 Websites (must be live)

Your role in each project

Your estimated timeline

Your expected rate

The word “Motive” at the top of your application (to show attention to detail)

Built in a way that we can scale and update easily

title: Supply Chain & Operations Manager
description:
We’re Botanopia, a young, fast-growing brand designing plant-inspired products for creative retailers around the world. Our products are stocked by independent gift shops, plant stores, concept stores, and museum shops across Europe and North America.



We’re looking for a motivated and experienced Supply Chain & Operations Manager to join our small, international team. You’ll play a crucial role in making sure our products are always in stock and our operations run smoothly across suppliers, warehouses, and markets.



?



*What you’ll do

 • Plan and manage inventory across multiple warehouses (EU & US)

 • Forecast demand and ensure we don’t run out of stock

 • Reorder finished products and components from our manufacturing partners

 • Manage production timelines and follow up proactively with suppliers

 • Coordinate shipments (mainly ocean freight / LCL) between suppliers, manufacturers, and warehouses

 • Arrange transport and ensure shipments arrive on time and as expected

 • Actively follow up with warehouses, suppliers, and carriers — and step in when things don’t go as planned

 • Identify risks early (delays, low stock, production issues) and take action before they become problems

 • Keep systems (Odoo, spreadsheets, etc.) organized and up to date



???? Your main goal: we don’t run out of stock



?



*What we’re looking for

 • Proven experience in inventory planning, supply chain, or operations

 • Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

 • Assertive and confident — you’re comfortable pushing suppliers, warehouses, and partners to get things done

 • Proactive mindset — you don’t wait for problems, you anticipate and solve them

 • Comfortable working in English in a fully remote setup



Bonus:

 • Experience with ecommerce (WooCommerce, Faire)

 • Experience with ERP systems (Odoo or similar)

 • Experience working with international shipping and long lead times



?



*Details

 • Full time (40 hrs/week)

 • Fully remote (the entire team is fully remote too).

 • Working hours: approximately 8:00 – 17:00 (Netherlands time), with occasional flexibility for US coordination

 • Directly working with the CEO and our current Operations and Manufacturing Specialist

 • Salary depends on experience and will reflect the level of ownership and responsibility in the role.



?



*Why join us?

 • Be part of a small but ambitious brand with a global reach

 • Have a direct impact on how our operations scale and improve

 • Work closely with the founder and play a key role in decision-making

 • Help build a more structured, reliable, and efficient supply chain



?



Additional Benefits

 • Training and education budget

 • Salary increase based on performance



?

?

title: Revenue Manager
description:
Revenue Manager – Short-Term Rental Portfolio

Full-Time | Remote | Structured Growth Role



We are building a performance-driven revenue management program under HostOp, serving multi-unit short-term rental operators (20–100+ listings across multiple markets).



We are hiring a highly analytical Revenue Manager to oversee pricing execution, reporting, and performance tracking across multiple portfolios.



This is a data-driven role. Not a general VA position.



***************



Core Responsibilities



* Execute dynamic pricing adjustments inside PriceLabs

* Monitor booking pace, occupancy, ADR, and RevPAR trends

* Analyze underperforming listings and adjust strategy

* Segment portfolios by market and optimize independently

* Pull and reconcile monthly revenue reports from Hostaway

* Maintain structured dashboards (Notion + reporting systems)

* Prepare monthly billing calculations (2.5% revenue model)

* Provide structured Slack performance updates to clients

* Identify risks and opportunities proactively



***************



Required Experience



* 2+ years working in STR revenue management

* Strong experience using PriceLabs (required)

* Experience using Hostaway or similar PMS (required)

* Strong understanding of ADR, Occupancy, RevPAR

* Advanced Excel / Google Sheets skills

* Strong written English communication

* Comfortable working with structured systems



Bonus:

* OTA background (Airbnb / 
)

* Multi-market portfolio experience



***************



Work Structure



* Full-time remote

* Slack-based communication

* Structured weekly cadence

* No reactive daily firefighting

* Performance-based growth path



***************



Compensation



Month 1: $1,200 USD Monthly (structured trial)

After 90 days: $1,500 USD Monthly upon strong execution and independent portfolio ownership



Clear path to managing multiple portfolios independently.



***************



To Apply



Please answer:

1. How many STR listings have you managed pricing for?

2. What pricing tools have you used? (PriceLabs required)

3. Explain ADR vs RevPAR in your own words.

4. How would you prioritize listings with low booking pace in March?

5. Provide screenshots of dashboards or reports you’ve built (if available).



Applications without detailed answers will not be reviewed.

We have hit a plateau and need a "Brains" partner who understands why content goes viral and how to stop the scroll.



We are looking for a specialist who can identify why people scroll past content and how to force them to follow and share.



Your Core Responsibilities:



1. YouTube Organic Growth:



Hook Engineering: Analyze raw video concepts to identify the most clickable "angle" for the thumbnail and title.



Thumbnail Design: Create 3 high-performance thumbnails per week. Must be expert-level Photoshop.



SEO Metadata: Write keyword-rich titles and "Show Notes" (descriptions) designed to rank in search and show up in "Suggested Videos."



2. Meta Organic Growth 
 & Instagram):



Pattern Interrupts: Design organic graphics and "Saveable" carousels for
 and 
 that stop the scroll and encourage shares.



Follower Acquisition: Implement strategies to break our current growth plateau and reach new audiences without ad spend.



Efficient Templating: Use Canva to produce on-brand IG Stories, Reels covers, and social updates that maintain a high-end look.



3. Content Strategy & Research:



Competitive Analysis: Research what is working for top creators in our niche and adapt those "hooks" for our brand.



Conversion Optimization: Ensure every organic post has a clear call-to-action that turns a viewer into a follower or a lead.



Requirements:



4. Conversion Assets & Offline Marketing



Lead Magnet & Workbook Design: Design multi-page, professional PDF workbooks, blueprints, and checklists that accompany our content.



Print-Ready Flyers: Create high-resolution promotional materials for offline events that maintain brand consistency.



Social Media Batching: Repurpose video hooks into graphics for Instagram, LinkedIn, and
 to maintain a 
-degree brand presence.



Expert Adobe Photoshop Skills: For high-end, psychological triggers in YouTube thumbnails.



Proficiency in Canva: For rapid asset creation and maintaining social media templates.



Proven Organic Growth Record: You can explain how you've helped an account grow its follower base through content strategy alone.



Excellent English & Copywriting: You must be able to write compelling, keyword-rich show notes and social captions.



How to Apply (The Filter): To be considered, please start your application with the phrase "Organic Brain Found." In your message, please include:



A link to your portfolio (specifically showing YouTube thumbnails and organic social media posts).



One sentence explaining a strategy you’ve used to help a stagnant account start growing followers organically again.



Our brand name, niche, and YouTube channel will be revealed to shortlisted candidates after an initial screening. We prioritize privacy and professionalism.

What You'll Be Working On:

 static ads across multiple client accounts

- Working from creative briefs, reference ads, and direct feedback — sometimes with heavy direction, sometimes with significant creative freedom

- Iterating quickly based on performance feedback and revisions

- Maintaining brand consistency across different clients and campaigns

- Meeting deadlines without compromising quality



What We're Looking For:



- A strong portfolio with real
/Instagram ad work (this is non-negotiable)

- Solid understanding of direct response design — you know what makes an ad convert, not just look good

- Proficiency in Figma and/or Photoshop

- Someone who takes feedback well and moves fast

Sharp attention to detail and strong communication



Nice to Have:



- Experience working in a performance marketing or paid social agency

- Familiarity with Meta's ad specs and guidelines



How to Apply:



- Send us a message with a link to your portfolio and a brief note on your experience designing
/Instagram ads.



- All applications are reviewed within 24 hours and we move fast — successful candidates can expect an offer within 3–5 working days. If you're the right fit, you won't be waiting long.

title: Faith-Based Appointment Setter & Outreach Coordinator
description:
About Us

We are a faith-based coaching business dedicated to helping women grow in purpose, clarity, and confidence through transformational coaching experiences. Our work is rooted in faith, integrity, and meaningful impact.

We are seeking someone who is not only skilled in communication and outreach, but who feels genuinely aligned with a mission-driven, faith-centered environment.



Position Overview

This role combines client outreach (appointment setting) and opportunity development (speaking + podcast pitching).

You will be responsible for building authentic relationships, initiating meaningful conversations, and guiding potential clients toward booking discovery calls (sales calls for paid coaching services).

This is a sales-focused role centered on connection, trust-building, and conversion—not just scheduling.

This is a part-time (approx. 25 hours/week), remote position with strong opportunity for growth as the company expands.



Key Responsibilities

1. Appointment Setting (Primary Focus)

Reach out to potential clients via DM,
, text, and phone calls

Engage in authentic, value-driven conversations with women interested in personal growth

Book qualified discovery calls (sales calls for paid coaching services) with women who are a strong fit

Confidently communicate with U.S.-based clients via phone and messaging

Ask thoughtful questions to ensure leads are aligned before booking

Follow up consistently with leads to nurture relationships and move them toward a decision

Track conversations, leads, and appointments in a CRM or tracking system



2. Outreach & Pitching (Secondary Focus)

Research and identify aligned corporate speaking opportunities

Pitch the founder for workshops, speaking engagements, and collaborations

Identify and pitch podcast interview opportunities

Send outreach
s and follow-ups to build relationships with event organizers and hosts



3. Brand Representation

Communicate in a tone aligned with a faith-based, purpose-driven brand

Represent the company with professionalism, warmth, and authenticity

Uphold company values in all outreach and communication



Time Allocation & Expectations

Approximately 65–70% of time focused on appointment setting

Approximately 30–35% of time focused on outreach and pitching

Weekly Targets:

4–6 qualified discovery calls per week (goal: 6)

15–25 outreach pitches per week



Qualifications

Required:

Exceptional written and spoken English communication skills

Ability to communicate clearly, confidently, and naturally in both voice and text

Comfortable speaking with U.S.-based clients via phone calls and messaging

Experience with outreach, sales conversations, or appointment setting (with a focus on conversion)

Ability to build genuine relationships (not transactional messaging)

Strong organization and follow-through

Alignment with a faith-based mission and values



Preferred:

Experience in coaching, personal development, or ministry-based businesses

Experience pitching for speaking engagements or podcasts

Familiarity with social media outreach (Instagram, LinkedIn, etc.)

Experience using a CRM or lead tracking system



What We’re Looking For

Someone who sees this as purpose-driven work, not just a job

Comfortable initiating conversations and guiding people toward a decision

Emotionally intelligent and able to connect on a deeper level

Strong communicator who can build trust quickly through voice and text

Proactive, resourceful, and results-oriented



Who This Is NOT For

Someone looking for a purely administrative or scheduling role

Someone uncomfortable with sales or guiding conversations toward a decision

Someone who struggles with clear, confident verbal communication

Someone who prefers scripts over genuine, human connection

Someone who needs constant direction instead of taking initiative



Compensation

$7/hour (25 hours/week)

$15 per showed + qualified discovery call (approved by manager)

Additional bonuses available for secured speaking engagements and podcast bookings



Growth Opportunity

This role has strong potential to grow into a Lead Outreach or Partnerships Manager as the company expands into corporate speaking, workshops, and media opportunities.



How to Apply

Please include the following:

A short introduction about yourself and why this mission resonates with you

Any relevant experience (especially outreach or sales)

A sample message you would send to start a conversation with a potential coaching client

A 1–2 minute voice recording answering the following:

“How would you start a conversation with a woman who is interested in coaching but unsure if it’s right for her?”



Next Step in Hiring Process

Selected candidates will be invited to a short live roleplay call to assess communication style, clarity, and conversational ability.

description:

Production Company | Commercial & Corporate Clients | California



We are a media production company serving commercial and corporate clients in California, producing high-quality visual content for brands, businesses, and marketing campaigns.



We are looking to expand our core editing team and are currently hiring for the following roles:



• Video Editor

• Graphic Designer



This will start as project-based work, with the opportunity to become a long-term part-time or full-time member of our core editing team.

Work Schedule

Good communication and responsiveness during work hours is very important.

title: Part-time Capcut / TikTok Editor with potential for more
description:
Hiring for part-time work for a Capcut / TikTok editor



You will be making TikTok videos using Capcut.  The editing process is fairly simple and straightforward.  Anyone who is proficient in video editing should have no problem with the basic tasks such as:



-Cutting dead space in talking head videos

-Adding overlay images on screen in the videos

-Minor effects such as dynamic zoom, cropping, etc.

-Producing b-roll content from voiceover and footage provided, having the ability to digest what is being said and pair up the audio with corresponding footage



Please review a few examples of my content to ensure you are familiar and comfortable with the editing style:



Basic talking head - here you are mostly editing dead space and piecing clips together, adding minor effects like crop and zoom to make the frames look more dynamic and seamless.







Talking head with overlays - same as before, but adding images provided to you on the screen to support what is being said in the video.







B-roll content - you will be provided a voice over and need to work through the footage to find fitting visuals. A strong understanding of English and social media content is crucial here.











You will be working hand in hand with me on an extremely viral social media page and there is room for bonuses if deadlines are met and the content performs well!



Requirements:

Attention to detail

STRONG English

Strong internet connection

Previous experience with Capcut / TikTok / Instagram

Good working with a team

Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

Availability to work 3-4h a day (with potential for more and increased salary)

Able to work 5-6 days per week (can take days off whenever as long as you are consistent and videos are being completed)

Can take payments through Wise

PH or similar time zone



$300-$400/month + bonuses for 3-4h a day MAX and potential full time work in the future with a salary increase.



To apply, please complete the recreate assignment below so I can see your skills (1h max)



Below is a Google drive with the original files you will need to re-create with a reference video:



Google drive: 



Please complete the following steps:

Footage: 



Voiceover:

Download the files and import into your video editing software

Find the “good” takes of the audio sections and stitch together to complete the voiceover

Find the corresponding footage to match what is being said in the voiceover

Pay close attention to detail in the selection of the clips, the pacing (duration of each scene), cropping, etc.

Message me with a link to the re-created video 



Talking Head:

Download the files and import into your video editing software

Cut out all dead space between videos

Each clip should flow smoothly into the next with minimal to no pause between words

Tip: cut the clip .2-.3 seconds shorter than the end of the word said.

Do not use transitions between clips, static clips only.

Message me a link to re-create video



Please Respond back to me beginning with the word “blue”

title: CRO Expert & SamCart Specialist — Food Content Brand
description:
About the Role

We're a food content brand selling digital cookbooks and we're looking for a CRO expert who knows how to build and optimize a high-converting sales funnel from scratch.

This is not a generalist marketing role. We need someone who lives in SamCart, understands the psychology of selling digital products, and has a proven track record of building checkout funnels, order bumps, and upsell flows specifically for ebooks or digital cookbooks.

If you've scaled digital product sales and have the conversion numbers to back it up — keep reading.



What You'll Do



Build our SamCart setup from the ground up — checkout pages, order bumps, and one-click upsell flows

Design bundle offers and pricing structures that maximize average order value

Write or advise on high-converting copy for sales pages, checkout pages, and upsell offers

Set up A/B tests from day one and use data to optimize over time

Build out thank you pages and post-purchase flows that drive repeat buyers

Analyze the full funnel as it grows and fix drop-off points fast

Report on conversion rates, AOV, and revenue impact clearly and regularly





You're the Right Fit If...



You have 3+ years of CRO experience with a specific focus on digital products — ebooks, cookbooks, or courses

You know SamCart deeply — you've built full setups from scratch, not just tweaked existing ones

You can show real conversion data from funnels you've built

You understand buyer psychology and know how to structure an offer that converts

You've worked in the food, recipe, or lifestyle content space — you understand the audience

You think in full funnels, not individual pages

You're detail-obsessed — bad copy, slow load times, and friction in checkout physically bother you

You work independently and bring solutions, not problems





This Role Is NOT for You If...



You've only worked with physical product or SaaS funnels — digital ebook sales is a different world

You've used SamCart but never built a full setup from scratch

You can't show real conversion data from past work

You treat CRO as guesswork rather than a structured testing process

You need someone else to make all the decisions





Details



Remote, flexible hours

Starts with a paid project to build out the initial funnel

Potential for ongoing retainer based on results





How to Apply



A brief intro — who you are and the digital product funnels you've built

Specific examples of funnels you've built from scratch, with conversion numbers

Your experience with SamCart specifically — walk us through a setup you've built

How you'd approach building a funnel for a digital cookbook brand

Your rate and availability



Applications without real conversion data and SamCart experience will not be reviewed.

title: Recipe Blog Manager/ SEO Expert
description:
We're a food content brand with a growing recipe blog and we're looking for an SEO expert to help us dominate search in our niche.

This is not a general SEO role. We need someone who knows food blogging and recipe SEO specifically — how Google treats recipe content, what it takes to outrank established food blogs, and how to build sustainable organic traffic that actually converts.

If you've done this before and have rankings and traffic growth to prove it — keep reading.



What You'll Do



Conduct deep keyword research focused on recipe and food content

Audit existing posts and build a clear prioritized optimization plan

Optimize posts for RankMath — schema, headings, internal linking, meta, and more

Identify content gaps and opportunities competitors are winning on

Analyze competitors in the food blogging space and reverse-engineer what's working

Track rankings and organic traffic and report on progress regularly

Advise on site architecture, category structure, and internal linking strategy

Stay current on Google algorithm updates and how they affect food and recipe sites





You're the Right Fit If...



You have 3+ years of SEO experience with a proven track record in the food blogging niche specifically

You can name food blogs you've worked on and show the traffic growth you drove

You know RankMath inside and out

You understand how recipe schema, Helpfulness updates, and E-E-A-T apply to food content

You're familiar with tools like Ahrefs, SEMrush, or similar and use data to make decisions

You think in systems — you don't just optimize one post, you build a strategy

You communicate clearly and can translate SEO into plain language for a non-technical team

You work independently and deliver without needing to be chased





This Role Is NOT for You If...



Your SEO experience is in e-commerce, SaaS, or general blogging — food is a different game

You can't show real traffic numbers from past work

You're not up to date on how Google has treated food and recipe sites in recent algorithm updates

You think keyword stuffing and basic meta descriptions are still a strategy

You need a lot of hand-holding to get started





Details



Remote, flexible hours

Project-based or ongoing retainer — open to discuss

Starts with a paid audit and strategy project





How to Apply



A brief intro — who you are and the food blogs you've worked on

Specific examples of rankings or traffic growth you've driven in the food niche, with numbers

Your approach to recipe SEO and how you'd start with a new client

Your rate and availability

title: Email Strategist & Copywriter (Kit) — Food Content Brand

 list — and we're looking for a true

This is not a "set up a welcome sequence and disappear" role. We need someone who understands the food blogging space, writes with warmth and personality, and knows how to turn subscribers into loyal fans and buyers — and who can also handle the technical side of making it all work on WordPress.

You write
s that actually get read. Subject lines, openers, CTAs — all of it

, and TikTok.

?

? Output expectations may include:

Qualifications

? Proven experience in video editing for social media and YouTube (portfolio required)

? Experience creating content for:

? YouTube, TikTok, LinkedIn, and

? Strong understanding of:

? Audience engagement strategies

What We’re Looking For

? Someone who can bring creativity and originality to content

title: Senior Digital Marketing Strategist & Client Success Lead
description:
***Must be available Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Eastern Standard Time (EST)



About the Role



We are looking for a senior-level digital marketing strategist who can lead client strategy, strengthen account direction, and serve as the final strategic quality checkpoint before deliverables reach clients.



This role is ideal for someone who combines strong marketing thinking with client confidence — someone who can see the bigger picture, identify gaps, and guide accounts toward measurable growth.



You will work closely with leadership and account managers, helping ensure each client account stays strategically aligned, professionally managed, and positioned for long-term success.



This role focuses on strategic oversight and client leadership — not production execution.



Core Responsibilities

Strategic Marketing Leadership

Build digital marketing strategies tailored to client goals

Develop SEO roadmaps, keyword opportunities, and content direction

Conduct website audits and identify improvement opportunities

Review analytics, traffic performance, and campaign results

Perform competitor and market analysis

Lead strategic planning sessions and quarterly reviews



Client Success & Strategic Guidance

Serve as senior strategic advisor for key client accounts

Join strategic client meetings and consultations

Help guide account managers on communication and client direction

Support handling of escalations and complex discussions

Identify growth opportunities and upsell recommendations



Final Strategic QA

Review major deliverables before client submission

Ensure work aligns with strategy, goals, and quality standards

Catch inconsistencies, missing details, or weak strategic logic

Provide feedback to improve recurring quality issues



Sales Support

Participate in discovery calls when strategic expertise is needed

Help create recommendations, proposals, and strategic assessments for prospects



Required Experience

7+ years in digital marketing, SEO, or growth strategy

Strong client-facing experience in an agency or consulting environment

Proven experience creating marketing strategies that generate measurable results

Strong understanding of SEO, content strategy, analytics, and reporting



Tools & Platforms

Google Analytics / GA4

Google Search Console

GTM

CRM platforms

Marketing automation tools



Certifications Required:

(Please provide one or more of these certs)

Google Analytics (GA4)

Semrush SEO Certification

Ahrefs Certification

SE Ranking Academy Certification



What We Value

Strong strategic thinking

High attention to detail

Calm and professional communication

Ability to simplify complex ideas

Independent ownership and accountability



As the next step, please send a short video (maximum 3 minutes) answering the following:



-Briefly introduce yourself and your digital marketing background.

Please record in English and reply with your video link together with portfolio & Resume.

title: Customer Service Manager
description:
Role Overview

We are looking for an experienced and proactive Customer Service Manager to oversee and manage our customer support operations across multiple platforms. This role is responsible for ensuring smooth communication with customers, handling returns and refunds, monitoring service performance, reporting key insights to improve overall product & service quality and suggest new ways of improving our processes.

As customer inquiries are currently manageable, this role will also include supporting additional administrative tasks as needed (training will be provided).

Daily Customer Support

Respond to customer inquiries professionally and promptly

Process refunds and handle customer returns

Take incoming calls when required

Be available to respond to online chat enquiries

Ensure customer issues are resolved efficiently and accurately

Weekend Coverage & SLA

Amazon messages must be checked within the agreed Service Level Agreement (SLA), including weekends

Weekend coverage is primarily for monitoring and responding to urgent issues - normally there are minimal or no messages, but inbox checks are required as a precaution. 

We will need at least 30 minutes of both Saturday and Sunday for inbox and sales tracking

Performance & Reporting

Monitor customer service KPIs

Identify recurring customer complaints or product issues

Prepare weekly reports summarising:

Common customer concerns

Refund and return trends

Key improvement opportunities

Share actionable insights with the team to help improve products and processes



Additional Responsibilities

Support administrative tasks as required

Assist with process improvements

Undertake additional duties as assigned (training and guidance will be provided)



Required Experience & Skills

Strong knowledge of Amazon policies, processes, and restrictions

Experience working with Amazon Seller Central

Familiarity with Shopify, eBay and Walmart platforms

Proven experience in customer service management

Strong written and verbal communication skills

Confident in preparing and presenting weekly performance reports

Highly organised and detail-oriented

Able to work independently and take ownership of tasks



Personal Attributes

Proactive and solution-focused

Confident communicator

Comfortable working in a fast-paced eCommerce environment

Ability to analyse data and turn insights into action

description:
Applications are only accepted via
. Replies to this job post will not be responded to.



About the role

We're not just looking for someone who can cut clips and add music. We're looking for a VSL editor who genuinely cares about the outcome — someone who watches a script and immediately starts thinking: how do I show this, not just tell it?

This is a long-term position on a structured, tight-knit team. If you're the kind of editor who gets excited by understanding a customer and figuring out what visuals will actually move them — read on.



What you'll be doing



Editing high-converting VSLs that pair strong scripts with the right visuals — not just stock footage, but intentional storytelling.

Spending real time understanding the target customer before you touch a timeline — their language, their fears, their desires.

Keeping viewers glued to the screen using pacing, pattern interrupts, text overlays, and dynamic cuts that serve the message.

Collaborating closely with our team — asking questions, sharing ideas, flagging things that could be stronger.

Continuously improving your workflow and staying up to date with what's actually working in direct-response video.





You'll thrive here if you



Don't just execute — you think. You push back when something could be better and bring ideas without being asked.

Understand that a great VSL is a sales tool first, and every editing decision should serve the conversion goal.

Are comfortable working within a structured environment with clear processes — no guesswork, no ambiguity.

Have a strong work ethic and take pride in the quality of what you ship, even on tight timelines.

Enjoy being part of a team, not just a freelancer working in a silo.

Are always looking to sharpen your craft — studying what converts, what keeps people watching, what doesn't.





What we offer



A structured team environment where you always know what's expected — no confusion, no dropped balls.

A stable, long-term working relationship with room to grow as we scale.

Honest feedback and real collaboration. We value your creative input.

A comfortable remote setup with clear communication and consistent workload.





How to apply

Send an
 to: 
 with the subject line "VSL Editor Application" and include:



2–3 VSL samples you're proud of (links preferred)

A short note (3–5 sentences) on how you approach a new VSL project before you edit a single frame

Your typical turnaround time and software of choice



We only accept applications submitted via
. Any replies left on job boards or social platforms will not be reviewed or responded to.

title: AI Tech Executive Admin (Full-time/WFH)
description:
We are a growth-focused US-based company looking for a long-term Filipino teammate who loves technology, learns fast, and enjoys using AI to make work easier and smarter.



If you’re the kind of person who figures out new tools on your own, helps others when they get stuck, and likes making systems run smoothly, this role is for you.



About the Role

You will be our internal “tech systems owner” and AI champion. You don’t need to code, but you must be very comfortable with software, platforms, and AI tools.



Technology & Systems Management

• Administer Microsoft 365 
, Word, SharePoint, OneDrive).

• Add/remove users and manage permissions across systems.

• Maintain internal access controls and basic security settings.



Zoom & Communication Systems

• Manage company Zoom accounts (phone and video).

• Set up new tea
mbers with the correct settings.

• Adjust recordings, permissions, and integrations as needed.



CRM & Platform Support

• Learn and support our CRM (HubSpot, Keap, or similar).

• Troubleshoot basic CRM issues, especially for sales.

• Help keep data clean and users properly set up.



AI & Productivity Tools

• Administer tools like ChatGPT, Otter AI, DocuSign, and similar.

• Set up new users, remove access when people leave.

• Help teammates troubleshoot issues and suggest ways to use AI to improve workflows.



Team Tech Support & Onboarding

• Be the internal go-to person for “How do I…?” tech questions.

• Assist with setup, access, and basic troubleshooting.

• Follow onboarding checklists to set up systems for new hires.



What We’re Looking For

• Strong comfort with technology and remote platforms.

• Genuine excitement about AI tools and emerging technologies.

• Fast learner who can figure out new platforms independently.

• Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills.

• Organized and able to manage multiple systems at once.

• Excellent communication skills.

• Advantage if you have experience with: Microsoft 365, Zoom, CRMs, and AI tools.



We are not looking for someone who is just “trying this out.” We want someone who sees this as a long-term professional home, wants to grow with the company, and takes ownership of their work.



Why You’ll Love Working With Us

• Work directly with a growth-focused leadership team.

• Be at the forefront of integrating AI into daily operations.

• Help build smarter systems that support a high-performing remote team.

• Stable, long-term, full-time role (not project-based).

• Weekends off and respect for work–life balance.



What’s on Offer

• Basic salary (paid on time, every time).

• Weekends off.

• Paid holidays & paid time off.

• HMO (after 1 year).

• Tech incentive.

• Referral incentive.



Required Tools & Setup (Non-Negotiable)

• Computer: Laptop/desktop less than 3 years old.

• CPU: Intel i5 (10th-gen or newer) or AMD Ryzen 5+.

• RAM: At least 8GB.

• Internet: 50–100 Mbps (with a backup connection).

• Audio/Video: Working webcam, microphone, and headset.

• Quiet, professional workspace for calls and focused work.



How to Apply (Please Follow Instructions Carefully): To help us see that you pay attention to detail and follow directions (which is very important in this role), please follow all steps below:

1.
 your application to: 
 

2. Subject line: AI Tech Executive Admin

3. Attach your updated resume (PDF preferred).

4. In the body of your
, answer these questions briefly:

1–2 sentences: Why do you enjoy working with technology and AI tools?

List 2–4 AI tools you currently use and 1–2 sentences on how each helps you work better.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered. This helps us find someone who is careful, reliable, and detail-oriented—exactly who we want to invest in long-term.
