title: Real Estate Executive Assistant in Marketing
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a confident, hands-on Growth Marketing Manager to own our end-to-end investor marketing efforts.



This role is for someone who knows how to build demand, generate qualified leads, and make smart marketing decisions independently—not someone who waits for step-by-step instructions.



If you enjoy blending strategy + execution, care about results, and are comfortable working within financial/compliance guidelines, this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities

• Build and manage investor-focused marketing campaigns (content,
, digital, partnerships, events)

• Develop clear, credible brand messaging for the Company

• Create and manage lead magnets, nurture sequences, and authority content (guides, case studies, webinars)

• D
 which channels, content, and offers to prioritize (within approved budget and compliance rules)

• Track performance and optimize based on data (leads, cost per lead, conversions)

• Work closely with Investor Relations, leadership, and legal/compliance



Required Skills and Experience

• Proven experience in marketing, generating leads, creating pitch decks, one-pagers, and other investor-facing materials

• Strong background in content marketing and positioning

• Experience in B2B, financial services, or real estate marketing is preferred

• Comfortable working within a compliance or regulated environment



Non-Negotiable Must-Haves

• Demonstrated lead generation results

• Ability to work independently and take ownership

• Strong communication and cross-functional collaboration skills



Tech Requirements (non-Negotiables): Applications without device specs/screenshots will not be considered.

• Applicants must meet the following technical requirements and attach device specs/screenshots:

• Laptop or desktop (maximum 3 years service)

• CPU: Intel i5 (10th Gen or higher) or AMD Ryzen 5+

• RAM: 8GB minimum

• Internet: 50–100 Mbps with backup connection

• Working webcam, microphone, and headset



How To Apply

Step 1:
 your application to 

Subject line: Job Application — Marketing Manager



Step 2: Attach the following:

- Updated resume

- Device specs and internet speed screenshots



Step 3: In the
 body, answer briefly (2–3 sentences each):

- Your experience with investor or accredited investor marketing

- Your internet speed (main and backup) and preferred working hours



Tip: Links to a portfolio, sample dashboards, reports, or SOPs you’ve created are a plus.

title: Finance Operations Specialist (QuickBooks + Advanced Excel) – Remote
description:
Why This Role Exists?

We are hiring a Finance Operations Specialist to own and elevate our financial systems.



This is not an administrative assistant role. This is a finance-driven seat responsible for accuracy, reporting clarity, and process improvement.

If you love clean books, smart dashboards, and using AI to streamline financial workflows — this role is for you.



Your Mission - Within your first 90 days, you will:

· Run QuickBooks independently with zero supervision

· Maintain accurate AP/AR and invoice workflows

· Deliver clean, reliable monthly financial reports

· Build and maintain Excel dashboards for financial visibility

· Create process flowcharts and SOPs for finance operations

· Introduce at least one AI-driven efficiency improvement in finance workflows

Success = Accurate books, clear dashboards, and scalable financial systems.



What You’ll Own? 

Finance Operations (Primary Focus)

·  Full-cycle bookkeeping in QuickBooks

·  Invoice creation, tracking, and reconciliation

·  AP/AR management and reporting

·  Cash flow updates

·  Month-end close support

·  Financial reporting preparation

·  Dashboard creation (Excel-based)

·  Spreadsheet modeling and analysis

·  Process mapping (flowcharts, SOP documentation)

·  AI-assisted workflow optimization



What You Must Bring (Non-Negotiables)?

· 2+ years finance or bookkeeping experience

· Advanced QuickBooks proficiency (must run seamlessly)

· Advanced Excel skills (pivot tables, dashboards, formulas, reporting)

· Strong Microsoft Word formatting/documentation skills

· Experience building financial dashboards

· Experience creating flowcharts/process documentation

· Familiarity with AI tools (ChatGPT, automation tools, AI reporting support)

· High attention to detail

· Strong written English



Tech requirements (non-negotiable). Attach device specs/screenshots with your application.

· Laptop/desktop (less than 3 years old)

· CPU: Intel i5 10th-gen+ / AMD Ryzen 5+

· RAM: 8GB+

· Internet: 50–100 Mbps (with backup)

· A/V: Working webcam, mic, and headset



Benefits & Perks: 

· Paid Company Holidays, PTO, Referral incentives

· HMO upon 1st year

· Quarterly PAG-IBIG incentive

· Tech incentive

· Tokens from employee engagement events

· Company-facilitated hackathons / free learning sessions

· Year-end virtual event

· Bi-monthly salary

· Weekends off

· Supportive remote team community



How to apply (3 quick steps):

1.
 

Subject: Job Application — Executive Admin (Finance & Ops)



2. Attach your resume and device specs/screenshots.



3. In the body, answer briefly (2–3 sentences each):

- Your experience with QuickBooks (modules used + typical weekly tasks)

- A recent finance/ops process you improved—what changed?

- Your internet speed (main + backup), and your working hours preference



Tip: Links to a portfolio, sample reports/dashboards, or SOP you created are a plus.

title: CSR - Pestpac experience required
description:

Interact with customers via phone and

title: Social Media Manager
description:
Content Manager: $500/month (Remote role)



I need someone to run my content pipeline. You're the person between the ideas and the final posted video. 6 hour working days. $4/hr. YOU MUST HAVE 3 MONTHS OF CONTENT CREATION/SOCIAL MEDIA MANAGEMENT EXPERIENCE



What you'll do:

Take our content ideas and turn them into clear directions for editors

Send the right footage and photos to editors at the right time

Review every video before it goes out, fix bad cuts, off-beat music, caption typos, and anything that looks amateur

Clean up errors from non-English speaking editors

Assign work, track deadlines, and make sure videos actually get posted on time

Write captions and descriptions for posts

In between the crocks of filming and managing editors to get all content shipped

Create and post stories



You need to be:

Branding expert, aesthetically creative, & have branding/graphic design background

Organized: nothing falls through the cracks

A clear communicator: editors know exactly what you want, online at least 6 hours through the workday (USA workday) M-F at 10-4pm EST. Meeting deadlines and scheduling content on days off to meet day-off deadlines

Native and fluent with American English

Have a good eye for what looks professional & quality vs. what doesn't

Reliable: deadlines are deadlines

Content creation experience



MUST have strong wifi, EST HOURS only, and great communication skills. You will be LIVE with the editing team daily.



DO NOT APPLY IF ONE OR MORE ABOVE DOES NOT FIT YOU



But if you want to work with the best and challenge yourself, send me application to 
 with the subject line "CONTENT MANAGER"



Please include the following or my team will automatically skip your
: 

Subject line: CONTENT MANAGER



In the
, please send a LOOM VIDEO telling us all of this:

Short background story of content experience

Have you edited content before? Tell me about it. For how long?

Please showcase your best pieces of branding work (IG stories you’ve created + posted for brands/videos you've created)

Your working experience

Any relevant experience managing editors or creative teams

Please also attach a portfolio of your best work (ugc portfolio, videos, short films, YouTube content, branding content, video editing portfolio etc.)



Looking forward to your application. Hiring asap.

Gloria Stonelake
